name: A World Without Song
desc: Every 3 hits with a Wind Mantra now procs Suffocating.
additionalInfo: The hit count required to proc this Talent is increased to 4 if you have less than 75 Galebreathe, and increased to 5 if you have less than 40 Galebreathe.

name: Absolute Force
desc: Evolve the technique of your Oppressive Force, letting both hits of your flourish deal 50% more posture damage.

name: Absolute Pitch
desc: You can cast Ritual Mantras instantly.
additionalInfo: If you have less than 100 Intelligence, this will instead halve the required Ritual Keys (rounded up).

name: Absolute Radiance
desc: Dealing damage with Dawnwalker mantras briefly makes you immune to all elemental effects for a short period.
additionalInfo: All elemental status effects cannot be applied to you during Absolute Radiance.

name: Acceleration Points
desc: Striking an opponent in the back with mobility mantras or Basic Attacks now steals and grants additional momentum.

name: Action Surge
desc: Adrenaline Surge now increases your swing speed by 0.04 for its duration.
additionalInfo: Both this and Vigil's Grace are applied before Lightning Cloak's swing speed multiplier.

name: Actions Speak Louder
desc: Your Critical Attack cooldown is 20% shorter, but your Resonance cooldown is 20% longer. In areas where your Resonance is suppressed, reduce your cooldown by 10% instead.
additionalInfo: In 1v1 Chime of Conflict, your critical cooldown is reduced by 10% instead.

name: Acute Hearing
desc: After years of using Echolocation, you've trained your ears to sense danger from even further away. You are also able to sense when someone completes a job.
additionalInfo: Your Echolocation now has a sound effect on proc.

name: Ad Astra
desc: Return Home
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that allows you to travel to and from The Floating Keep.

name: Adept Bloodrender
desc: You can now obtain 1-star Bloodrender mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Adept Flamecharmer
desc: You can now obtain 1-Star Leveled Flamecharmer Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Adept Frostdrawer
desc: You can now obtain 1-Star Leveled Frostdrawer Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Adept Galebreather
desc: You can now obtain 1-Star Leveled Galebreathe mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Adept Ironsinger
desc: You can now obtain 1-star Ironsinger mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Adept Shadowcaster
desc: You can now obtain 1-star Leveled Shadowcaster Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Adept Thundercaller
desc: You can now obtain 1-star Thundercaller mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Aerogliding
desc: When falling from a high place, hold spacebar to generate wind currents until you hit the floor.
additionalInfo: When active, create an aura that reduces fall speed and stops fall damage. Automatically ends after 5 seconds.

name: Aeronade
desc: Your Galetrap automatically detonates on contact with an object.
additionalInfo: Galetrap normally waits for contact with a target to begin its tornado, Galetrap now detonates once the trap stops moving.

name: After Cut
desc: If an attack is physical and wind it will apply an after cut that does 10% of the damage you dealt. If an attack was a mantra, it does 5% damage instead.
additionalInfo: The damage After Cut deals is based on the attack's modified damage.

name: Against All Odds
desc: For each combat tag you have on your character, increase your damage by 2% (max of 14%).

name: Agility Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your agility to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Agility Attribute. The requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Agility on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.

name: Agitating Spark
desc: Applying Burning to enemies spreads to anyone nearby. Including yourself.
additionalInfo: On proc, a small orange particle will trail between the burning target you hit and other targets nearby, setting them on fire and granting Emperor Flame stacks. Agitating Spark bypasses block and parry. Agitating Spark procs from self damage do not apply burn. 1 second cooldown.

name: Air Pressure
desc: Dodging an attack or hitting an enemy's block will transform your next dash into a Gale Dash. Gale Dashes carry you further than regular dashes and have extended iframes, but will clear immediately should you initiate an attack.

name: All Above, Gods Below
desc: Any healing your opponent were to receive while All The Dead Gods is active on them is stolen and given to you, increase your PvE Heal Boost to 15% as well.
additionalInfo: Only applies to "active" healing. The duration of this effect will be reduced if you do not meet the Talent's requirements. This will not proc if you are the one who applied the healing; you cannot heal yourself by healing your opponent.

name: All Knowing
desc: Your prediction now ignores the range requirement to reflect attacks.

name: All the Dead Gods
desc: Your Basic Attacks now apply anti-heal and 5% Heal Boost against PvE for 8s.
additionalInfo: Whenever you land a Basic Attack, the target has most healing forms reduced/disabled for 8 seconds. Your anti-heal potency scales on your Willpower + Intelligence investment, only having 100% anti-heal if your Intelligence and Willpower attributes add up to at least 105.

name: All-Seeing Eye
desc: The mystic eye through which you now see the world can perceive the imperceptible. Invisible foes are highlighted.
additionalInfo: Invisible players, including yourself, and monsters are revealed by a Blindseer Eye icon showcasing their current position.

name: Alloy of the Heavens
desc: Posture attack from mobs reduced by 50%
additionalInfo: Reduces posture damage taken from mobs by 50%.

name: Alloy Siphon
desc: Iron Pull siphons armor from your foes, restoring your posture.

name: Alloyblood
desc: You don't bleed like others do. Bleed damage reduced by 30%. Blood loss is reduced by 75%.
additionalInfo: The effects of Alloyblood scale linearly with Ironsing investment, losing 0.3% bleed damage reduction and 0.75% blood loss damage reduction for every point in Ironsing below 100. Blood loss reduction is less effective if you are using the Curse of the No Life King Enchantment and stacks multiplicatively with Cauterized Wounds. The blood loss reduction does not affect blood drain effects like casting or being hit by Bloodrend Mantras, blood drain potions, and the blood loss Corrupt Resonance downside.

name: Alloyed Soles
desc: Reduces the duration of Knockdown applied to you.

name: Already Dead
desc: You take reduced damage from abilities with a health cost.
additionalInfo: Removes the self damage from Deepspindle's running critical. Reduces the self damage from Shade Devour, Flame Within (on cast, NOT the burn ticks), Rush Hour, Shadow Travel, Electrify, and 'Poison' Corrupt Resonance downside. Reduces the self Wither gain from Symbiotic Link and the 'Wither' Corrupt Resonance downside.

name: Ambush
desc: When coming out of Tacet, gain a 30% damage boost for 5 seconds.

name: Amp Overdrive
desc: Guardbreaking an opponent causes them to take extra thunder damage and applies Electrify for 7 seconds.
additionalInfo: Deals 15 Thundercall damage. The Electrify status effect changes your opponent's damage type to Thundercall and gives you 10% damage reduction to their attacks.

name: Amplified Rage
desc: Amped now grants you an additional +10% weapon damage.
additionalInfo: Increases Amped's damage buff from 10% to 20%.

name: Amplified Reflexes
desc: Amped now grants enhanced speed and parkour, but triples the self-damage on use and doubles its cooldown.
additionalInfo: Increases the self damage from casting Electrify from 5% of your current health to 15% of your current health. Increases Electrify's cooldown to 2 minutes. While Amped, your walk speed will be increased by 50% and your climb height will be increased by 15%.

name: An Ironsinger's Instinct
desc: Successfully dodging an attack coats you in metal and reduces the damage of the next attack taken.
additionalInfo: Grants 60% damage reduction for 2 seconds. Ends early if you take damage. 18 second cooldown.

name: Analyze
desc: Marking enemies with your Callout analyzes them, making them take 20% more damage from all sources for 10 seconds.
additionalInfo: 45 second cooldown.

name: Anchor Shock
desc: Your Blightshock prevents targets from using mobility mantras.
additionalInfo: This puts your opponent's mobility slot Mantras on a 3 second cooldown whenever Blightshock is applied from a Blightsurger Mantra.

name: Ancient Metalwork
desc: Your critical hit can channel the effects of your Ironsing Rods and disrupt the resonances of others, disabling them for 25 seconds.
additionalInfo: Landing your weapon critical puts your opponent's Resonance on a 25 second cooldown.

name: Angel's Guise
desc: You resemble one of the Sworn Angels.
additionalInfo: Grants immunity to the Watcher's Watcher Gaze attack, preventing Sanity loss, vision distortion, and the spawning of Hollow Angel(s). Additionally grants unique dialogue with the Watchers.

name: Ankle Cutter
desc: You can now do a special ground slash while sliding, applying a temporary speed debuff to those hit, as well as preventing jumping.
additionalInfo: Deals 37.5 Oath damage. If in Flow State, this is increased to 52.5 and the windup is reduced. Has innate bleed. 6 second cooldown.

name: Another Man's Trash
desc: Take unequipped equipment when mugging a player. Gain a little more damage against PvE the more you are currently carrying.
additionalInfo: If the player you are mugging doesn't have any Notes, you will still take any unequipped equipment. You cannot steal Soulbound or Enchanted items. Gain +0.001% damage for every 1 Weight you're carrying. Every 100 Weight = +1% damage.

name: Antithetic Salts
desc: Alter your brews to invert their effects. Does not count towards the ingredient limit.
additionalInfo: Gives you a Talent tool-like ability that acts as a potion ingredient on use. When applied to your potions, it inverts the effects of the ingredients in the potion.

name: Apothecary
desc: Potions you prepare will have amplified positive effects when consumed, and amplified negative effects when thrown.
additionalInfo: Additively increases potion Potency by 125%. Acts similarly to a potion ingredient, remaining active if you no longer have the Talent.

name: Apparitions
desc: Your Haunted Phantoms become Apparitions that apply Winded on hit. Apparitions cannot be parried if you are in Phantom Step.
additionalInfo: Apparitions can only spawn from Haunted Gale being procced on Galebreathe Mantras or by proccing effects that would normally apply Suffocation.

name: Approaching Singularity
desc: You now gain +1% Mantra PEN for every 10 point of Intelligence.
additionalInfo: Gives 0.1% Mantra PEN per point in Intelligence.

name: Arc Module: Dash
desc: [In Arc Suit] Your dashes become Jet Dashes, allowing you to attack while dashing.
additionalInfo: Jet dashes go much further than regular dashes. Also allows the user to M1 while performing a dash, ending their dash early.

name: Arc Module: Eject
desc: [In Arc Suit] When blockbroken, eject from your suit.
additionalInfo: Your posture will be set to 50% on activation.

name: Arc Module: Enhance
desc: [In Arc Suit] Your Arcwarder Mantras deal increased damage.
additionalInfo: Arc Beam's base dmg is increased by 50%, Arc Wave's base damage is increased by 25%.

name: Arc Module: Guard
desc: [In Arc Suit] You can block attacks from any direction and cannot be backstabbed.
additionalInfo: Prevents "backhit" Talents from proccing and grants 360 block against all attacks.

name: Arc Module: Leap
desc: [In Arc Suit] Holding Spacebar after double jumping propels you up for a short duration.
additionalInfo: 10 second CD outside of combat, 15 second CD in combat.

name: Arc Module: Null
desc: [In Arc Suit] Outgoing and incoming enchant effects are nullified. Can be toggled with N.

name: Ardour Scream
desc: Amplify your shout into a scream using Ardour, dominating weaker foes, Victims take 12.5% more damage and 50% more posture damage for 10s.
additionalInfo: Consumes 100% of your Ether on use. Ardour Scream requires you to have a minimum of 100% Ether to be casted. Having the Soul Infusion Talent will reduce this to a minimum of 40% Ether.  Combat tags opponents hit. Notably, its damage and posture damage buffs are applied on-hit to incoming attacks rather than being a debuff that increases damage/posture damage taken, meaning Ardour Scream is affected by the damage and posture damage modifier caps. Also has a 95-Stud range (245 if Soulbreaker),

name: Armor Conserver
desc: You lose 15% less armor when hit.
additionalInfo: Does not affect Natural Armor from Exoskeleton and Chitin.

name: Armor Piercing
desc: [Guns] Your gun attacks now ignore 10% of an opponent's blunt armor. Applied Multiplicatively before PEN is applied.
additionalInfo: This has heavy diminishing returns in effectiveness with the more PEN you have. Elemental guns may not benefit from this Talent at all depending on your opponent's resistances, as the highest resistance value is prioritized.

name: Armored Plating
desc: Put on extra plating on your armor, giving you 50 temp health whenever you are put in combat. Due to the weight of this additional plating, you have reduced speed at all times.

name: Aromatic Salts
desc: Alter your brews to create lingering clouds of mist on shattering. Does not count towards the ingredient limit.
additionalInfo: Gives you a Talent tool-like ability that acts as a potion ingredient on use. This changes your thrown potions to a lingering cloud that lasts for 10 seconds, applying the potion's effects on each hit.

name: Art of the Deal
desc: Your rapport with merchants gives you lower prices!
additionalInfo: Reduces the purchase price of items by 10%.

name: Artisan Chef
desc: The food you cook now becomes Artisan food, increasing its hunger and thirst gained by +25%.
additionalInfo: Increases food nutritional value by 25%. Increases the healing gained from using Fondant Splitter's critical.

name: Artisan's Blade
desc: Activating Scrapsinger forges a metal blade behind you for every 2 rods you consume. Metal blades will fire at a target upon landing an ironsing or metal infused attack.
additionalInfo: Each Artisan Blade has 8 Base damage with 5 Ironsing scaling, gaining 0.04 damage per Ironsing investment. Artisan Rods deal 4.5 posture damage if blocked. Pulling rods normally also procs this Talent. "Metal infused attacks" refers to Ironsing legendary weapon attacks.

name: Ascended Phoenix Flames
desc: Once per fight, when an attack would down you immediately revive with 30% HP.

name: Ash Ember
reqs: ash_ember := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s FLM
desc: The more wither your opponent has, the more damage your burn deals.
additionalInfo: At 90 FLM 90 WPN you gain a 0.0175 burn damage increase per 1 point of wither. This has very slight Flamecharm and Weapon scaling.

name: Assassin's Strike
desc: Your Rapid Slashes now deals twice the amount of damage.
additionalInfo: Doubles the base damage of Rapid Slashes.

name: Audacity
desc: Once you've brought down your prey, instill fear into all those who would separate you from claiming it. Charmed or nearby enemies will fear for longer. Nearby allies gain a 10% damage buff (40s).
additionalInfo: Applies true stun to nearby enemies when you start a manual execution on a humanoid target. 25 second cooldown. The buff duration will be reduced by 0.1 seconds for every point of Charisma and Strength you are below Audacity's requirements, capping at a minimum 35 second duration with 75 Charisma and 25 Strength.

name: Authority Ensign
desc: You are a member of the Authority deployed to the Eastern Luminant. You may find trouble with the local factions and must become stronger through advancing the Authority's position.

name: Authority Intimidation
desc: Lightning moves slow your opponent more.

name: Avaricious Blade
desc: Every strike landed lines your pockets.
additionalInfo: Dealing damage by any means gives 1 Note, with backhits giving 50 Notes instead. This can proc on self damage.

name: Azure Flames
desc: Many of your flames turn blue, signifying their increased intensity.
additionalInfo: Increases burn damage by 12.5%. Increases the radius and posture damage of Eruptions. Increases Flame of Denial's duration by 25%.

name: Backstabber
desc: Landing a backhit with a light attack causes you to grab your opponent and stab them again, dealing an extra 15 damage.
additionalInfo: Has no range limit. Also procs on criticals with the M1 tag and Silentheart abilities. Applies daze and ragdolls.

name: Bane
desc: Activate to make your light attacks teleport to the closest enemy nearby.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that on use allows you to teleport to your opponent when you M1 for 20 seconds. The teleportation has a range limit of 25 studs. Additionally grants a speed boost for the full duration. 100 second cooldown.

name: Barber's Skillset
desc: What type of look are we going for today?
additionalInfo: Gives a Talent tool that opens an outdated version of the Barber UI. When selecting others: Changes what haircut your Fadetrimmer Mantras apply on hit. When selecting yourself: Changes your own hair.

name: Barrage Mastery
desc: For every Ether Erudite stack you have, gain one extra orb whenever you fire your Ether Barrage.
additionalInfo: Increases the projectile count of Ether Barrage based on how many stacks of Ether Erudite you have.

name: Battery Sapper
desc: If your Human Battery targets have Ether, it will drain their Ether to help pay for your Mantras. 10s cooldown.

name: Battle Frenzy
desc: The grip on your weapon tightens, reduce the posture of all mantras you block with this effect scaling with the number of combat tags you have on your character.
additionalInfo: This reduces the posture damage of incoming Mantras by 1 per hit, per combat tag you have. If you have more combat tags than the Mantra does posture damage, this can go into the negatives and your posture will be restored instead.

name: Battle Tendency
desc: You can breathe more easily with +20% faster posture regen.
additionalInfo: This only affects passive posture regeneration.

name: Battle-Hardened
desc: Reduce how much damage you take from mantra guardbreaks by 20%.

name: Bear Trap
desc: Landing a hit with your critical against an opponent makes your opponent unable to jump for a duration. Also slows your opponent.
additionalInfo: Affected targets cannot jump for 4 seconds. Targets gain 6 seconds of Bear Trap immunity.

name: Beginner's Luck
desc: Slightly increase the amount of loot you find in chests.

name: Behind You
desc: Landing a basic attack behind your enemy after feinting a mantra will apply an ether slash, dealing extra damage based on how much ether you have left.
additionalInfo: This deals a separate instance of physical damage, scaling on your weapon's damage and your current Ether%.

name: Beiruul's Vengeance
desc: Deal 5% more damage to factions that despise you. Serves them right.

name: Belief
desc: Your medium weapon mantras now deal extra damage based on how much Willpower you have.
additionalInfo: All of your Medium Weapon Mantras gain a second damage instance that scales directly on your Willpower investment and deals physical damage. This deals 0.15 damage per 1 Willpower investment, up to 15 damage at 100 Willpower or 15.45 at 103 Willpower. This has no cooldown.

name: Benefactor
desc: Gain reputation for selling goods to Antiquarians within faction territories.
additionalInfo: Grants faction reputation upon selling items to their respective Antiquarian.

name: Berserk
desc: One with nothing to lose has everything to gain. Succumb to burning rage within and enter Berserk State.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that nullifies your armor and natural armor on use. While active, your M1s nullify your opponent's armor, and your criticals gain +10% PEN. This procs effects that only activate if you or your opponent had no armor durability. Lasts 20 seconds, halved to 10 if you do not meet the Talent requirements.

name: Biotic Salts
desc: Alter your brews to not provide their positive effects to your enemies. Does not count towards the ingredient limit.
additionalInfo: Gives you a Talent tool-like ability that acts as a potion ingredient on use. This halves the negative effects of your potion if used on allies (including yourself) and halves the positive effects of your potions if used on enemies.

name: Blackhole
desc: Your singularity pulls everyone nearby in.
additionalInfo: Pulls anyone nearby in a medium sized aoe to the closest opponent you hit with a shadow mantra.

name: Blade Dancer
desc: Landing a Basic Attack removes your roll cooldown.

name: Blade Scholar
desc: Landing your fist critical attack switches your stance to that fist style. Retain the same swing speed and damage your Markor's Inheritor had. You gain more swingspeed the more Intelligence you have.

name: Blade Threading
desc: Your Metal Greatsword now has Metal Fakeout as its critical attack. Landing Critical attacks applies metal rod and slow.
additionalInfo: The Metal Fakeout critical will only be used while you are in targeting range. Additionally, this attack has innate Bleed and counts as a weapon attack, not a Mantra.

name: Blade's Edge
desc: [Spears] Damage dealt with the tip of the spear is increased by 10%
additionalInfo: The "tip of the spear" is the end of your weapon's range.

name: Blend In
desc: You resemble one of the Enforcers, become unnoticeable by regular depths mobs.
additionalInfo: Most monsters in the Depths will be neutral you while you have this equipment on.

name: Blessing of the Moonseye
desc: The Moonseye is not one eye, but many. All of them watch you. All of them know of your sins.
additionalInfo: Upon obtaining this Talent, you will lose all of your Sanity permanently. Defeating the three main progression bosses while having this Talent will unlock the Prince of the Moon Memento.

name: Blight Pierce
desc: Your Blightshock attacks pierce through your enemies hyperarmor and gain more penetration.
additionalInfo: Blightshock now works similar to regular Shock, canceling hyperarmor.

name: Blighted Song
desc: Attaching your Shadow Chains to enemies disables yours and the enemy's ability to cast mantras. You take reduced damage from enemies while this is applied.
additionalInfo: Grants the user and the chained opponent 20% damage reduction against outside attacks.

name: Blighted Touch
desc: Landing Basic Attacks during Sovereign State now applies Blightshock.
additionalInfo: This allows your Sovereign Bangle to apply Wither on hit.

name: Blightlash
desc: Your swing range is enhanced during Sovereign State.
additionalInfo: Increases the range of the Sovereign Bangle from 6 to 7.

name: Blind Spot
desc: [Land Critical Attack or Hidden Blade] Apply Blinded for 5 seconds.
additionalInfo: 15 second cooldown.

name: Blinded
desc: Your vision is obscured by something. Somehow, you feel safer. You remember the warmth of your youth.
additionalInfo: Makes everything darker and creates fog at long distances. Grants immunity to the Flame Blind and Gaze Mantras.

name: Blinkstep
desc: Your regular dash is enhanced into a Blinkstep above 90% ether but now has an ether cost.
additionalInfo: If you have 90% or more Ether, your regular dash will be replaced with a Blinkstep. This has much more distance than a regular dash. Consumes Ether on use.

name: Blitz
desc: Increase how quick you release your Prominence Draw.
additionalInfo: Decreases Prominence Draw's windup by 0.1s (from 0.55s to 0.45s).

name: Blood and Iron
desc: Pulling rods out of your opponent now replenishes an equivalent amount of blood.

name: Blood Bag
desc: You receive extra blood from knocking an enemy.

name: Blood Bank
desc: Consuming 'Charm' now gives slight temporary health.
additionalInfo: Grants 25 Temporary Health on proc. This Talent only procs via Donation Drive and Manipulator. Has an indirect 10 second cooldown due to it relying on Manipulator.

name: Blood Convergence
desc: Receive 10% more healing from all healing sources when you have temp health.

name: Blood Drinker
desc: Recover health on hit. When landing a critical, deal 30 bleed damage over 5 seconds.
additionalInfo: Restores 4% of the user's maximum health upon landing M1 attacks. The "bleed" is a unique damage over time status effect that is not bleed. This deals 6 damage per tick and ticks 5 times over 5 seconds. This can proc on Motif-given critical attacks. If you are knocked during the duration of this "bleed" effect, you will be instantly gripped.

name: Blood Necrosis
desc: Your bloodless gems heal 33% less than usual.
additionalInfo: You will now need a scaled damage of 75 to hit the regular Bloodless Gem heal cap of 15.

name: Blood Pact
desc: Gain 50 bonus temporary health whenever you knock/kill an enemy.

name: Blood Plague
desc: For every light attack you land, add one Blood Plague stack on your opponent. Landing a Critical Attack converts all Blood Plague stacks into temporary health but missing the attack loses them.
additionalInfo: M1s apply stacks of Blood Plague. On critical, all Blood Plague stacks will be consumed to grant Temporary Health if your critical attack lands, with the amount of Temporary Health given scaling on the stacks of Blood Plague. The stacks of Blood Plague will be consumed regardless of if your critical attack lands, however.

name: Blood Siphon
desc: Your Critical Attack now siphons a bit of health, healing you 10% of the damage you dealt.

name: Blood Thirsty
desc: Gain a speed boost after causing an opponent heavy blood loss.

name: Blood Transfusion
desc: Successfully landing a critical attack while under a negative status effect will transfer the effect plus recover a small portion of your blood bar.
additionalInfo: 20 second cooldown.

name: Bloodiron Spirit
desc: You regain some Armor upon killing enemies.
additionalInfo: Restores 2.5% of your maximum armor upon executing an enemy.

name: Bloodless Overdrive
desc: Gain bonus temp health every time you land a mantra with a Bloodless Gem.

name: Bloodrend Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Bloodrend to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Bloodrend Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Bloodrender
desc: Grants you the ability to command Blood as a Bloodrender. Your Bloodrend mantras replenish your blood, steal blood and apply 'Blood Poisoning'.

name: Bloodwarden's Sense
desc: Enemies you attack with a mantra above 60% Blood Poisoning are highlighted red briefly. Enemies who are highlighted red take 20% more blood poisoning.
additionalInfo: Adds a red highlight to the player.

name: Blossoming Darkness
desc: The more Ether you drain during Shadow Roar, the bigger it gets.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Bodkin Arrow
desc: Your charged shots now do extra armor damage to armored enemies and extra damage to unarmored enemies.

name: Boiling Point
desc: Using a fire mantra near your own steam cloud detonates it.
additionalInfo: Deals 10 typeless damage. This cannot be parried nor blocked. Procs when you hit the Steam cloud with your Flamecharm Mantra, meaning your opponent can parry your Mantra and this will still proc.

name: Both Ends
desc: Pressing M2 after landing a light attack with the staff performs a follow-up swing from the opposite end.
additionalInfo: The followup attack has fast swing speed, but it only deals 45% of your weapon damage.

name: Bottom Freeze
desc: Hitting chilled enemies with Ice Projectiles while they are on ice freezes them to the ground.
additionalInfo: Prevents you from rotating your character and moving around overall. Taking damage from any source will end Bottom Freeze early.

name: Braced Collapse
desc: After being block broken, the next attack to hit you deals reduced damage.
additionalInfo: After being block broken, reduce the next instance of damage by 20%. This has no cooldown.

name: Brain Death
desc: Enemies that are already suffocated will have their suffocation duration extended when hit by a bloodrend mantra.
additionalInfo: Applies a new stack of suffocation on proc.

name: Brain Rattler
desc: [Clubs] Guardbreaking an opponent with your Critical rattles their brain in its container, causing increased blood loss, applies Stagger to PvE enemies and blurs their vision.

name: Brassneck
desc: Knocking an enemy grants you 20% damage resistance for 15 seconds.
additionalInfo: Works on non-humanoid monsters, applying the damage reduction after they die.

name: Brazen Blow
desc: [Greataxes] Attacking an enemy slowed by your Greataxe grants you temporary hyperarmor.
additionalInfo: Only procs on weapon attacks. Does not proc on uppercut. 20 second cooldown.

name: Breakthrough
desc: Posture damage on light attacks are increased by 10%.
additionalInfo: Increases the posture damage of M1s by 10%.

name: Breakthrough Drive
desc: Knocking a player refreshes your Glorious Charge cooldown and extends both effects it has by 5 seconds. [90 second CD]

name: Breathing Exercise
desc: Your sanity recovers more quickly once out of terrifying situations.
additionalInfo: Your passive sanity regen is increased by 50%.

name: Breathing Impact
desc: When knocked into objects by wind mantras enemies take additional blunt damage based off of how hard they are hit.
additionalInfo: The increased damage dealt is based on the attack's initial damage and your opponent's acceleration.

name: Breeze
desc: Gain a permanent +2 speed at all times.
additionalInfo: Increases your studs/s movement speed by +2 permanently. This is not counted as a speed buff.

name: Brick Wall
desc: You refuse. You cannot be knocked off your feet until you are knocked completely Unconscious. Also reduces the duration of Knockdown.
additionalInfo: Grants full immunity to ragdoll. The knockdown duration reduction scales on your combined Fortitude and Willpower investment, being fully negated if you have 100 points invested into each attribute.

name: Broken Ankles
desc: Blockbreaking an opponent puts their Mobility slot Mantras on CD for 12s.
additionalInfo: Broken Ankles' duration will be reduced by 0.15 seconds for every point in Strength below 70, capping at 8.25 seconds with 45 Strength. 30 second cooldown.

name: Broodlord's Scream
desc: Using Sing, Taunt, or Ardour Scream applies anti heal for the duration of the move.
additionalInfo: Applies 100% Anti-Heal. These abilities will also gain the Broodlord Scream sound effect.

name: Bruiser's Mixup
desc: Switching your Fist Style mid-fight makes your basic Fist attacks inflict bleed temporarily.
additionalInfo: Lasts for 4 seconds.

name: Brunt
desc: While 2-handing, you take less posture damage.
additionalInfo: Reduce posture damage taken by 10% while 2 handing a weapon.

name: Brutal Momentum
desc: [Heavy Weapons] Successfully dodging will give you hyperarmour on your next swing.

name: Brute Strength
desc: Your vent is replaced with a ground slam attack that knocks back enemies.
additionalInfo: Deals 35 Blunt damage with 20 Posture damage. This cannot be buffed through damage modifiers. Increases your Vent's windup from 0.25s to 0.5s.

name: Bulldozer
desc: Enemies you flourish into a wall have a chance of breaking the wall and are guard broken on impact.

name: Bulletproof
reqs: bulletproof := 20r MED OR 20r LHT OR 20r FTD
desc: You take no Armor damage from guns. You take 5% less Armor damage from other sources.
additionalInfo: This has no effect on your natural armor or incoming PEN.

name: Bulwark Breaker
desc: Increase the size of your Pressure Blast, with the last hit of it dealing increased posture damage.
additionalInfo: Increases the AoE and range of your Pressure Blast. The final hit of your Pressure Blast deals 3x the posture damage (from 12 to 36), increasing the total posture damage of the Mantra from 36 to 60.

name: Burning Puppets
desc: Your puppets can now inflict burn and fire-based Talents when they explode.
additionalInfo: Grants your Puppets 5 Flameharm scaling, increasing their damage by 0.1 per Flamecharm investment. Your Puppets now apply 'Puppet Burn', allowing you to create more Puppets. Despite what the Talent description states, your Puppets don't proc any Flamecharm Talents.

name: Burning Sacrifice
desc: Sacrifice puppets who have been alive for half of their lifetime and burn purple for Emperor Flame Stacks, a damage boost per puppet, and a slight speed boost.
additionalInfo: Puppets will turn purple if they've gone 15 seconds without hitting anything. You can sacrifice these purple Puppets with this Talent tool, granting a 4% damage buff per Puppet sacrificed (caps at 12%) and a small speed boost for 6 seconds. Additionally this grants 1 Emperor Flame stack per Puppet sacrificed. This has a 15 second cooldown if a Puppet is successfully sacrificed, and a 1 second cooldown if not.

name: Buster Call
desc: Radio in the Authority's navy for a buster call, sending out a barrage of bombardment wherever you see fit.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that lights a flare and highlights a large AoE on the ground. After a considerable delay, that location will be bombed several times, dealing very high damage. Cannot directly knock players. Applies burn on hit. 24 hour cooldown.

name: Calamity Punch
desc: Every successful Strong Left builds up stacks to perform a larger scale punch.

name: Call of the Deep
desc: Sink beneath the waves and return to the Depths
additionalInfo: When used in the overworld, play an animation and sink into the first layer. This does not count as a drown. When used in the Depths, teleport to Castle Light with a 20 minute cooldown.

name: Callout
desc: You can mark objects or enemies by pressing Z, which will mark them for all nearby allies.

name: Cap Artist
desc: Pressing [,] while crouching allows you to fake being dead. You also take a bit less damage from PvE while ragdolled as well.
additionalInfo: This can be deactivated by using the keybind again.

name: Captain Etrea
desc: Fists Moving while blocking with a shield no longer slows you down.

name: Captain's Call
desc: Call up two Blacksteel Pirates to aid you in battle.
additionalInfo: On use, this summons two allied Blacksteel Pirates to assist you. 5 minute cooldown.

name: Careful Handling
desc: Reduce your chances of dropping ingredients on death.

name: Careful Stance
desc: Gain a bit more autoparry frames on successful parries.

name: Carnivore
desc: In return for losing the ability to eat vegetation, satiate your hunger by gripping monsters and people alike.
additionalInfo: Cannot be obtained if you have the Vegetarian Flaw.

name: Catalytic Strike
desc: Posture breaking an enemy will Overload their Surge stack.

name: Cauterized Wounds
desc: Blood loss from all sources is lowered.
additionalInfo: Does not reduce the blood damage of 'blood drain' effects, such as casting or being hit by Bloodrend Mantras, blood drain potions, and the blood loss Corrupt Resonance downside. Stacks multiplicatively with Alloyblood. The effectiveness of this Talent is reduced if you are using the Curse of the No Life King enchantment.

name: Celebrity
desc: Your natural skill in mediating conflict makes people think more highly of you. Your base reputation with factions is higher and your reputation caps out higher.

name: Centurion's Resolve
desc: Your Legion Kata/Imperium Kata attacks deal 4% more damage.

name: Chain of Perfection
desc: You gain stacks of Perfection on hitting mobs with Weapon Attacks or Mantras. Mantras are only worth half a stack.
additionalInfo: Gain a 5% damage buff against PVE enemies per stack of Perfection above 5, capping at +100% damage at 25 stacks. This is treated as a final damage multiplier and it bypasses the damage modifier cap. All stacks of Perfection are lost upon taking any damage, excluding self damage.

name: Chain Reaction
desc: When applying a potion effect to someone who already has one, the new effect is amplified. You have a 25% chance not to deplete potions when drinking them.
additionalInfo: Procs when a thrown potion replaces a different potion's effect, increasing your potion's effect by 40% multiplicatively.

name: Chainlash
desc: On flourish, gain the ability to summon a chain on an enemy for 5 seconds by right clicking. This lets you whip your chain to seize and yank enemies towards you, setting them up for a crushing kick.
additionalInfo: Right clicking after a flourish will enchain your target and pull them towards you. M1ing after the pull will perform a Crushing Kick, dealing high damage.

name: Champion's Regalia
desc: Flourishing an opponent grants you +50% posture damage on Basic Attacks for 10 seconds.

name: Chaotic Charm
desc: Charm enemies nearby when attacked at low health. Enemies affected by this charm have their damage increased to anyone but you, and deal reduced damage towards you.
additionalInfo: Applies Chaotic Charm for 15 seconds, granting an additional source of damage reduction. Chaotic Charm gains 0.15% damage reduction for every point in Charisma you have.

name: Charged Return
desc: Being under an elemental status effect causes your Basic Attacks and Criticals to do 10% more damage.
additionalInfo: Procs on Burn, Chill, Shock, Fear, Winded, and Suffocation.

name: Charisma Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your charisma to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Charisma Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Charisma on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.

name: Charismatic Cast
desc: Landing a hit with a mantra on an enemy applies Charmed. Allies recover from being knocked twice as quickly when Charmed by you.
additionalInfo: Charismatic Cast's Charm lasts 10 seconds.

name: Cheap Shot
desc: Your attacks gain 10% PEN multiplicatively when you have an active speed boost.
additionalInfo: Multiplies your PEN by 1.1x at 65+ Agility. Cheap Shot's PEN multiplier will be reduced by 0.11% for every point in Agility below 65, having a minimum multiplier of +7.22% PEN (or 1.072x PEN) at 40 Agility.

name: Cheap Trick
desc: When hit below half health briefly disappear, leaving behind an illusion clone to keep your enemy occupied for a short duration. Briefly disappear after knocking an enemy.
additionalInfo: Being hit while under half HP grants I-frames and turns you invisible for a very short duration. 60s CD. Knocking an opponent turns you invisible for 2.5 seconds with no I-frames.

name: Chemist's Bag
desc: You no longer drop Potions on death.

name: Chemistry Kit
desc: You no longer drop potions on death. You have a 25% chance to brew an extra potion.

name: Chief's Will
desc: Way of Navae light attacks have 10% additional penetration.
additionalInfo: Gives M1 attacks and criticals with the M1 tag +10% PEN if you are using the Way of Navae fist style.

name: Chilling Flourish
desc: When flourishing an enemy, they leave behind a trail of ice in the direction you send them.
additionalInfo: Leaves 3-4 ice patches on the ground.

name: Chitin
desc: You have a layer of Natural Armor that replenishes when you rest
additionalInfo: Grants 5% physical damage reduction in the form of Natural Armor. This stacks multiplicatively with Exoskeleton. Increases Exoskeleton's durability by 200.

name: Chorus of Souls
reqs: oath_oathless => chorus_of_souls := 30s BLD, 30s SDW, 30s MTL, 30s WND, 30s LTN, 30s FLM, 30s ICE
desc: Alone, the Wisps lack a voice. But surrounded by so many, the frequencies overlap and you hear it true.
additionalInfo: Grants heavily increased health regeneration if you have all Wisps active. This Talent will not activate unless you have every Attunement's Wisp Mantra equipped and active. If one of your Wisps runs out, this Talent will deactivate until you recast the Wisp. This Talent will not work if you no longer have the Oathless Oath.

name: Christmas Miracle
desc: Christmas Mod Shop reward. Regens hunger and thirst. "Thank you so much K1!" Heh, no problem guys. All in a day's work.

name: Chronostasis
desc: Landing a Basic Attack or Critical puts the target's Resonance on cooldown for a short duration, while also applying Ether Sunder to PvE opponents.
additionalInfo: On hit, apply a 13 second Resonance cooldown. This cannot proc if their Resonance is already on cooldown.

name: Circuit Breaker
desc: Electrify no longer deals self-damage on use.
additionalInfo: Using this with the Deepscorn Casque will cause you to heal upon using Electrify.

name: Closed Circuit
desc: Surge Overloads that fail to arc to other opponents will deal additional damage to the Overloaded enemy.
additionalInfo: Adds 5 Thundercall damage with 5 Thundercall scaling to the Overload, gaining 0.025 damage per Thundercall damage. This is a flat value that does not depend on Rod count.

name: Clutch
desc: For every combat tag you acquire, gain 4% more posture resistance.

name: Clutch Recovery
desc: When at 30% health or below, every time you land a light attack or critical hit heal 1%.
additionalInfo: If you are at or below 30% of your maximum health, heal 1% of your maximum health upon landing any weapon attack.

name: Cold Blooded
desc: Chilled enemies passively build up blood poison, alternatively when crystals explode it'll apply blood poison. (DOES NOT STACK)
additionalInfo: Applies 12.5% blood poisoning over the duration of the chill or 25% blood poisoning on crystal explosion. Only crystal explosions applied through maximizing crystal stacks will proc this Talent.

name: Cold Front
desc: Your vent is imbued with glacial frost.
additionalInfo: Venting creates an ice patch on the floor and applies Chill to any enemy hit by it. Increases your Vent damage by 40% and changes its damage type to Frostdraw.

name: Coldseep Reactor
desc: By cultivating the localized chemosynthetic microorganisms within the Depths and utilizing them as a power source, your helm thrums with a protective field of static electricity and heat.
additionalInfo: You can no longer gain parasites while in the Second Layer.

name: Collapsed Lung
desc: Block breaking an opponent closes off their ability to Vent for 8s, with this duration scaling with Strength. PvE enemies instead get Collapsed.
additionalInfo: This effect lasts 8 seconds and loses 0.04s for every investment point below 100 Strength. The Collapsed status effect reduces the posture damage affected enemies deal to you by 40%.

name: Comeback Kid
desc: When waking up from being knocked you are unable to be knocked down for 5 seconds. (120 second cooldown)
additionalInfo: 2 minute cooldown.

name: Command Phoenix
desc: Command your Phoenix to scout, and dive into enemies.
additionalInfo: Summoning an adult Phoenix, then commanding it to take air will allow you to select a spot where it should Divebomb on the next usage of the Talent.

name: Command: Live
desc: Once per hour, command a servant to defy all odds and obey your command - live.
additionalInfo: Fully heals your Servant if they are below 40% health. The cooldown of this Command scales on your Charisma investment.

name: Command: Summon
desc: Command your servant to obey your summons and appear before you no matter the distance.
additionalInfo: Teleports the subject to the master regardless of distance. Teleportation takes 10 seconds to complete, and any hit will cancel it. 30 second cooldown for the Master, 2 minute cooldown for the Servant.

name: Compelling Offer
desc: Any charmed enemy below 50% hit with your mantras or critical will mysteriously begin attacking everyone but you. [Madness] Your taunt also now functions as a counter that stacks damage multipliers with every successful taunt.
additionalInfo: Madness from this Talent procs when attacking charmed enemies who are below 50% health. Using Taunt as a counter displays Prediction's visual effects but with a dark purple color. This also plays a laughing sound effect and reduces Taunt's cooldown to 1 second. Taunt counter does not deal damage, but instead stacks Taunt's damage buff effect.

name: Concussion
desc: Enemies you flourish into walls have their vision altered for a short duration and are dazed longer than usual. Flourished PvE enemies get Stagger for a few seconds.

name: Concussive Flash
desc: Your blinding light now concusses foes.
additionalInfo: People blinded by Flame Blind are Dazed for 2 seconds.

name: Concussive Force
desc: Enemies you knocked remain downed longer than usual.
additionalInfo: Enemies remain knocked for 15 seconds instead of 10.

name: Condensation Drip
desc: Passively collect condensation from the air, greatly reducing your thirst.
additionalInfo: Reduces the passive thirst drain by 3x.

name: Conditioned Runner
desc: You regenerate health faster than normal when sprinting below 75% HP. The health amount scales with your agility stat.
additionalInfo: After 3 seconds of sprinting without taking damage, gain increased health regeneration.

name: Conditioned Swimmer
desc: You lose less hunger and thirst while swimming.

name: Conditioning
desc: Reduce all slows you receive by 40%.

name: Conductor's Cable
desc: Applying Conductor rods on opponents steals some of their armor to you.
additionalInfo: Creating a Conductor Rod drains 10% of your opponent's maximum armor.

name: Conquer your Fears
desc: Killing the beings of the deep replenishes your sanity somewhat. When an Ally grips an enemy nearby to you, you regain Sanity.
additionalInfo: Recover Sanity when killing monsters in the Depths, with the Sanity restored depending on how strong the monster is. Gain Sanity whenever a nearby ally executes a humanoid target.

name: Continuous Bleed
desc: Every time you land a crit, flourish, or uppercut, increase the amount of bleed damage you deal for 15 seconds. This is stackable.

name: Controlled Combustion
desc: Your Agitating Spark no longer spreads to your allies.
additionalInfo: Your Agitating Spark cannot spread to you either.

name: Cook's Kit
reqs: cooks_kit := 5r INT OR 5r WLL OR 5r CHA, 5s FTD
desc: Each food item's max quantity is increased by 5. Your kit comes with a lighter.
additionalInfo: You can light Campfires without a Flint.

name: Cool Head
desc: If set on fire while on ice, immediately put it out and gain the Cool Head status for 30s. During Cool Head, you cannot be lit on fire. 15s cooldown

name: Cornered Fool
desc: Blockbreaking a Charmed opponent procs Taunt for 5s, making them take and deal more damage.
additionalInfo: Despite what the description states, this applies Taunt for 6 seconds. Every point of Charisma below 85 will reduce the duration of this Taunt by 0.035 seconds, capping at a minimum of 5.12 seconds with 60 Charisma. The Taunt damage buff is also applied to the attack that guard broke. 15 second cooldown.

name: Corporeal Dissolution
desc: Applies Wither on any weapon attack that drains Ether, and scales on the amount of Ether drain.
additionalInfo: Caps at 30 Wither damage per proc.

name: Corpse Explosion
desc: Your flames will incinerate unconscious Targets much faster and bodies that you burn to death immediately explode dealing massive damage
additionalInfo: Burn grip unconscious targets, even yourself, in 3.5 seconds instead of 7. The explosion does not work.

name: Corrosive Touch
desc: Landing a successful Critical Attack or Flourish will corrode a portion of your opponent's Armor.
additionalInfo: On proc, drain 5% of your opponent's armor. This has a 10 second cooldown.

name: Cosmic Connection
desc: All celestial and astral related abilities are buffed.
additionalInfo: Increases Astral's damage buff in PvE from +20% to +25%.

name: Counter Spin
desc: After blocking an attack, press M2 to counter with your staff.
additionalInfo: On proc, swiftly thrust your Staff forwards, dealing 45% of your weapon's damage on hit.

name: Crimson Fountain
desc: Blockbreaking or flourishing an enemy now spills a pool of blood below them.

name: Crippling Comeuppance
desc: Landing Revenge puts your opponent's Mobility slot Mantras on CD and applies Sluggish to PvE enemies for 15s.
additionalInfo: 30 second cooldown. For every point of Agility below 100, Crippling Comeuppance's duration is reduced by 0.1 seconds, having a minimum duration of 12.5 seconds at 75 Agility.

name: Crippling Darkness
desc: Your non-Basic Attacks have 20% PEN.
additionalInfo: Grants +20% PEN to any non-weapon attack. This not only affects Mantras, but things like Bleed or Burn too.

name: Crippling Impact
desc: Landing a critical with someone while Wrath Gem is active disables their vent for a few seconds.
additionalInfo: The duration of this effect scales on your Strength investment, being 2 seconds + 0.015 seconds per point of Strength. This lasts for 3.5 seconds at 100 Strength.

name: Critical Engine
reqs: critical_engine := 30r LHT OR 30r MED OR 30r HVY, 90s INT
desc: You gain the ability to use Deep Gems on your critical attack. Hold out the Deep Gem you wish to apply to your crit then use the tool to enhance your critical.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that applies the effects of your held Deep Gem to your weapon critical. This does not consume the Deep Gem on use. Blue Gems have a unique interaction with this Talent, granting Ether back based on scaled damage dealt.

name: Critical Heal
desc: Every time you heal, you have a chance to proc a Critical Heal, healing you 30 health. [5 second CD]

name: Crossguard
desc: If you are using a sword, you gain 10% chip against other opponents wielding swords.
additionalInfo: This is additive to weapon chip damage.

name: Cruel Counter
desc: When using your initial charge up on your Krulian Knife, if you interrupt someone's attack with it apply Cruel Counter on them, massively increasing the damage they take from your critical attacks.
additionalInfo: If you interrupt someone's attack with the shock from your Krulian Charge critical, apply the Cruel Counter status effect to your opponent, increasing all damage taken by critical attacks for 20 seconds. This grants a 40% damage buff to all critical attacks (including those that aren't Krulian Knife's), bypassing the damage modifier caps.

name: Cruentare
desc: Increase the amount of all bleed damage you deal by 50%. Your Whirling Blade now now heals you when landing it.
additionalInfo: You heal for 25% of the damage your Whirling blades deals.

name: Cryonis
desc: All ice spells casted on top of ice cost less Ether.
additionalInfo: Reduces the Ether cost of Frostdraw Mantras by 40% when standing on ice.

name: Crystal Shrapnel
desc: Your crystal explosions now have an AoE that applies crystals to all hit.
additionalInfo: Does not hit allies or the target you procced the Crystal explosion on. Scales off Frostdraw investment and amount of crystals present.

name: Cult of Personality
desc: You gain +3% PEN for each person Charmed, capping at +15% PEN.
additionalInfo: The PEN gain per target will be reduced if you do not meet Cult of Personality's Charisma requirement.

name: Cursed Immortality
desc: Instead of getting knocked, get set to 75% health. When this effect occurs, this guarantees that you depths trial will become corrupted for the rest of your character's run.
additionalInfo: Instead of being knocked, your health will be set to 75% of its maximum instead, with a 5 minute cooldown. Once this Talent procs, all future Depths trials will automatically be corrupted for the rest of your character's life. This Talent does not proc during the Zi'eer boss fight.

name: Curved Edge
desc: Your light weapon mantras now gain 60% more chip.

name: Cut to the Chase
desc: Air Counter damage scaling is largely increased. Landing an Air Counter now initiates an uppercut. Deal 5% more damage to PvE enemies in the air.
additionalInfo: Adds 10 True damage to your Air Counter. The damage bonus will be lessened if you do not meet the Talent's requirements.

name: Cutting Pace
desc: Dodging attacks will now grant 'Cutting Pace' stacks. Mantras and basic attacks consume a stack to shorten wind-up and increase damage, procs after dash.
additionalInfo: Buffed attacks deal 15% more damage, have a slightly shorter windup, and are purple.

name: Cyclical Exsanguination
desc: Whenever you deal more than 20 damage to an enemy in an instance, pause your temporary health decay for 3 seconds.
additionalInfo: 8 second cooldown.

name: Cyclone Blade
desc: After a successful Gale Dash you wrap your weapon in wind, causing your next Light attack to do +30% damage as bleed and have +10% chip damage.
additionalInfo: Lasts for 3 seconds with no cooldown. Phantom Step dashes will also proc this effect. Despite stating "Light Attack", this Talent also procs on weapon criticals.

name: Dancer's Beat
desc: Your Vent is replaced with Dancer's Beat. You increase the speed, damage, and stun of your next Basic Attack. However, should your attack fail to land, you'll be stunned and your Tempo will be greatly reduced.
additionalInfo: Your Vent can no longer be used defensively, unless it is used to escape an otherwise inescapable move, but does not cost Tempo to use. You need to have at least 20 Tempo to use Dancer's Beat. Your next M1 used within 1 second of using Dancer's Beat will deal higher damage, more stun, and have a higher swing speed. If you are hit before you use your next attack, wait out the 1 second proc window, or if your next attack does not land (including if it was blocked, parried, or dodged), you will lose 60 Tempo and will be stunned for 0.5 seconds. 2.5 second cooldown.

name: Dancer's Geas
desc: You deal +30% damage when striking with the tip of your weapon, but deal 15% less damage when striking below half of its range.
additionalInfo: Also procs on weapon criticals. When you land an attack from the tip of your weapon, an icon of a pair of hands clapping will appear, signifying that you've activated the buff. When you land an attack from half or less than half of your weapon's range, an icon of a thumbs down will appear, signifying that you were debuffed.

name: Dancer's Impale
desc: Hitting an enemy after a perfect dodge makes your next attack deal 30% bleed damage. If that attack would already bleed, it adds +10% chip damage instead.

name: Dancer's Sting
desc: Striking with the tip of your weapon applies +25% PEN and +25% Chip Damage.

name: Dancing Guard
desc: Parrying an opponent and then parrying another enemy in quick succession applies slow for 7s.
additionalInfo: Dancing Guard's duration will be reduced by 0.086s for every point in Fortitude below its requirements, having a minimum duration of 4.86s at 30 Fortitude.

name: Dancing Steps
desc: Fire mantras now move you in the direction you're facing.
additionalInfo: Casting a Flamecharm Mantra will give you a moderate boost of horizontal movement in the direction your character is facing. This will still proc even if the Mantra is feinted. 5 second cooldown.

name: Dancing Steps Of War
desc: When landing a flourish, gain a speed boost and massively reduce the cooldown of your dodges for 2 seconds.

name: Dark God
desc: If a Shadowcast mantra would drain your opponent's Ether to 0, drain from their Tempo instead and increase your Tempo.

name: Dark Harvest
desc: Steal all of the hunger of enemies caught in your Shadow Vortex. Knocking a player also greatly enhances your next Shadow Vortex.

name: Dark Hours
desc: Your Shadowcast Mantras deal 15% more damage at night and in realms the Sun does not reach.
additionalInfo: Night cycle is XX:50 to XX:10 in real-time.

name: Dark Receiver
desc: Shadow moves will also steal Ether from those you are Static Linked tethered to.

name: Dark Replenishment
desc: Knocking out an enemy in combat restores a portion of your ether.

name: Dark Rift
desc: Enter a rifted state when you successfully dodge, where you can't be damaged until its duration ends. Can be cancelled with feinting or attacking.
additionalInfo: Lasts 1.8 seconds with a 20 second cooldown that starts on proc. Blocking, parrying, dodging, or sliding will also cancel the effect. You cannot use Mantras during Dark Rift.

name: Dark Synergy
desc: Engulf your enemy in shadows when flourishing them.
additionalInfo: Deals 5 Shadowcast damage on proc.

name: Dark Waltz
reqs: dark_waltz := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s SDW
desc: Anytime you guardbreak your opponent with a light attack or critical, steal half of your opponent's current tempo. Also apply Ether Sunder to PvE enemies.

name: Dazing Finisher
reqs: chaotic_charm, charismatic_cast, lasting_charisma, tough_love => dazing_finisher := 55s CHA
desc: Flourishing enemies that are charmed by you cause them to not be knocked back and dazed instead.
additionalInfo: The duration of this Daze scales on your Charisma investment.

name: Deal Maker
desc: Your rapport with merchants allows you to attach a flat fee of 20 notes to all your sales.
additionalInfo: This is unaffected by Snake Oil.

name: Death From Above
desc: Upon cancelling your Air Dash, reveal your wings and strike your enemy.
additionalInfo: Air dash canceling with your weapon equipped grants your Starnkindred Wings. Air dash canceling with your weapon equipped and your wings out performs a three hit slashing attack that deals 25 Oath/Slash damage per hit.

name: Decisive Blow
desc: Hitting an enemy with your Critical Attack immediately after they dodge (or any time against mobs) now procs Knife's Journey. Your Knife's Journey procs do 2x Armor damage.

name: Decisive Winds
desc: When damage below 50% health, don an aura of Decisive Winds for 10s.
additionalInfo: The Decisive Winds status effect grants a 25% speed boost as long as you are within 20 studs of the target who initiated this effect. This procs through block, parry, and dodge, but not on self damage. 30 second cooldown.

name: Deep Wound
desc: Assassinating a target applies anti-heal for 20s and gives you a speed boost for 6s. Assassination damage now scales with level against mobs.
additionalInfo: Applies 30% anti-heal.

name: Deepbound Contract
desc: You progress much faster in the Depths, and slower on the overworld. You can regain sanity at Castle Light, but will always face the strongest foes in your Trial.
additionalInfo: You can always enter Castle Light, even if you've drowned. Your Depths trial will always be an Enforcer or harder.

name: Deepfolk
desc: The secrets of the Deep are easier for you to unravel. Your mind is sturdier against its effects, as well as using less Knowledge in Knowledge exchanges.
additionalInfo: Increases Sanity gain by 1.2x. Deep Shrine Knowledge cost is reduced by 1 (this cannot go below 1).

name: Defensive Reprisal
desc: Being flourished grants you 10% posture resistance for 20s.
additionalInfo: Defensive Reprisal's duration will be reduced by 0.177s for every point in Fortitude below its requirements, having a minimum duration of 15.55s duration with 40 Fortitude.

name: Defensive Stance
desc: [Rapier] Gain more parry frames the lower your health is.

name: Defensive Sweep
desc: [Spears] Posture breaking an opponent grants you +50% PEN for 3 seconds.
additionalInfo: This does not bypass the PEN cap. 14 second cooldown.

name: Defiance
desc: Negative status effects are half as effective when you are below 35% HP.
additionalInfo: The Effectiveness of Defiance will be lessened if you do not meet its Willpower requirement. Works on: Burn damage, the duration of Chill, Winded, Suffocation, time knocked, Ring of Pestilence, and Sightless Still, Crystal and Surge Rod gain, Blood Poisoning gain and Wither gain.

name: Defiant until the End
desc: Slow the enemy trying to execute you down with one last shout of your determination.

name: Demon Step
desc: Activate to gain brief iframes while moving forward. This requires 50 ether to activate and increases your posture by 20% each use.
additionalInfo: On use, lose 50 Ether to travel a short distance forwards in iframes. Additionally, 20% of your current posture will be dealt to you as self-posture damage.

name: Denial Repulse
desc: You now emit a delayed burst of flames after coming close to death.
additionalInfo: When Flame of Denial activates, release an explosion around you. This deals 20 Flamecharm damage with 5 Flamecharm scaling, meaning it gains 0.1 damage per Flamecharm investment for a total damage of 30 at 100 Flamecharm. This cannot be parried nor dodged, but can be blocked, dealing 5 posture damage. Has a windup of 0.6s.

name: Depths Denizen
desc: The city you once called home is now your only way out of the depths, perhaps you can use this to your advantage. Gain extra leeway when attempting to escape the depths.

name: Destructive Recovery
desc: [Greatsword] Enemies recover 20% less Posture when parrying.

name: Destructive Yell
desc: Your Ardour Screams now break campfires around you, while increasing its range by 2x.
additionalInfo: Your Ardour Scream destroys all campfires within its range.

name: Devastating Power
desc: Gain extra Ether for every Mantra in your arsenal.
additionalInfo: Gain 10 maximum Ether for every Mantra you have equipped.

name: Devastating Recovery
desc: Enemies recover 30% less posture when parrying your Zweihander light attacks.

name: Dirty Boxing
desc: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack after feinting applies bleed, obscures their vision slightly and makes PvE enemies Sluggish.
additionalInfo: 8 second cooldown.

name: Disbelief
desc: You're resistant to the effects of Illusion magic. You are resistant to charms and tricks.
additionalInfo: Halves the duration of the Charmed status effect. Additionally halves the duration of Illusory Servants if they are casted on you.

name: Discharge
desc: [Light Weapons] On 5th successful attack you will discharge static dealing lightning damage to those nearby.
additionalInfo: Deals 5 Thundercall damage with 5 Thundercall scaling, gaining 0.025 damage per point in Thundercall. Applies Shock or 1 Surge Rod on proc.

name: Discovery of Fire
desc: Flints and Flamecharm are for simpletons.
additionalInfo: Grants the Discovery of Fire Talent tool that consumes 20 Ether to cause a lightning strike after a 1 second delay. On hit, this deals 3 Thundercall damage and lights all nearby entities and campfires on fire.

name: Dispatch
desc: [Clubs] Bear Trapped targets deal 20% less posture. Dazed targets deal 20% less posture. This can stack.

name: Diver's Resilience
desc: You can parry unparryable attacks from giant monsters, but due to the heft of the plate, you have slightly reduced speed.
additionalInfo: You can now parry certain NPC attacks that are normally unparryable. 10 second cooldown.

name: Donation Drive
desc: Consuming 'Charm' on an opponent replenishes some blood. Additionally, you can also activate this effect and Manipulator through blockbreaking with a Bloodrend mantra.
additionalInfo: Donation Drive's cooldown scales on your Charisma investment, having an 8 second cooldown at 60 Charisma and gaining 0.1s for every point in Charisma below 60. Donation Drive has a 8.5 second cooldown at 55 Charisma, and a maximum cooldown of 10.5 seconds at 35 Charisma.

name: Dormant Strength
desc: At max Calamity Punch stacks increased posture damage & physical damage.
additionalInfo: Increases your Strong Left's damage and posture damage if you are at max Calamity Punch stacks.

name: Double Jump
desc: Take the Wind Step and refine it into your own technique, reducing the cooldown and improving its efficiency.
additionalInfo: Reduces Wind Step's cooldown to 5 seconds and lowers the Ether cost. You will need to equip Gale Boots to gain the Wind Step Talent.

name: Down Comes the Claw
desc: Landing a Critical while you have a speed boost prevents your opponent from being able to dodge twice in a row for 5s.
additionalInfo: Lasts 6.5 seconds despite what the description states. You cannot reapply this effect if it is currently active. For every point in Agility under 75, Down Comes the Claw loses 0.055 seconds of duration, capping at a minimum of 5.11 seconds with 50 Agility.

name: Down to your Level
desc: While you have a speed debuff, your Basic Attacks slow your enemies for 5s.
additionalInfo: Down to your Level's duration will be reduced by 0.05s for every point in Fortitude below 60, capping at a minimum of 3.75s with 35 Fortitude. The slow only procs on M1s or critical attacks with the M1 tag. Procs from Entanglement, Daze, Chill and most other things that slow you down.

name: Dragon's Song
desc: Using a mantra after an uppercut grants ether.
additionalInfo: Grants +20 Ether on proc. 2 second cooldown.

name: Dread Fighter
desc: Parrying and getting hit by mantras now give you stacks of Dread. Each stack increases your mantra resistance, up to 25%. Each stack lasts for 15 seconds.
additionalInfo: Each stack of Dread Fighter grants 5% Mantra damage reduction, capping at 5 stacks for 25% Mantra damage reduction.

name: Drift
desc: You're no longer slow enough to have to rely on parries. Dodge instead.
additionalInfo: Your parry is replaced with a low distance dodge if you successfully parry an attack.

name: Drifting Cloud
desc: Cutting Pace now unsheathes the full potential of your Purple Cloud.
additionalInfo: Proccing Cutting Pace now unsheathes your Purple Cloud, giving it new animations and changing the damage type to Slash.

name: Driving Impact
desc: [Spears] The first hit of your Spear's Critical Attack will deal greatly increased posture damage. Subsequent hits will do reduced posture damage.
additionalInfo: The first hit of your default spear critical will deal double the posture damage. The second hit of your default spear critical will not deal posture damage.

name: Drop Dead
desc: Take less damage when you are crouching.

name: Duelist's Lunge
desc: [Rapier] Running attacks deal increased posture damage. Upon landing your Critical, your next running attack will have increased range.
additionalInfo: Running attacks with rapiers deal 35% more posture damage. After landing a Critical, the next rapier running attack gains 2 range.

name: Dustlunge
reqs: deep_wound, lights_out, lowstride, unseen_threat => dustlunge := 90s AGL
desc: You can now assassinate your enemies from much farther, shadestepping to their location if they're too far. Assassinating an enemy will automatically assassinate other nearby enemies.

name: Ebb and Flow
desc: Landing a medium mantra increases your heavy mantra's level by 1 and vice versa. This is stackable and can increased to a max of +5 levels. All stacks are removed if your medium/heavy mantra is defended against.

name: Echoing Lunatic
desc: Your Ardour Scream now applies a bit of insanity.

name: Echolocator
desc: Your highly tuned hearing helps you navigate, seeing better in the dark and sensing potential threats.
additionalInfo: Pings the location of nearby players who unsheathe their weapons (even through Tacet and Lowstride) and event spawns.

name: Electrical Accumulation
desc: While having 4 or more orbs, automatically gain 4 charges of Static Blade whilst you have 4 orbs.
additionalInfo: Passively gain 4 stacks of Static Blade if you have 4 or more orbs.

name: Electrify
desc: Shock yourself and apply Amped for 15s. Can be used while Carried to escape.
additionalInfo: If used while not being carried, this deals 5% of your current health as self damage on proc. Additionally, you will gain the Amped status effect for 15 seconds, increasing your weapon damage by 10% and allowing your weapon attacks to apply Shock on hit. However, incoming damage will be increased by 10%. 1 minute cooldown.

name: Electrolyte
desc: Hitting Bloodrend mantras while having temporary health applies Shocked while removing a portion of temporary health.
additionalInfo: Applies a Surge Rod instead if you have Surge Path. Consumes 4 Temporary Health on proc.

name: Elegy of Light
desc: The Unspoken Vow of the Waking God resonates through you, if briefly. Protects you from the effects of Deep Gems for 3 minutes and provides you Gem Enhancement. Remains dormant until you take the life of an equal.
additionalInfo: On use, Deep Gems cannot have their effects proc on you and your Deem Gems have increased effectiveness in PvE for 3 minutes. This ability requires you to kill a player of equal or higher level or a boss to recharge its effect.

name: Embolism
desc: If an enemy is guardbroken while you have temporary health, convert your temporary health into additional damage.

name: Emergency Mark
desc: Applying a mark on someone who has less than 20% health heals them for 10% of their health.
additionalInfo: Applying a Justicar's Mark on an ally who has 20% or less current health health them for 10% of their maximum health.

name: Emergency Rations
desc: Eat some of your emergency rations, healing you for 20 health. You can only use this 3 times before having to sit at a campfire outside of combat again.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool with 3 charges. Using the Talent tool consumes one of the charges to heal you for 20 flat health. This has a 15 second cooldown. Resting at a campfire, while not in combat, restores all charges

name: Emergency Reserves
desc: When you get hit below 20% health, gain 20% tempo immediately.
additionalInfo: 3 minute cooldown.

name: Emperor Flame
desc: Absorb fire produced by you, once you reach 5 stacks your next attack will be an automatic Explosive Finish flourish. This flourish will deal additional damage and proc Wither, reducing your opponent's maximum health temporarily.
additionalInfo: Agitating Spark procs grant Emperor Flame stacks. At 5 stacks, gain the Emperor Flame status effect for 10 seconds, causing your next M1 to instantly proc Explosive Finish, dealing 15 Flamecharm damage. On top of this, this will deal an additional 25 Wither damage and apply burn. Emperor Flame also extinguishes self-applied burn through Agitating Spark. While Emperor Flame is on cooldown, the burn will not be extinguished and you cannot gain additional stacks. 30 second cooldown.

name: Empowered Eruption
desc: Your next Eruption after landing a critical is Empowered with +50% range and damage. 10s cooldown.

name: Encore
desc: Your Sing will stun opponents who are already charmed.
additionalInfo: Applies 0.4s of true stun. Doesn't affect allies.

name: Endurance Runner
desc: Your speed is decreased less by low health.

name: Energy Siphon
desc: Your singularity now pulls ether from the extra players affected.
additionalInfo: Takes 15 Ether from the affected opponent on proc.

name: Enforcer's Pull
desc: Your Enforcer's Pull is improved. Land a flourish to make it even stronger.

name: Enforcer's Strength
desc: Your enemies recover 20% less posture on parry.

name: Enforcer's Technique
desc: Your flourishes deal 35% more damage.

name: Enhanced Flow
reqs: enhanced_flow := 90s BLD, 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY
desc: Refine your Rush Hour, allowing you to now also gain temp health whenever you hit a player while using Rush Hour. You now also take less damage from Rush Hour.
additionalInfo: When you land basic attacks during Rush Hour, gain Temporary Health equal to 30% of your weapon's scaled damage. This cannot give more than 50 Temporary Health in a singular instance. Reduces Rush Hour's self damage by 22%, from 4.5 damage per tick to 3.5 damage per tick. Despite what the description states, this Talent still procs when hitting monsters or other non-player enemies.

name: Enrage
desc: Whenever you stun an opponent who's taunted with Encore, enrage them.

name: Entropy Link
desc: The world is broken, linked by fragile webs. Traverse the path by stating your destination amidst the flame.
additionalInfo: You are able to fast travel to certain places while resting at a campfire. Locations are unlocked by interacting with special meteorites that are scattered around the map. By sitting at a campfire and typing out the name of the desired meteorite, you will be transported directly to it.

name: Erupting Shade
desc: The size of your shadow eruption increases with how much siphoned health you have gained from wiping players.

name: Eruption Path: Lava Serpent
desc: Your fire abilities no longer proc burn and instead proc an eruption under the enemies feet.
additionalInfo: Eruptions have a base damage of 15 with 5 Flamecharm scaling. Eruptions have a 3s proc cooldown. You can still apply burn via Immolation, Flash Point, and Agitating Spark.

name: Ether Absorption
desc: Receive Ether back when inflicted with damage from Mantras.

name: Ether Adeptness
desc: Your mantras now deal extra chip.
additionalInfo: Grants 5% chip damage.

name: Ether Amplification
desc: For every Ether Erudite Stack you have, increase the size and damage of your Pressure Blast.
additionalInfo: Turns Pressure Blast light blue.

name: Ether Blade
desc: Draw your foes ether into your weapon when you parry ether-based attacks. Gain Ether when you parry mantras.

name: Ether Blitz
desc: For every Ether Erudite Stack you have, reduce the windup of your enhanced Master's Flourish. This consumes your Ether Erudite stacks on use.
additionalInfo: Turns Master's Flourish light blue.

name: Ether Burst
desc: Landing Rapid Slashes on your opponent gives them an overflow of Ether, causing them to take bursts of damage based on how many Ether Erudite stacks you had.
additionalInfo: Consumes your Ether Erudite Stacks. Turns your Rapid Slashes light blue.

name: Ether Efficiency
desc: All mantras you cast now have a reduced cost of 30 ether.

name: Ether Emergency
desc: When you get hit below 25% health, exhaust all of your ether to gain a flat health boost (healing scales of total max ether). You are briefly unable to cast Mantras.
additionalInfo: On proc, restore health equal to 15% of your maximum Ether. 5 minute cooldown.

name: Ether Erudite
desc: The more total Ether you have, the more damage you deal. Gain Ether Erudite Stacks to improve your combat abilities. The max amount you can hold is 6.

name: Ether Overdrive
reqs: ether_overdrive := 90s INT, 20r ICE OR 20r FLM OR 20r WND OR 20r SDW OR 20r LTN OR 20r MTL OR 20r BLD
desc: Gain 5% extra PEN and remove the cap on your PEN. Go beyond your limits.
additionalInfo: Removes both the melee and Mantra PEN cap.

name: Ether Pinpoint
desc: Mantras that have Might Gem on them now ignore fully ignore the posture bonus from shields.

name: Ether Proselyte
desc: All of your Elemental Mantras below Lv. 5 are now 1 level higher. Your Mantras are now converted to the element of your current stance.
additionalInfo: Increases the level of all Attuned Mantras by 1 unless they are already level 5. This is not displayed on the Mantra's tooltip. Allows your non-Ironsing/Bloodrend Attuned Mantras to proc the Attunement Talents of your current Saint Stance. (E.g. Clutching Shadow in the Flamecharm Stance can proc Scorched Peak). Not all Attuned Talents are compatible with Ether Proselyte.

name: Ether Quell
desc: Landing a Critical Attack or Guardbreaking an opponent gives you 1 Ether Erudite Stack.

name: Ether Reflux
desc: Successfully countering an opponent with Prediction gives you 2 Ether Erudite stacks.

name: Ether Repletion
desc: Hunger stolen from other players now grants you ether as well.
additionalInfo: Hunger stolen from players through any means will proc this Talent.

name: Ether Tension
desc: Deal bonus true damage whenever you guardbreak an opponent with a mantra.
additionalInfo: Deals 10 true damage.

name: Ether Upgrade
desc: All mantras you cast now get one bonus level on top of their current level.

name: Etherguard
desc: Warped Blue Gems now provide a bonus effect when landed using a mantra, Etherguard. This effect gives extra resistances to mantras based on how much ether they cost to cast + gain elemental protection against PvE.
additionalInfo: When landing a Mantra with a Warped Blue Gem equipped, gain the Etherguard status effect, granting you damage reduction to Mantras and elemental resistance in PvE. The damage reduction for Mantras scales on the Ether cost of the Mantra you got hit by.

name: Ethiron's Gaze
desc: Your eyes have been opened to the wasteland. You can see through the harsh fog of the storm of the Eternal Gale more clearly now.
additionalInfo: The snow in the Second Layer no longer affects your ability to see. Also reduces the visual clutter of snow in the overworld.

name: Eureka
desc: Gain a stack of Inspiration every time you land or parry a Mantra. Whiffing a Mantra removes a stack of Inspiration. Reaching 3 stacks grants +10% Mantra Damage to your next Mantra attack.
additionalInfo: Landing and parrying Mantras grants Inspiration stacks. Mantras cap at giving 1 stack per, and you do not gain stacks from autoparry frames.

name: Evasive Expert
desc: Your speed boost granted from dodging is increased.

name: Everchanging Aegis
desc: You take 20% less from attacks the same element as the last element you were hit with, but 10% more damage from attacks from different element.
additionalInfo: Your Aegis type can swap on block, dodge, and parry.

name: Excavator
desc: Chance to receive two sets of ore when mining, mine ores a lot faster.

name: Execution
desc: Your offhand gun attacks now count as flourishes and do a flat 20 extra damage when used with no bullets.
additionalInfo: Deals true damage. Only works if you do not have bullets in your inventory. Also procs on the offhand shots of Dual Gun attacks, but it deals 5 true damage instead if used on Dual Guns.

name: Executioner's Frenzy
desc: Landing a light attack while their posture is paused reduces their assassination cooldown by 5 seconds.
additionalInfo: This works on Paused Posture caused from Stature Break or Maiming Claws.

name: Exoskeleton
desc: You have a layer of fortified Natural Armor that replenishes when you rest. Your Natural Armor will resist 10% Physical Damage when active.
additionalInfo: Exoskeleton's resistance will be less effective if you do not meet its Fortitude requirement, losing 0.125% resistance for every point under 40 Fortitude, capping at 6.875% resistance with 15 Fortitude. Chitin's resistances stack multiplicatively with Exoskeleton.

name: Expeditionary Evasiveness
desc: The design of this rapier allows you to much more swiftly attack in tandem with your mantras, giving Agility mantras you use +3 levels in all stats, even bypassing the level cap.
additionalInfo: Your Agility Mantras gain 3 Mantra levels, bypassing the level 5 cap. This is not displayed on the Mantra tooltip. Jetstriker Mantras are unaffected by this.

name: Expeditious Combo
desc: Landing an uppercut will grant a buff to your Onslaught for 15 seconds, using Onslaught during this time will massively increase the speed of it.
