additionalInfo: Passively increases the speed of your Onslaught. After landing a basic attack uppercut, gain the Expeditious Combo status effect for 15 seconds, displayed on the cooldown indicator. Casting Onslaught while you have this status effect will massively increase its speed, consuming the status effect in the process. This has no cooldown, but must be manually refreshed every time you use it.

name: Experienced Healer
desc: Every time you heal yourself, gain 5 extra health on top of that.
additionalInfo: 10 second cooldown.

name: Expert Bloodrender
desc: You can now obtain 2-star Bloodrender mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Expert Flamecharmer
desc: You can now obtain 2-Star Leveled Flamecharmer Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Expert Frostdrawer
desc: You can now obtain 2-Star Leveled Frostdraw Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Expert Galebreather
desc: You can now obtain 2-Star Leveled Galebreathe mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Expert Ironsinger
desc: You can now obtain 2-star Ironsinger mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Expert Shadowcaster
desc: You can now obtain 2-star Leveled Shadowcaster Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Expert Thundercaller
desc: You can now obtain 2-star Thundercaller mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Explosive Efficiency
desc: Crafting a bomb will yield two bombs. Chance to make three.

name: Explosive Finish
desc: If an enemy is on fire when you flourish, blast them away with a fire blast.
additionalInfo: Deals 5 Flamecharm damage. Upon proccing Emperor Flame, this Talent will be put on a 3s cd.

name: Explosive Ignition
desc: Ignite nearby steam, causing a large explosion.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool, that when used while standing inside of a steam cloud causes a very large explosion after a delay, dealing high damage and consuming the Steam cloud.

name: Explosive Rage
desc: Causing explosion will make your puppets go into a frenzy - speeding up and dealing 50% more damage.
additionalInfo: While buffed, your Puppets will gain an orange swirling aura. On proc, this buffs all currently alive Puppets and all Puppets that spawn within the next 10 seconds. The following abilities and Talents proc Explosive Rage: Explosive Finish, Emperor Flame, The Final Act, and the Detonation enchant.

name: Explosive Rounds
desc: Every bullet that lands now detonates on your opponent.

name: Exposed Durability
desc: Deal 10% more damage to opponents with no armor durability left.
additionalInfo: Procs against Berserk users and while Berserk is active.

name: Extended Trauma
desc: Successful light attacks and criticals on your opponent now also gives them a bit of posture.
additionalInfo: Deals 3 posture damage to non-blocking opponents on M1, and 10 posture damage on critical. This cannot posture break, and this does not benefit from posture damage modifiers.

name: Face Cutter
desc: Your Spine Cutter now deals an additional hit.
additionalInfo: Grants an additional hit to your Spine Cutter that deals 50% of your weapon's scaled damage. Similarly to Spine Cutter, the damage of this attack cannot be buffed and it has no PEN.

name: Family Recipe
desc: You can now craft bombs at a crafting bench.
additionalInfo: Bombs are crafted with 2 Iron and 1 Coal. Pressing E while holding a bomb will throw it, while pressing M1 while holding a bomb will drop it at your feet. Bombs have a 5 second cooldown on throw. Bombs do not deal self damage. Bomb damage scales on your Intelligence attribute, dealing 10 damage at 0 Intelligence and scaling up to 45.5 damage at 100 Intelligence. Bombs deal typeless damage, ignoring armor.

name: Fan the Flames
desc: Your stored Wind mantras can now empower your Fire mantras.
additionalInfo: The benefits of Inhale can now be applied to your Flamecharm Mantras.

name: Fang and Coil
desc: Adopt the path of the serpent.
additionalInfo: Allows you to use the Fang and Coil fist style.

name: Fast Blade
desc: Extend the speed boost you get from successfully parrying an attack.
additionalInfo: Increases the speed boost duration from parrying by 3 seconds.

name: Faster Blade
desc: A successful "Drift" now grants a speed boost.
additionalInfo: Procs when "parrying" an attack.

name: Fatal Backstab
desc: Weapon backstabs deal an extra 5 true damage on your opponent (20 extra damage if done to PvE).

name: Fatal Stealth
desc: You deal increased backstab damage to opponents based on how high your stealth stat currently is.
additionalInfo: Grants a 0.2% damage buff to attacks that hit your opponent's back for every 1% stealth you have. This only works on stealth gained from Equipment or Outfit sources. Felinor's innate stealth multiplier has no effect on this. This does not work on assassinations.

name: Fatal Strike
desc: Landing a guard break with a strength mantra that has a Wrath Gem on it devastates your opponent, dealing extra damage and slowing them down.
additionalInfo: Adds a +20% damage modifier to your Strength Mantras on guard break if they have a Wrath Gem equipped. Applies a 50% slow for 5.5 seconds. 10 second cooldown.

name: Fear the Dark
desc: Enemies will briefly hang in place when they run from you.
additionalInfo: After you land a Shadowcast Mantra, if your opponent attempts to distance themselves from you, they will be locked in place for 1.5 seconds.

name: Feathered Glider
desc: As a show of independence when they come of age, Tirans will strike out on their own with just their hand-crafted glider, gliding down from the mountain peaks where they make their homes. You take 10% less fall damage.
additionalInfo: Provides a Glider with infinite durability. The color of this Glider is dependent on your aspect variant, but it can be dyed.

name: Featherfall
desc: Prevents falls from damaging you. After sufficient damage has been resisted, the pendant will go inactive and require time to recharge.
additionalInfo: Nullifies fall damage. Once 255 fall damage has been nullified, this will go on a 2 minute cooldown, disabling its benefits.

name: Ferryman's Curse
desc: Wearing this gives you a 20% chance to convert incoming elemental damage into Lightning damage.

name: Fictitious Force
desc: Reduce the power of all speed boosts you gain by 50%. Deal extra true damage based on how fast you are.
additionalInfo: Halves the effectiveness of all speed boosts. Adds true damage to your attacks, with the true damage scaling on your speed boosts and momentum.

name: Finishing Slay
desc: If you land a critical attack while also having stacks from the Chain of Perfection talent, consume all those for a massive damaging attack. This works on other players as well.
additionalInfo: Consumes all of your Chains of Perfection stacks for a secondary instance of damage on your critical. This deals 7 typeless damage per Chain of Perfection stack in PvP, or 166 typeless damage per stack in PvE. The first 5 hits that normally do not grant stacks will contribute to this, allowing you to deal 150 PvP damage or 3.5k PvE damage at maximum Chain stacks. This can be buffed, but it is not considered as a weapon attack, limiting buffing options. Finishing Slay has no cooldown, allowing multi-hit criticals to deal massive damage in PvE.

name: Finishing Touch
desc: [Dagger] Instantly execute enemies finished with the critical attack of your dagger.
additionalInfo: Your critical must knock the opponent for this Talent to proc.

name: First Blood
desc: Your first blood mantra you use in combat has no blood cost.

name: First Interrogation
desc: Attacks from opponents who are Electrified will give you ether proportional to their initial damage.
additionalInfo: Only procs on weapon attacks from Electrified opponents. Ether given is half of their scaled damage.

name: Fisher's Lure
desc: Fish are drawn to your line more quickly.
additionalInfo: Slightly increases the chance of hooking something while fishing.

name: Fishman
desc: When your Blood is over 50%, you won't drown when Unconscious in water. Gain additional healing from knocking others Unconscious in water.

name: Fists of Fortitude
desc: Fists Every 6 hits with your fists builds up a shield of endurance reducing incoming damage by 15%. 70s CD
additionalInfo: Lasts 10 seconds then goes on cooldown once the buff ends. You can only gain stacks from M1s or criticals with the M1 tag.

name: Fists of Navae
desc: Double the amount of ether you gain on successful light attacks.

name: Flame Within
desc: An application of Pleeksty's concept of the inner flame, also known as the soul of man. Set yourself ablaze to gain more move speed and 10% extra damage.
additionalInfo: 8 second cooldown on cast. The self burn can only be dispelled by using the tool again or through the rain/sea.

name: Flamecharm Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Flamecharm to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Flamecharm Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Flamecharmer
desc: Grants you the ability to command Fire as a Flamecharmer.

name: Flames of the Past
desc: Your flamecharm mantras now call forth fiery homing spirits.
additionalInfo: Your Flamecharm Mantras now spawn Twisted Puppets' Puppets on hit.

name: Flamewalker
desc: When Warding Radiance is active you leave trails of flame when you slide.

name: Flaming Flourish
desc: Set enemies on fire when you flourish or uppercut them.

name: Flanking Maneuvers
desc: Enemies you assassinate take more PEN from your squadmates in your party.

name: Flare Drop
desc: Landing mantras sets your opponent on fire.
additionalInfo: Applies burn when you land a Mantra with a 5 second cooldown.

name: Flash Point
desc: Block breaking an opponent causes your Eruptions to be Empowered for the next 10s. Block breaking an opponent with a Fire Mantra procs Burning.
additionalInfo: 45 second cooldown on the Empowered Eruption effect.

name: Flashboil
desc: Landing Ice/fire attacks on burning/chilled enemies extinguishes the flame and generates steam.
additionalInfo: Steam deals 2 typeless damage per tick, at 6 ticks per second. Steam cannot be blocked nor parried.

name: Flashwind
desc: Anytime you proc Air Pressure or Overcharge, give yourself the ability to have enhanced dashes again for a few seconds.
additionalInfo: After using a Gale or Lightning dash, gain the Flashwind status effect for 3 seconds, allowing you to perform Flashwind dashes.

name: Flask Amplifier
desc: Heal an extra 15% from flasks.
additionalInfo: Increases the healing gained from Etris Flasks by 15% additively, meaning Flasks will restore 65% health on use instead of 50%.

name: Fleetfoot
desc: Gain an initial speed boost when slide jumping.
additionalInfo: After using a Lightning or Gale dash, all dashes within the next 3 seconds will become enhanced. These enhanced dashes have the same effectiveness as Lightning and Gale dashes.

name: Float Like a Butterfly
desc: While having True Strength active, cancel your air dash to enter a frenzy of slashes.
additionalInfo: 5s CD. Only accessible if True Strength is active. Deals 24 Oath + Slash damage (4 hits that deal 7 damage each).

name: Flow State
desc: Enter a moment of extreme focus in which you can change the windup of your special attacks with the correct timing.
additionalInfo: Activating Ankle Cutter, Mayhem, Relentless Hunt, or Rising Star within 2 seconds of activating Flow State will enhance these attacks. Flow State has a 10 second cooldown, but landing a Flow State-enhanced Silentheart ability will reset its cooldown. Flow State may affect the damage, wind-up, number of attacks, sound effect, or properties of Silentheart abilities.

name: Flying Swiftkick
desc: Hitting a Jus Karita critical attack while Swiftkick Prodigy is active will greatly slow your enemy, and consume your speed boost.

name: Focused Hematoma
desc: Decrease outside sources of blood loss by 25% but reduce the amount of temporary health you receive by 15%.

name: Focused Perception
desc: Massively increase the range of your Rhythm if you use it while Tranquil Circle is active.

name: Focused Strikes
desc: All criticals deal 15% more posture damage.

name: Foolish Outburst
desc: Blocking or parrying a vent will absorb the Tempo cost of the vent. A Tactician steadies the course of battle.
additionalInfo: Steals 40% of the Tempo used. Every point in Intelligence below 50 will reduce the Tempo steal by 0.66%, capping at a minimum of 23.33% of the Tempo absorbed with 25 Intelligence.

name: Footwork Mastery
desc: Landing a critical gives you an immense speed boost for 10 seconds.
additionalInfo: The speed boost lasts 15 seconds despite what the description states. 45 second cooldown.

name: Force Your Way
desc: You can parry unparryable attacks from giant monsters, at the cost of armor durability.
additionalInfo: You can now parry certain NPC attacks that are normally unparryable. On proc, your armor will be drained, with the amount of armor lost being based on the damage the attack would normally deal. This Talent does not work if you have no armor durability.

name: Forced Fulfilment
desc: Your Metal Greatsword now has Metal Fakeout as its critical attack. Landing a critical attack using your Metal Greatsword attaches a heavy rod onto your opponent, heavily slowing them.
additionalInfo: The Metal Fakeout critical only works while you are in range of a target. Additionally, this critical applies Bleed and counts as a weapon attack, not a Mantra. The rod applies a 52.5% slow for 15 seconds.

name: Formless
desc: Teleport to a location within your Tacet bubble. Receive a slight speed boost when activating Tacet.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that costs 50 Ether with a 5 second cooldown. This tool allows you to teleport to your cursor's location, but you cannot teleport outside of the Tacet bubble. On teleport, Tacet will end early. The speed boost gained from using Tacet lasts 2.5 seconds.

name: Fortify
desc: Slow down your movement in exchange for fortifying your defenses.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that grants 15% damage reduction at the cost of reducing your movement speed by 36%.

name: Fortitude Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your fortitude to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Fortitude Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Fortitude on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.

name: Fragile Freeze
desc: Your Light Attacks and Critical will now freeze chilled opponents on guardbreak.
additionalInfo: Encases them in ice, removing their ability to move, parry, block, or dodge for a short amount of time. Taking damage by any source (including damage over time effects) will end the freeze early. You can spam [F] to get out of Freeze faster.

name: Freezing Wight
desc: Your Haunted Gale now procs Chilled.
additionalInfo: Applies Chill for 7 seconds or 1 Crystal on proc. Additionally, this changes the damage type of your Haunted Gale Ghosts and Specter Apparitions to Galebreathe + Frostdraw.

name: Frenzied Dance
desc: [Rapier] The more posture you currently have, the more chip and posture damage you deal.

name: Fried Circuits
desc: Overloading an enemy applies Sapped for 5s.
additionalInfo: Targets affected by Sapped have the cooldowns of their Mantras increased.

name: Friends in High Places
desc: Your connections often let you off the hook when you're in trouble with the law. Nepotism sure does pay!
additionalInfo: Whenever you are knocked by town guards from a faction in which you have good reputation, the town guards will scold you instead of gripping you, letting you live.

name: From The Ashes
desc: Using an Etris Flask when at 30% health or below now grants you a damage buff and resistance buff for 30 seconds.

name: Frost Buster
desc: Greatsword Criticals and Greathammer Criticals now leave a place Ice below the path they carve.
additionalInfo: On critical, create three moderately large ice patches in a linear path in front of yourself. These patches last 1 minute 30 seconds. Despite what the Talent description states, Greathammers do not proc Frost Buster but Greataxes do. Greatcannons do not proc Frost Buster either.

name: Frostbite
desc: Enemies can no longer heal when under the effect of your chill. PvE enemies also net you 5% more Heal Boost when they are chilled.

name: Frostdraw Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Frostdraw to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Frostdraw Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Frostdrawer
desc: Grants you the ability to command Ice as a Frostdrawer.

name: Frostride
desc: Your footsteps echo the legend of Saint Jay, freezing the sea beneath.
additionalInfo: You can now walk on water by creating ice below your feet. This has no cooldown and does not cost Ether.

name: Frozen Anchor
reqs: frozen_anchor := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s ICE
desc: Apply bottom freeze and chill to your opponent whenever you land a flourish, uppercut, or crit.
additionalInfo: Bottom Freeze will be removed if the target takes damage from any source. This makes this Talent extremely ineffective on multihit criticals. The Chill applied from this Talent lasts 12 seconds. 10 second cooldown.

name: Frozen Legs
desc: Your slow effect prevents your opponents from rolling.
additionalInfo: Only procs from Chill procs on Mantras. Lasts for 0.75 seconds.

name: Frozen Pin-Cushion
desc: Ice Daggers now freeze opponents.
additionalInfo: Instantly detonates crystals if you have Crystallization Path.

name: Frozen Web
desc: Landing a critical with a Static Link on your opponent applies Chilled.
additionalInfo: Applies Chill for 7 seconds and Bottom Freeze. Has a 4 second cooldown.

name: Fulgurite Formation
desc: When your Crystals explode, lightning strikes. When your Surge charges Overload on an enemy, your Crystals apply twice on them for 8s.
additionalInfo: The lightning strikes deal 5 typeless damage with a 4 second cooldown. The double Crystal application buff does not stack with successive Fulgurite Formation procs. Procs Grounding Bolt.

name: Full Reset
desc: Knocking an enemy resets your resonance cooldowns. This effect has a 60 second cooldown.
additionalInfo: Also works on non-humanoid monsters, resetting your Resonance cooldown after they die.

name: Ga Buidhe
desc: Backstabs now count as the tip of your weapon.
additionalInfo: Attacking your opponent's back now procs all Talents and effects that would normally proc when attacking with the tip of your weapon.

name: Ga Dearg
desc: Striking a bleeding enemy with the tip of your weapon extends the bleed.
additionalInfo: Hitting a bleeding enemy with the tip of your weapon will reapply the bleed.

name: Gale Boots
desc: Reduce the amount of fall damage you take by 50%.

name: Gale Trap
desc: Knocking a player places a wind trap, causing anyone to pick up that body to get sent flying. Gain a speed boost picking up the body yourself. Killing PvE opponents gives you Gale Reflection instead.
additionalInfo: Marks players knocked by you for 6s with "Gale Trap". If the user picks up a target they've marked, they will gain a 35% speed boost for 20 seconds. But if anyone else attempts to pick up the marked target, they will be ragdolled and flung upwards. This includes the user's allies. Gale Reflection activates upon getting hit by an enemy, granting damage reduction to the attack and placing a Gale Trap on them. The damage of the Gale Trap scales with the strength of the enemy you killed.

name: Galebreathe Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Galebreathe to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Galebreathe Attribute.

name: Galebreather
desc: Grants you the ability to command wind as a Galebreather.

name: Gathering Electricity
reqs: static_blade => gathering_electricity := 65s LTN, 25r STR OR 25r AGL
desc: Reaching 5 Static Blade charges will now consume the stacks and apply a lightning buff to your blade. 60 second cooldown.
additionalInfo: Clears all Static Blade stacks on proc. You can still gain Static Blade stacks while Gathering Electricity is active. For 15 seconds, this increases the base damage on your weapon attacks, including criticals by 3.

name: Gathering Storm
desc: Your damage is stored in a lightning orb. Sheathing your weapon will shoot the lightning orbs at the opponent. The orbs will do more damage based on how many orbs are being stored up.
additionalInfo: All weapon damage is stored instead of being dealt initially, similar to the Poser's Ring. Upon reaching damage thresholds of stored damage, lightning orbs will appear above your character's head, with a cap of 8 orbs. Upon sheathing your weapon, the orbs will attack your opponent, dealing all of the stored damage at once.

name: Ghost
desc: Dodging a move will briefly make you invisible, ending early if you attack.
additionalInfo: The invisibility and I-frame duration is 1.2 seconds if you have 40 or higher Agility. Ghost's duration will be reduced by 0.0133 seconds per point in Agility under 40, capping at 0.866 seconds at 15 Agility. 20 second cooldown.

name: Gilded Path: Scrapsinger
desc: Flourishing an enemy consumes any rods they have and siphons their armor to you per rod.
additionalInfo: Your Ironsing abilities and status effects are now yellow.

name: Give and Take
desc: Deal less damage to comrades and receive less damage from comrades.
additionalInfo: This does not apply to self damage. Stacks multiplicatively with Loyalty.

name: Glacial Coasting
desc: Sliding while Orbital Ice is active leaves trails of ice.

name: Glacial Mobility
desc: Cast while slide-jumping to perform a running attack with your ice sabers.
additionalInfo: The Talent activates after you've slide jumped, and not during the slide jump, contrary to the Talent description.

name: Glass Path: Crystallization
desc: Your ice abilities no longer grant a slow effect or the ability to freeze and instead cause ice crystals to grow on your opponent.
additionalInfo: Turns your Frostdraw pink. Applying chill or freeze applies red ice crystals on the enemy instead of slowing opponent. Stacking 5 ice crystals or guard breaking an opponent who has crystals makes them explode. Each crystal has 3 base damage with 5 Frostdraw scaling, increasing by 0.015 damage per Frostdraw investment for a maximum damage of 4.5 each at 100 Frostdraw. 1 second cooldown on explosion proc.

name: Glide Mastery
desc: Experience using the glider you crafted results in you being able to glide faster in the air. You've also trained to quickly pull it out in dire situations, resulting in you no longer taking fall damage.

name: Going Nowhere
desc: When enemies dodge your attacks, their momentum is killed and they're briefly prevented from sprinting.

name: Golden Age
desc: Your Iron Pull now detonates Crystals and overloads Surges.

name: Golden Tongue
desc: Typing or using a gesture gives a random buff to you and those around you. (60 second cooldown)
additionalInfo: This can either restore 33% of your maximum Ether or grant 10% damage reduction with a visual effect similar to Reinforce. The buff given to each player is rolled independently. Golden Tongue's cooldown is dependent on your Charisma investment, gaining or losing 0.25 seconds for every point in Charisma below or above 40 respectively. Minimum cooldown of 45 seconds at 100 Charisma, maximum cooldown of 66 seconds at 15 Charisma.

name: Good Luck Charm
desc: Makes you feel a little better, probably.

name: Gourmand
desc: Your hunger and thirst gain from eating is increased.
additionalInfo: Increases hunger and thirst gain by 20%.

name: Graceful Steps
desc: Your dancing steps now gives a faster speed boost.
additionalInfo: The speed boost has a very short duration; having a fast swingspeed weapon is recommended to capitalize off this Talent's effect. 5 second cooldown.

name: Grand Feast
desc: Regain tempo, ether, blood and health when gaining hunger from killing.
additionalInfo: Health gain is disabled in PvP combat. On proc, gain 40% tempo, 55% Ether, 3% blood, and 5% health.

name: Grand Skewer
desc: Your Grand Javelin now carries opponents through the air.
additionalInfo: Press [F] during Grand Javelin's windup to activate this effect. This does not work in Layer 1.

name: Grand Support
desc: Everyone you buff with Reinforce is healed lightly. You're healed slightly if you heal others.
additionalInfo: Heals you for 2% of your maximum health, increased by 1% for every player buffed. Heals affected players by 3% of their maximum health.

name: Grasp of Eylis
desc: You can temporarily teleport to locations near your bounty target, if one can be found. However, you must stay close, or be desynchronized.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that can only be used in the Voidheart, teleporting you to your Bounty target. Choosing Stealth causes teleports you near, but far away from your target, hiding the bounty target. Choosing Ferocity teleports you close to your target, highlighting them through walls briefly. If Ferocity is chosen, your character will be enveloped in shadows, signifying that you have a bounty.

name: Grasp on Reality
desc: Damage taken from insanity is reduced.
additionalInfo: Reduces damage taken from Scratching.

name: Grotesque Resilience
desc: You take reduced damage from 'Damage over Time' effects.
additionalInfo: Reduces burn damage by 50%. Reduces Flame Within's burn and bleed damage by 25%.

name: Grounding Bolt
reqs: grounding_bolt := 90s LTN, 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY
desc: Anytime you summon a lightning strike on your opponent, apply knockdown if it lands.
additionalInfo: 10 second cooldown. Procs on lightning strikes caused from Scorched Peak, Fulgurite Formation, the Specialist Set equipment Talents, and Storm/Stormbreaker enchantments during the rain.

name: Gruesome Harvest
desc: Landing Bloodrend mantras on opponents with over 70% blood poison will give you slight temporary health.
additionalInfo: Grants 15 flat temporary health on proc. Has a 2 second cooldown.

name: Gunpowder Blast
desc: Pistol shots without bullets do 2 extra posture. [Dual Guns]
additionalInfo: Pistol blast shots deal 2 more posture damage if you have no bullets in your inventory.

name: Gunslinger's Fury
desc: When having a side gun equipped with a gun or rifle, use a critical in the air to shoot a barrage of bullets towards your opponent.
additionalInfo: If your main weapon is a Pistol or a Rifle, and you have an offhand Pistol equipped, your critical will be replaced with the Soulwrought Gun's special attack if used midair.

name: Hair Product
desc: What's in these things?
additionalInfo: Gives a Talent tool that shows a popup menu and allows you to select either Flammable, Charming, or Revitalizing Hair Sprays. Your Hair Spray will change to the chosen effect.

name: Hair Spray
desc: Apply your Hair Products.
additionalInfo: Flammable applies Burn or causes an Eruption; parryable and blockable. Charming applies Charm for 15 seconds; parryable and blockable. Revitalizing heals 10% of the affected entity's health; unparryable and unblockable. 10 second cooldown.

name: Hammerfall
desc: [Clubs] Aerial attacks do 25% more posture damage when blocked.

name: Hard Read
desc: Hitting your opponent during a feint will cause them to be Dazed.
additionalInfo: Applies Daze for 1 second.

name: Hard Stop
desc: Landing a charged shot will knock your opponent back.

name: Hardened Shell
desc: Your Natural Armor grows sturdier, being able to take more hits before breaking.
additionalInfo: Increases your Natural Armor durability.

name: Harvester
desc: Chance to receive two sets of ingredients when harvesting.

name: Haste
desc: Gain a permanent +3 speed buff at all times.
additionalInfo: Increases your movement speed by +3 studs per second. This does not count as a speed boost for Talent procs.

name: Haunted Gale
desc: Landing 3 Galebreathe Mantras without whiffing calls for a Haunted Phantom. The Phantom will attack alongside you for the next 8s before dissipating.
additionalInfo: On proc, gain the Haunted status effect, spawning ghosts that attack your opponent every time you land a Mantra. Having Gale Wisp active increases the duration of Haunted by 3 seconds. If you have Apparitions, landing a Galebreathe Mantra while having the Haunted Gale status effect will create an Apparition instead while non-Galebreathe Mantras will summon Haunted Gale's Ghosts like normal.

name: Haunted Path: Specter
desc: Build up spectral energy by performing successful dodges and landing Wind mantras. Phantom winds from Haunted Gale no longer appear. You can no longer suffocate enemies.
additionalInfo: Turns your Galebreathe white. If Haunted Gale procs on non-Galebreathe Mantras or if you do not have the Apparitions Talent, then Haunted Gale's phantoms will still appear on proc.

name: Heart Reverb
desc: Those picked up by your Rhythm are marked for 8 seconds. Whenever an opponent dodges your attack, detect their rhythm and vigor. You can use Rhythm while standing.
additionalInfo: If someone performs an action within Rhythm's range, they will be highlighted red, even through walls. Rhythm will now stay active after uncrouching, only deactivating if done so manually or if you take damage. If an enemy dodges your attack, their health and posture percentages will be displayed in text next to their character briefly.

name: Heartfire Renewal
desc: Regenerate Heartfire whenever you are burning. Upon revival with Phoenix Flames, restore half of your Heartfire gauge.

name: Heartwing Beat
desc: Your heart beats a new rhythm, as your aerial attack takes on a new manifestation.
additionalInfo: Your aerial attack is replaced with Heartwing Beat, a slashing attack that applies bleed and deals Wither damage. This attack has a base damage of 25.5, copying the scaling stat from your equipped weapon. You cannot proc Air Counter or Relentless Hunt on Heartwing Beat. 6 second cooldown.

name: Hearty Ether
desc: Devouring Eye steal procs now heal you based on the amount of ether stolen.

name: Heavy Fatigue
desc: [Greataxes] Hitting an enemy slowed by your Greataxe temporarily reduces how far they can roll and applies Sluggish to PvE enemies for a few seconds.
additionalInfo: Does not proc on uppercut.

name: Heavy Haul
desc: Enemies who carry you move significantly slower. Take slightly less posture damage from large enemies. Takes one to know one.

name: Heavy Hitter
desc: [Heavy Weapons] Your posture damage is increased by 10%.

name: Heavy Shoulders
desc: If your opponent has 3 or more rods, their dodges are slower.
additionalInfo: Reduces roll distance by 10%.

name: Heavy Weapons Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Heavy Weapons attribute to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 Attribute cap on Heavy Weapons.

name: Heir of Lightning
desc: At max orbs, Lightning Cloak is enhanced.
additionalInfo: Increases the base duration of Lightning Cloak to 15 seconds.

name: Heliodar Wings
desc: Take flight [H].
additionalInfo: Pressing H will sprout your Heliodar Wings. Hold Space while flying to ascend, Q to speed up, or CTRL to descend. Flying consumes Heartfire Gauge. If you run out of Heartfire Gauge while flying, you will be set on fire, ending the flight early. Taking damage from any source will cause your flight to end early.

name: Hell's Partisan
desc: After landing a flame dagger on an opponent, your next hit against them will impale with a divine spear from above.
additionalInfo: Deals 5 Flamecharm damage. Parryable, but not blockable or dodgeable due to hitstun.

name: Hellion Shift
desc: The more insane you are the more iframes you gain on your dodge.

name: Hemolysis
desc: Deal 20% more critical attack damage to opponents with over 25% blood poisoning.

name: Hemolytic Transfusion
desc: Guardbreaking an enemy with a Bloodrend mantra increases the amount of blood poison from the attack.

name: Hemorrhaging Blow
desc: Block breaking your opponent with a blood mantra turns your opponent's combat healing into damage for 8 seconds.
additionalInfo: The damage to healing conversion is 1:1, meaning 20 healing = 20 damage. Works on all non-passive healing. 55 second cooldown, starting once the guardbreak occurs.

name: Herbivore
desc: You gain more nutrition from eating plants.

name: Heretic's Sacrifice
desc: A chant that heavily sacrifices your sanity to regain a bit of health.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that drains a significant amount of sanity to heal 20 raw health. If you are already at 0 Sanity, you will still be healed at no downside.

name: Heretic's Sutra
desc: A chant that steers you into the state of Insanity for 20 seconds.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that drains the user's sanity on proc. If your sanity is above 80%, it will be set to 65% on use. If your sanity is below 80%, it will be reduced by 15% on use. Passively procs Shared Misery and Piercing Will for 15 seconds. The cooldown and windup of Heretic's Sutra scale on your Willpower investment, but the scaling is largely negligible.

name: Hero's Assist
desc: Heroes come to your aid based on your current stance.
additionalInfo: Each Saint has a specific spawn requirement and ability when spawned. You can spawn heroes independent of your current Saint Stance. This passive ability works once per Saint Stance, requiring you to cycle to the next one to reactivate.

name: Hex Bullet
desc: Bullets that hit your opponents block shatter into dust on impact, unleashing a maddening smoke that increases your opponent's sanity.

name: Hidden Tendril
desc: Landing any physical mantra places a Hidden Tendril on the opponent.
additionalInfo: Also procs on physical critical attacks, uppercuts, and flourishes.

name: Hip Shooter
desc: When wielded with a Medium/Heavy weapon, your side gun can now fire a bullet projectile.
additionalInfo: 5 second cooldown. Requires ammunition in your inventory to be used.

name: Hook, Line, and Sinker
desc: Once something's caught your line, it's much harder to get loose.
additionalInfo: Slightly increases margin of failure before losing a fish.

name: Hoplite
desc: Posture damage is reduced by 15% when wielding a spear and standing still.

name: Horn of Authority
desc: Mark escaping prisoners.

name: Hot Potato
desc: Gain a large boost of speed after throwing a bomb. Your bombs have a chance to detonate twice.
additionalInfo: This speed boost lasts 2 seconds.

name: Human Battery
desc: When you are out of Ether, convert the Surge stacks of nearby enemies into Ether to pay the cost of your Mantras.
additionalInfo: Each Rod equates to 10 Ether. Works on Rods that weren't applied by you, but does not work on Rods applied to you.

name: Hungry Flames
desc: When you have no Ether, consume Stomach and Water to instantly cast your next fire mantra [15 second CD].

name: Hunter's Reflexes
desc: You have a slightly larger dodge window.
additionalInfo: Increases the dodge window by 0.05s.

name: Hunting Trap
desc: Place down a trap that upon being stepped on will render your opponent unable to move for a bit.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that places a bear trap on use. 60 second cooldown. Walking onto a bear trap deals high damage and renders you immobile for a few seconds. The bear trap cannot trigger again once it has been triggered. You can trigger your own bear trap.

name: Hyperbody
desc: Apply a buff to your allies around you that increases your speed, defense, and regeneration. This effect becomes weaker the more allies you buff with it.
additionalInfo: Provides 35.5% damage reduction, scaling up with the amount of players buffed. Provides a 7.5 studs/s movement speed bonus, scaling down with the amount of players buffed. Hyperbody has a 30 second duration, but this duration will be reduced by 3s for every player buffed (including yourself). 2 minute cooldown.

name: Hypovolemic Focus
desc: While you have temporary health, your opponent regains far less posture from parrying you.
additionalInfo: The opponent regains 20% less posture damage from parrying you.

name: I'm Blue
desc: Improve the efficiency of your Blue Gems. Blue are the gems you use.
additionalInfo: Increases the effectiveness of Blue Gems by 40% additively.

name: Ichor Imbuement
desc: Using a Starkindred mantra while your wings are not out increases the damage they deal by 2 times.
additionalInfo: Buffs any Starkindred Mantra if your wings are not out on cast.

name: Ignition Rite
desc: Landing fire attacks with the phoenix summoned regenerates Heartfire.

name: Immolation
desc: Fire spells cost 70% less while on fire. If you hit someone while on fire, apply fire damage. You take 50% less damage from self-inflicted flames.
additionalInfo: "Self-Inflicted flames" include Flame Within, Agitating Spark you spread and environmental burns created by you. "Apply fire damage" applies the burn status effect instead of adding Flamecharm damage. This applies burn regardless of Flamecharm path. Instead, all instances of Physical damage, and all attacks that have the slash (blood particle) fx on hit will proc Immolation, applying burn.

name: Immortality
desc: The remnants of the helmet's Mind Veil stir into life when you would be made Unconscious soaking all damage for a brief duration. 30s CD. Viscosity is rejected.
additionalInfo: Grants one instance of knock prevention. Having this Talent disables the Viscosity Enchantment.

name: Impairing Blow
desc: [Greataxes] Basic Attacks will slightly slow your enemy for 2 seconds. Running attacks will slow your enemy for 3 seconds. Gain +20% posture damage against enemies with speed boosts.
additionalInfo: Does not proc on uppercut.

name: Imperium Kata
desc: Wield an advanced form of the Legion's martial arts
additionalInfo: Allows you to use the Imperium Kata fist style.

name: Impervious Slumber
desc: Getting hit while Unconscious no longer resets your time Unconscious.

name: In a Hurry
desc: You grip faster with a movement speed boost.
additionalInfo: Reduces grip time by 0.5 seconds (16.67% faster).

name: Incendiary Formula
desc: Bombs will set your enemies on fire upon detonation, as well as launch with more force. Bombs will deal 20% increased damage to burning enemies.
additionalInfo: Bombs apply burn on hit. Bombs will deal 20% more damage to burning targets, regardless of where the burn came from.

name: Inhale
desc: Feinting a Wind spell stores its power in your lungs for 5 seconds, empowering the next wind spell cast in that time. All relevant modifications and upgrades from the inhaled wind mantras are applied to the empowered mantra.
additionalInfo: Inhaling adds (Mantra level multiplied by 2)% damage to the next Galebreathe Mantra cast. Grants a speed boost for 3 seconds. Additionally grants the Maestro's Blade status effect, allowing your basic attacks to proc After Cut.

name: Inky Pearls
desc: The ether you eject is coated with inky shadow. Your vent now steals a small amount of ether.
additionalInfo: Turns your Vent black and makes it drain 47.5 Ether on hit. Additionally, your Vent can now proc certain Shadowcast Talents on hit like Sightless Still or Twisted Puppets' Shadowcast burn.

name: Innate Agility
desc: You hinge on your instincts to keep you alive, even in battle. Slightly increase your dodge frames.

name: Instant Nucleation
desc: Take less damage for a few seconds after you are guardbroken.

name: Intelligence Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Intelligence to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Intelligence Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Intelligence on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.

name: Intrepid Flame
desc: Flames wear off twice as fast on you.
additionalInfo: Halves the maximum burn duration.

name: Intuitive Repairs
desc: Your 'Iron Skin' repairs armor while it's active.
additionalInfo: Iron Skin regenerates your armor and Natural Armor while its active.

name: Iron Gut
desc: You have resistance against being poisoned by foods.
additionalInfo: Heavily reduces the chance that you vomit upon eating bad food. This does not work on Pufferfish.

name: Iron Stance
desc: Be able to shrug off being ragdolled every so often.
additionalInfo: Grants immunity to one instance of ragdoll. If this procs, it will go on a 20 second cooldown.

name: Ironclad Punishment
desc: Your Ironsing mantras deal more posture damage to enemies the more armor durability they have.
additionalInfo: Gain +0.15% posture damage on Ironsing Mantras for every 1% armor durability your opponent has, capping at +15% if your opponent is at maximum armor.

name: Ironsing Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Ironsing to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Ironsing Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Ironsinger
desc: Grants you the ability to command Metal as an Ironsinger. Press X to Pull on Metal Rods.
additionalInfo: Ironsing mantras apply stacks of Metal Rods on targets. Pressing [X] will pull affected towards you, with the strength of the pull depending on the amount of Metal Rods present. You cannot apply more than 5 Metal Rods to one target, unless you have one of the Rending Needle Talents.

name: Jackpot
desc: Charmed enemies now have a chance to be hit critically, multiplying the damage.

name: Jay's Judgement Gavel
desc: Breaking a frozen enemy free with your Critical saps their lifeforce.
additionalInfo: Landing your critical on a frozen or bottom frozen enemy will deal extra damage and heal you.

name: Jester's Ruse
desc: Anytime you take damage, there's a 10% chance it gets completely nullified. Anytime you deal damage, there's a 10% chance it also gets completely nullified.
additionalInfo: Visionshaper's Cheap Trick visual effect plays on proc. This can proc if an attack is blocked, dodged, or parried. When this happens, the visual effect will play, but nothing will happen.

name: Jetstream Pursuit
desc: Upon a successful flourish, teleport to the opponent when they stop moving. Receive a significant boost of momentum.

name: Jolting Current
desc: Your lightning attacks in water strike others near them with lightning.
additionalInfo: While you and your opponent are in the water, landing any attack that would apply Shock or a Surge Rod will strike other waterborne targets in a 20 stud AoE from the initial target, dealing 50% of the attack's damage and applying Shock or a Surge Rod.

name: Juicy Snack
desc: Eliminating enemies returns their amount of blood poison as health to you.

name: Jumper Cables
desc: Being made Unconscious with an active tether allows you to steal health from a tethered target and not be made Unconscious.
additionalInfo: Whenever you would get knocked but have a tether active, steal HP from the target to survive the hit. This has a 4 second cooldown.

name: Jus Karita
desc: Adopt the kick-based fighting style of the Justicars.
additionalInfo: Allows you to use the Jus Karita fist style.

name: Just a Taste
desc: First Bloodrend mantra you hit in combat has increased blood drain.

name: Justicar Whistle
desc: Request aid from a Justicar.
additionalInfo: Upon using the provided Talent tool, a Justicar may respond to your call for aid, teleporting to your server to assist you with events and protect you in combat.

name: Justicar's Adaptation
desc: Jus Karita running attacks and criticals can now proc Jus Karita talents even if you aren't currently using Jus Karita. Your Jus Karita running attacks can now also proc fist talents.
additionalInfo:
Having the Justicar's Technique Talent allows you to have the Jus Karita running attack on any weapon, allowing you to proc Jus Karita and Fist exclusive Talents on any weapon via the running attack.

Having the Justicar's Preference Talent allows you to have the Jus Karita critical attack on any weapon, allowing you to proc the Jus Karita Talents on non-Jus Karita weapons.

name: Justicar's Blessing
desc: Allies you mark with Justicar's Mark gain 15% more healing.

name: Justicar's Call
desc: Lend your aid to those in need.
additionalInfo: Upon using the provided Talent tool, a UI will pop up that shows a list of all Castaways who have used the Justicar Whistle tool. Upon selecting one, you'll teleport into their server, and you'll be tasked with protecting them against Voidwalkers and assisting them in events. Assisting Castaways with this tool is the main progression method of this Origin.

name: Justicar's Gift
desc: Your Justicar support mantras now heal your allies for 10 health instead of 5. Increase the duration of your Karita Aid to 15 seconds.

name: Justicar's Mark
desc: Mark someone you wish to protect for a minute. While marked, you take 20% of the damage they receive but they take 20% less damage. Marking someone also cause you to take 20% more damage while they are marked.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that allows you to apply the Justicar's Mark status effect on one of your allies. While this effect is active, the marked target gains 20% damage redirection, as 20% of the damage they would have taken is redirected to you instead. Additionally, you take 20% more damage.

name: Justicar's Preference
desc: Replace your critical with the Jus Karita critical attack.
additionalInfo:
The Jus Karita critical will adopt your equipped weapon's scaling stat.

Having the Vanguard Style Talent will override this Talent, allowing you to use the Vanguard Style critical on any weapon instead of the default Jus Karita one.

name: Justicar's Prowess
desc: Jus Karita gains +30% posture damage against other fist styles.
additionalInfo: Gain +30% posture damage on weapon attacks against opponents using Way of Navae, Fang and Coil, Imperium Kata, Untrained Fist, or Legion Kata.

name: Justicar's Renewal
desc: Hitting an opponent with your Jus Karita critical resets the cooldown. (Cooldown of 10 seconds).
additionalInfo: Landing Jus Karita's critical attack will reset its cooldown. This has a 10 second cooldown. Also procs if Jus Karita's critical is blocked or parried.

name: Justicar's Technique
desc: Replace your running light attack with the Jus Karita running light attack. With the Justicar's Training, your legs extend the range of this running attack by an extra 0.5.
additionalInfo: Replaces your weapon's running attack animation with the Jus Karita one, and adds 0.5 range to your running attacks.

name: Karita Combo
desc: Remove the endlag from your next running attack. [5 second CD] Landing a critical attack right after your running attack makes that critical attack have no cooldown and deal more damage. [10 second CD]

name: Keen Recovery
desc: Landing a basic attack after feinting a mantra will restore the feinted mantra's ether cost.
additionalInfo: If you have 55 or more Intelligence, this will recover double the feinted Mantra's Ether cost instead.

name: Kick Off
desc: You easily brush off shorter falls, taking no damage. Your first wall jump will always send you higher than normal. Gain a speed boost after wall jumping over a wall.
additionalInfo: Falls are considered to be 10 studs shorter, reducing fall damage. Climb height is increased by 15% with a 3s CD. Slide jumping further increases climb height.

name: Kick the Beat
desc: Dancer's Beat now works with Critical Attacks.

name: Kickstart
desc: Play the resurrector. Use your lightning to defibrillate your allies on the battlefield.
additionalInfo: Heals the person for 10% of their maximum health if you successfully resurrect them. Kickstart consumes 5% of your Ether on use, and then another 20% if the Kickstart was successful. Kickstart has a 3 second long animation, in which you cannot act. This can be used on players using Cap Artist. Despite the description stating "allies," this can be used on non-allies and humanoid NPCs.

name: Kindness
desc: Whenever you heal another player, heal 5 health yourself. [3 second cooldown]

name: Kj's Courage
desc: Gain 10% more Knowledge from all sources, rounded down.
additionalInfo: Due to it rounding down, this Talent will only activate if you get at least 10 Knowledge in one instance.

name: Knack
desc: Trees yield more Wood when felled. Your Repair speed is increased.

name: Knife's Journey
desc: [Dagger] Cancelling an enemy's Mantra windup with your Basic Attacks now deals 15% more damage
additionalInfo: In PvE, your Dagger attacks have a 15% chance to critically hit, dealing 5x damage. This does not proc "on critical attack" effects, and cannot proc on Moppet's critical attack.

name: Knight's Rally
desc: When using a shield, you ready your block more quickly after taking a hit.

name: Know When To Run
desc: Your magic coffin has a higher chance to draw depths loot, but the price is increased.
additionalInfo: Increases the price of using the Magic Coffin by 50% in exchange for adding the entire Depths lootpool to it.

name: Knuckle Guard
desc: Hitting Dazed enemies grants you 10% posture resistance for 15s.
additionalInfo: Knuckle Guard's duration will be reduced by 0.1s for every point of Fortitude and Strength below its requirements, having a minimum possible duration of 10.4 seconds with 30 Fortitude and 4 Strength.

name: Laced Traps
desc: People hit by your 'Caltrops' cannot jump and are slowed for a small duration, while also applying Sluggish to PvE enemies for a few seconds.
additionalInfo: Landing a Caltrop slows down your opponent and disables their ability to jump for 1.1 seconds. This effect refreshes if the victim gets hit by another Caltrop.

name: Lackluster Guard
desc: You aren't used to having to block, resulting in weaker posture.
additionalInfo: Reduces your maximum posture.

name: Laminated Armor
desc: Reduces all incoming damage by 2/3 (applied after damage multipliers).
additionalInfo: Reduces damage taken and dealt by a flat 2 (3 in Vow of Iron). This is applied after regular resistances, allowing you to potentially fully nullify damage taken.

name: Lancer's Impale
desc: [Spears] Hitting an enemy after a perfect dodge makes your next attack deal 30% bleed damage. If that attack would already bleed, it adds +10% chip damage instead.

name: Landshark
desc: Killing a Megalodaunt will grant lifesteal on your attacks for 30 seconds.
additionalInfo: The lifesteal only works in PvE.

name: Largent
desc: Your diplomatic skills extend into your ability to barter. Gain 300 extra notes per chest when turning in a sack.

name: Last Resort
desc: Deal +5% more damage when your health is below 25%.

name: Last Second Negotiations
desc: Most enemies will hesitate a moment longer to execute you.

name: Lasting Charisma
desc: Enemies charmed by your mantras are charmed longer.
additionalInfo: This adds 10 seconds to Charismatic Charm's Charm duration, but this will be reduced by 0.16s for every point of Charisma below 55, capping at 15.8 seconds at 30 Charisma.

name: Lasting Sorrow
desc: Shadows last longer on your opponent.

name: Lasting Trauma
desc: Anytime you land a Wrath Gem, your opponent becomes fearful, being unable to use their critical for a few seconds after you land it.
additionalInfo: This applies the Fearful status effect for 19 seconds. Wrath gems have a 10 second cooldown, meaning you can potentially disable your opponent's ability to use their critical indefinitely.

name: Leg Shot
desc: [Rifles] Landing your critical slows your enemy for a bit while making PvE enemies Sluggish, and also disables any speed boosts they get for the next 10 seconds.

name: Legendary
desc: Parrying and landing hits with your weapon gives you ether back.

name: Legion Kata
desc: Gain the ability to use the Legion's martial arts.
additionalInfo: Allows you to use the Legion Kata fist style.

name: Lethal Depressant
desc: Assassinating an opponent decreases the damage they deal by 25% for the next 30 seconds.

name: Lethal Dose
desc: The poison from your hidden blade lasts twice as long.
additionalInfo: Doubles the duration of the Hidden Blade poison effect, from 8 seconds to 16.

name: Life Leech
desc: Your summons now heal you each time they deal damage.
additionalInfo: The healing gained is based on summon damage dealt. This works on the following summons: monsters from the Parasol's Blight enchantment, The Weaving Web's critical attack, Illusory Servants, Illusory Counter, Lightning Clones, and Flame Sentinel.

name: Light Weapons Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Light Weapons attribute to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 Attribute cap on Light Weapons.

name: Lights Out
desc: Assassinations now give you 30% PEN and blind the target for 5s. Those you carry are now blindfolded.

name: Lightspeed Reflexes
desc: Feinting gives a very brief auto-parry window.

name: Lightweight
desc: Move faster when your armor runs out of durability.
additionalInfo: Grants a +25% movement speed buff. This is not a speed boost, meaning it won't proc any speed boost-reliant Talents.

name: Link Conduction
desc: While you have active tethers your lightning mantras cost less ether.
additionalInfo: Each active Link reduces the Ether cost of your Thundercall Mantras by 30%.

name: Lithe Step
desc: When Sprinting, roll-cancel and instantly vanish and surge with unmatched speed.
additionalInfo: Provides a brief speed boost on proc. 3s CD, reduced to 1s if in True Strength.

name: Lock n Load
desc: [1H Guns] The first bullet in your gun does more damage when fully loaded. This damage buff scales with the number of bullets up to 15%.

name: Lone Wolf
desc: Despite the loyalty of your allies, you recognize that you sometimes need to hunt alone. Deal more damage to targets who are only combat tagged by you.

name: Looter
desc: Get extra loot from items you turn in for rewards.
additionalInfo: This affects: turning in Artifacts or the Strange Egg at a banker, turning in Sacks to Mercille, handing in pure ore to a Blacksmith, and trading in Explosive Crates to Scope.

name: Lord's Tithe
desc: Everyone you Reinforce is drained of their Ether while Reinforced. Drain scales with your Shadowcast. Drain health from PvE opponents as well.
additionalInfo: Steals Ether (or health in PvE) in pulses.

name: Lose Your Mind
desc: Deal more damage the more insane you are. Grants +15% damage at maximum insanity.
additionalInfo: Starting at 70% Sanity, gain a damage buff that scales non-linearly on your current Sanity percentage.

name: Lowstride
desc: When crouching, your stealth and roll distance are increased. The speed penalty you receive from crouching is much smaller. You now draw and sheathe your weapon silently.

name: Loyalty
desc: Your bond with your allies is strong enough to reduce damage between you.
additionalInfo: Allies take 35% less damage from you and deal 35% less damage to you. This stacks multiplicatively with Give and Take.

name: Luminous Flash
desc: After dealing a certain amount of damage in Absolute Radiance, gain a chance to empower your strikes with pure light.
additionalInfo: During Absolute Radiance, your M1 attacks have a chance to proc Luminous Flash, applying the damage modifier hardcap as a damage buff.

name: Magic Coffin
desc: A jack of all trades, all attribute requirements are ignored. Activate your Coffin with C.
additionalInfo: Activating your Coffin takes 50 Notes. This Note cost will increase by 50 per Power, costing 1,000 Notes at Power 20. When used, the Coffin acts like a loot box, randomly rolling an item to give you. There is a 1% chance to grant the Skull, giving you high tier loot. This chance is increased by 1% per level, up to 20% at power 20. There is a 5-10% chance to roll a blank, doubling the chest of the next box. This can stack. Coffin activation uses your Resonance keybind. You can use any weapon or equipment item without meeting their attribute requirements.

name: Magical Resolve
desc: Being hit increases Ether regen for a short duration, the strength of the regen scales off your Willpower.

name: Maiming Claws
desc: Down Comes the Claw now disables your opponent's posture regeneration for 6s on proc.
additionalInfo: While their posture is paused, your opponent cannot restore posture by parrying, spitting, passive posture restoration, or through Steady Nerves. All other forms of posture restoration ignore this effect entirely. Maiming Claws' duration will be shortened if you do not meet its requirements. Maiming Claws cannot be refreshed if Down Comes the Claw is currently active.

name: Malevolent Sapper
desc: The more blood poisoning your opponent has, the more ether your shadow mantras steal from your opponent.

name: Manipulator
desc: Deal 20% more critical attack damage to charmed enemies, but the effect is removed on impact.
additionalInfo: 10 second cooldown. This is inherently weaker on multihit criticals due to it only proccing once then going on cooldown. Unnecessary Theatrics or Overcharm can be used to reapply the Charm after Manipulator removes it on the same hit.

name: Mantra Permanence
desc: Knocking an enemy with a mantra refunds the cost of the mantra.

name: Mark Mastery
desc: Reduce the amount of extra damage you receive while your ally is marked with the Justicar's Mark from 20% to 5%.
additionalInfo: Reduces the additional damage you take from marking an ally from 20% to 5%.

name: Mark of Jurik
desc: Mark of Jurik, the Moonseye. A beacon of calm, those in your presence are resistant to insanity.
additionalInfo: Gain a tool that lowers the sanity drain of nearby players. Also buffs affected players' HP regen and slightly buffs their food & thirst replenishment from consuming food and their blood regen. 4m CD. These buffs last 1 minute, the HP regen is 15% of their total HP over that one minute period, healing 0.25% HP per second. Also buffs non allies. Does not require you to be resting at a campfire.

name: Mark of Ku
desc: Mark of Ku, the Mother. Improves the rest of those in your presence.
additionalInfo: Gain a tool that buffs the blood regen of nearby players. Also buffs the affected players' HP regen and slightly buffs their sanity and their food & thirst replenishment from consuming food. 3m 30s CD. These buffs last 1 minute, the HP regen is 15% of their total HP over that one minute period, healing 0.25% HP per second. Also buffs non allies. Can only be used while you are resting on a campfire.

name: Mark of Nemit
desc: Mark of Nemit, the First Beast. Food consumed in your presence is more nourishing.
additionalInfo: Gain a tool that buffs the food and thirst replenishment of nearby players. Also buffs the affected players' HP regen and slightly buffs their blood regen and sanity. 3m 30s CD. These buffs last 1 minute, the HP regen is 15% of their total HP over that one minute period, healing 0.25% HP per second. Also buffs non allies. Can only be used while you are resting on a campfire.

name: Mark of the Lone Warrior
desc: Progress much faster when progressing alone. Gain a damage boost when facing threats alone and also when outnumbered.
additionalInfo: Gain an experience gain multiplier if nobody else has combat tagged the enemy. Gain a 5% damage buff against enemies who have combat tagged you, or enemies you've combat tagged if the opponent has less than or an equal amount of combat tags as you.

name: Marked Descent
desc: When your Justicar's Mark target takes damage, they are revealed. Using your Karita Divebomb will target them.
additionalInfo: Targets the enemy who hit your marked ally, not the marked ally themselves.

name: Martial Brutality
desc: The less health your opponent has, the more posture you deal to them.
additionalInfo: Increases your posture damage by 0.1% per 1% health missing, up to a maximum of +10% posture damage against someone at 0% health.

name: Martyr
desc: When you're knocked Unconscious, enemies gain less health and posture, and allies around you are granted Martyrdom for 20s
additionalInfo: Martyrdom grants a +20% damage and damage reduction buff to your allies. Enemies who knock you restore only half of the posture and health they would normally obtain (50% -> 25%).

name: Mass Effect
desc: For every Might Gem you have equipped on your mantras, slightly increase each Might Gem's power.
additionalInfo: Increases the posture damage bonus of Might Gems by 2.25% additively, for every Might Gem you have equipped on your Mantras.

name: Master Bloodrender
desc: You can now obtain 3-star Bloodrender mantras. Your maximum blood capacity is 25% more than a normal individual. You regen blood at a quicker pace.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Master Chef
desc: Buffs applied by food you cook now have their buff effects amplified by +30%.
additionalInfo: Increases the duration of food buffs by 30%. Increases the healing gained from using Fondant Splitter's critical.

name: Master Craftsman
desc: Your skills alone substitute the need for a Craft Station.
additionalInfo: You can craft items that normally require a Crafting Station from your inventory.

name: Master Flamecharmer
desc: You can now obtain 3-Star Leveled Flamecharmer Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Master Frostdrawer
desc: You can now obtain 3-Star Leveled Frostdraw Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Master Galebreather
desc: You can now obtain 3-Star Leveled Galebreathe mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Master Ironsinger
desc: You can now obtain 3-star Ironsinger mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Master Shadowcaster
desc: You can now obtain 3-star Leveled Shadowcaster Mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Master Thief
desc: Gain more notes when mugging a player.

name: Master Thundercaller
desc: You can now obtain 3-star Thundercaller mantras.
additionalInfo: This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Masterwork
desc: Successful hits from Artisan's Blades will proc metal rods and deal 50% more damage.

name: Matador
desc: Deal +20% more damage to human enemies with hyperarmor.

name: Maudet
desc: Your understanding of your destiny is such that learning new things often comes naturally to you. People appreciate your diplomatic ways of speaking.
additionalInfo: Gain 3 free investment points to invest every time you level up. This stacks with Autodidact. Your starting reputation with all factions is higher.

name: Max Ammo
desc: Landing the cannonball of your critical attack removes your critical attack's cooldown.

name: Mayhem
desc: Initiate a special dash attack by pressing M1 during the start of your dodge.
additionalInfo: 16s CD per weapon type, 6s CD if feinted. Movesets and damage differ depending on weapon type. Gains the ability to autogrip if it is enhanced by Flow State.

name: Medium Weapons Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Medium Weapons attribute to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 Attribute cap on Medium Weapons.

name: Merc Blade
desc: For every 10% stealth you have, deal 1 extra damage on all sources of damage.

name: Mercenary Blade
desc: For every 10% stealth you have, deal 1 extra damage on all sources of damage.

name: Merchant's Accord
desc: Merchants and Antiquarians will do business with you no matter how poor your reputation is.
additionalInfo: This Talent does NOT allow you to use the Antiquarian in the First Layer if you are not Deepbound or Ignition Delver.

name: Merciless Blade
desc: You can now execute enemies much faster.
additionalInfo: Increases your execution speed by 25%, down to 2.25 seconds from 3 seconds.

name: Metal Absorption
desc: Your 'Iron Hug' also absorbs armor from the enemy.
additionalInfo: Iron Hug will steal 10% of your opponent's current armor durability and siphon it back to yourself.

name: Metal Eater
desc: When you have no ether, consume Armor durability to cast your Ironsing mantras.
additionalInfo: Consumes 30% of your maximum armor on proc, regardless of the Ether cost of the Mantra.

name: Metal Shackles
desc: Guardbreaking an opponent prevents them from receiving speed boost for 5 seconds, while PvE opponents will be Sluggish for 12 seconds.

name: Metal Thief
desc: Pulling an opponent absorbs a portion of their current Armor durability.
additionalInfo: Steals 2% of your opponent's current armor durability per rod.

name: Meteor Impact
desc: Aerial moves you land will follow up into a devastating slam. This is also possible when you yourself gets hit by an aerial move.
additionalInfo: Deals 10 flat Flamecharm damage on top of your weapon's scaled damage. Procs by light attacking after using certain Mantras that end with both the user and the victim suspended in the air.

name: Million Ton Piercer
desc: Gain 5% extra PEN and remove the cap on your PEN. Go beyond your limits.
additionalInfo: Removes both the melee and Mantra PEN cap.

name: Mindspark
desc: The damage of your flames scale with how insane you are.
additionalInfo: Your burn damage is increased based on how low your Sanity is.

name: Mirage Clone
desc: Successfully dodging leaves behind a heat mirage clone that sets enemies that swung at you on fire.
additionalInfo: 20 second cooldown. Causes an Eruption instead if you have Eruption path.

name: Mist Mobility
desc: Anytime you proc Boiling Point, increase the speed at which you reload your Vapormaw Carbine and increase your Critical Attack's fire rate.
additionalInfo: Despite what the description states, this actually procs when you activate Flashboil, and not Boiling Point.

name: Mocking Favor
desc: When taunting, Aelita or Tillian appears, bestowing upon you a random boon of affliction. (30s cooldown)
additionalInfo: Grants a random buff or affliction from a set list whenever you spit or use an emote.

name: Molt
desc: Ailments and blessings alike fade away more quickly.
additionalInfo: The duration of Chill, Suffocation, and all potion effects is reduced.

name: Momentum
desc: Speed boosts now give you a bit of extra chip based on how fast the speed boosts are making you.

name: Monster Slayer
desc: Deal 25% more damage to giant enemies.

name: Moths to a Flame
desc: You summon a puppet of black flames that homes onto enemies with black flames.
additionalInfo: Puppets will now home in on targets who are burning with either of Twisted Puppets' burn types. When a Puppet gets close to a burning target it speeds up.

name: Mothwing Defense
desc: Further refining how sharp your antennae, you can now immediately recognize a sneak attack and brace yourself for it. Reduce all backhit damage by 50%.

name: Mothwing Dust
desc: You release Mothwing Dust when others are the first to strike, granting you vision of your attacker. Your antennae improve your peripheral senses, narrowing the angle at which you can be backstabbed.
additionalInfo: Upon being hit at the start of combat, cover your opponent in Mothwing Dust, applying a red highlight on your opponent for 10 seconds. This highlight can be seen through walls.

name: Moving Fortress
desc: Blocking no longer slows you down as much.
additionalInfo: Increases your movement speed while blocking by 5%, from -25% movement speed to -20%.

name: Mudskipper Gripper
desc: When executing an opponent with your critical attack, summon mudskippers to aid you in battle.

name: Muffled Screams
desc: You quieten the cries of help of those you execute, reducing the distance at which their allies will hear it and come to assist, and reducing the effectiveness of Talents that slow your executions.
additionalInfo: NPCs have a shortened aggro range from gripping allies in proximity. Defiant Until The End and Last Second Negotiations affect your grip speed less.

name: Murmur: Ardour
desc: An application of your Soul Murmur that enables one to channel the murmur into raw strength. Press H.
additionalInfo: Drains Ether while active, with the Ether drain scaling inversely with your level and being entirely negated at Power 20. Ardour automatically deactivates if you run out of Ether. Increases the posture damage of M1s and critical attacks with the M1 tag by 20%. Reduces incoming posture damage by 15%. Additionally applies a +15% damage buff to M1s and critical with the M1 tag that guard break.

name: Murmur: Rhythm
desc: An application of your Soul Murmur that enables the user to perceive the subtle murmur emanating from all things. Press G while crouched.
additionalInfo: Pings all nearby Monsters, NPCÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s, and Players, through walls while gray-scaling your screen. Red = Low Health, Yellow = Moderate Health, Grey = Healthy.

name: Murmur: Tacet
desc: An application of your Soul Murmur that enables the user to suppress their own murmur. Press T while crouched.
additionalInfo: On use, a sphere around your character will be created. To everyone outside of the sphere, you are invisible. The size of the Tacet sphere scales inversely on your level and your stealth stat, becoming smaller the higher your level and the more stealth you have. In PvE you become effectively invisible to enemies at almost any range. Tacet will deactivate if you: stop crouching for 3 seconds, sprint for 1.5 seconds, use any attack, get hit, or use Soulbreaker's Formless ability. Tacet will be disabled during Hell Mode, Diluvian, and Depths Trials.

name: Mythic Stability
desc: Players and regular mobs cannot instantly execute you while you're on your feet. Protects you from one instance of instant execution when Unconscious.
additionalInfo: 1 minute cooldown.

name: Nanji's Training
desc: Nanji shows you a better way to properly block attacks using a weapon, granting you 1 Posture.

name: Narcissist
desc: Charming an already Charmed opponent Overcharms you briefly. Guess you really were always that great.
additionalInfo: Overcharms yourself for 4 seconds. Charms yourself for 8 seconds, halved to 4 seconds if you have Disbelief.

name: Natural Healing
desc: Every time you eat plants, heal 2% of your health.
additionalInfo: "Plants" refers to any plant-based food item.

name: Navae's Conviction
desc: All Navaen related combat weapons are empowered.

name: Navae's Guidance
desc: Navae's star guides your path, showing you the way forward. Right-clicking on maps sets a Waymarker which can be followed. You are less prone to starvation.
additionalInfo: Receive a compass, displayed at the top of your screen, which points East. Right clicking on the map will place a waypoint or change the location of a pre-existing one. Waymarkers can be seen both in the physical world and on the map. The passive hunger loss is reduced.

name: Navae's Technique
desc: A passed down technique from generations ago to refine your Ether control. Reduce how much ether it takes to cast mantras by 30%.

name: Neural Overload
desc: You can input up to 4 copies of each Mantra ingredient instead of being limited to 3.

name: Neuroplasticity
reqs: neuroplasticity := 35r INT OR 35r WLL OR 35r CHA
desc: Your mind is a pliable, flexible substance. The Ether cost of additional modifications to your Mantras is now reduced by 10%.
additionalInfo: The reduced cost on Mantra modifiers does not apply retroactively to previously modified Mantras until you rejoin.

name: Night Night
desc: Uppercut attacks blind opponents for 15 seconds.

name: Night Terror
reqs: night_terror := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s SDW
desc: Your light attacks now proc Fear the Dark.
additionalInfo: Also procs on weapon criticals. Despite its description, this Talent immediately applies the Fear status for 1 second with no cooldown (they are not required to run away from you).

name: Nightchild
desc: Relying on your instincts, you are naturally more stealthy. You are more nimble on wooden surfaces.
additionalInfo: Multiplies all stealth gained by 1.2x. Gain +20% Stealth on spawn.

name: No Interruptions
desc: When combat tagged by 2 or more players, render any ranged attack a lot less effective.
additionalInfo: Grants extremely high damage reduction and true hyperarmor against attacks that are coming from opponents from far away. This requires you to be combat tagged by at least two people. Self-combat tags do not count, but NPC combat tags do (you will still need to be combat tagged by at least one player for this to activate).

name: No Limits
desc: Increase the cap on Bloodless Gem healing.
additionalInfo: Increases the cap for Bloodless Gem healing to 30. You will need a scaled damage value of 100 to hit the 30 healing cap.

name: No Survivors
desc: Your allies and yourself execute faster when affected by Overcharm.
additionalInfo: Reduces grip time by 0.5 seconds (16.67% faster).

name: None Left Behind
desc: You can now shadestep to pick up Unconscious humanoids far away from you.

name: Not a Scratch
desc: You don't show any signs of damage
additionalInfo: Your clothing no longer gets blood splotches and you no longer play low health animations at low health. Your outfit no longer tears when your armor durability is low. Rhythm users can no longer see your health. If you have less than 100 Willpower, your character has a chance to scream in agony upon taking damage.

name: Not My Tempo
desc: Dancer's Beat grants Hyperarmor.

name: Null Recovery
desc: Sacrifice 20% of your hunger bar to recover 10% of your health back.

name: Nullifying Clarity
desc: Deal 10% more damage to enemies with elemental status effects, but remove the status on hit.
additionalInfo: Procs on Burn, Chill, Shock, Fear, Winded, and Suffocation. Only works on M1s.

name: Oath: Arcwarder
desc: You vow to be a shield for your comrades, to wear your regalia with pride and serve the greater collective. From each according to their ability, to each according to their needs.

name: Oath: Bladeharper
reqs: oath_bladeharper := LHT + MED + HVY = 90r OR 75r MED, 25r AGL OR 25r STR
desc: You vow to carry your blades as an instrument, to lend yourself to any cause it guides you to. Collapse the infinite number of possibilities ahead of you into just one. The blade keeps you as much as you keep it.

name: Oath: Blightsurger
reqs: oath_blightsurger := STR + FTD + AGL = 80r, 40r WND OR 40r LTN
desc: Fists and storm. Wield sacred lightning, tear through foes and leave them withered.

name: Oath: Blindseer
desc: You vow to not let the horrors of the world pierce your tightly fastened blindfold. Everything is simply as we choose to perceive it.
additionalInfo: You can now see while blinded, but the world gains a blue hue.

name: Oath: Chainwarden
desc: You vow to be the chain that binds the wicked and drags them back where they belong. There are those in this world who should not be free.

name: Oath: Contractor
desc: Your heart is forever now eternally tied to Zi'eer, the 4th Prophet of the Ministry. You swear to serve under his will, no matter the cost.

name: Oath: Dawnwalker
desc: You vow to forever reach towards the brilliant Light. There is no shadow that your radiance cannot expunge.

name: Oath: Fadetrimmer
desc: You vow to forever hone your precision with the scissors. There will never be another fringe incident again.

name: Oath: Jetstriker
desc: You vow to flow with the Song itself, drifting across where the trails may take you. If the Song permeates everything, then let it be your conduit, and you its master.
additionalInfo: Gain Momentum by sprinting. At maximum Momentum, your Jetstriker Mantras deal 20% more damage.

name: Oath: Linkstrider
desc: You vow to give up your own life for the sake of others. Stepping out of the fray, you become a foundation of your allies' strength.

name: Oath: Oathless
desc: You vow to never be bound to any Oath; to live your life free of restraint. If free will is an illusion, why not make it a convincing one?
additionalInfo: Notably, the Oath Armor given by this Talent is affected by PEN and will be nullified if you run out of armor durability. Additionally, due to how resistances work, Oath attacks that have dual damage typings will ignore your Oath armor.

name: Oath: Saintsworn
reqs: oath_saintsworn := 15s FLM, 15s ICE, 15s WND, 15s LTN, 15s SDW
desc: A vow to the fallen heroes. Press L to swap to Saintsblade.
additionalInfo: While the Saintsblade is equipped, your Saintsworn Talents will be activated and you can utilize the Blade of Saints Mantra. By using the Saintsblade's critical attack, you can cycle between the Saint Stances. Each Saint Stance is attributed to one of the Attunements, potentially changing the effects of your Saintsworn Talents and altering your Blade of Saints Mantra.

name: Oath: Saltchemist
desc: You vow to dedicate body and mind to the furthering of the Material Arts. Your body is a conduit through which true knowledge shall be siphoned. Knowledge is power, and you shall be its vessel.

name: Oath: Silentheart
reqs: oath_silentheart := 25s STR, LHT + MED + HVY = 75r, 25r AGL OR 25r CHA
desc: You vow to reject the Words of the Song, denying yourself of mantras in pursuit of your own path to true strength, no matter the cost. You can wield weapons with 25 points below their usual requirements.
additionalInfo: If you have any Mantras, they will be unusable and will be entirely invisible. The weapon requirement reduction effect only reduces weapon stat requirements, and not attribute requirements. Additionally, it stacks with Khan's Versatile. Silentheart abilities can proc the Enchantment of your equipped weapon with a 30 second cooldown.

name: Oath: Soulbreaker
desc: The sum of your fragments is greater than the whole. Though your very being is splintered and threatening to drift apart, every shard of you Vows to remain One. Your Oath is a solvent that joins all of your distinct selves into the gestalt you.
additionalInfo: Your Ardour gains a new visual effect.

name: Oath: Starkindred
desc: You vow to feel the knowledge of all that is, all at once. Your heart beats with the world itself, as the Stars above watch over you.

name: Oath: Visionshaper
desc: You vow to only see that which you wish to see. Reality itself is malleable, pliable to your deft hands.

name: Observation
desc: Dodge frames are larger if you cancel your roll immediately.
additionalInfo: Cancelling your roll quickly will grant dodge frames equals to the length of a regular roll. Basically giving extra 0.1s dodge frames.

name: Off Your Game
desc: You now slow Taunted enemies when you hit them.

name: Offensive Recovery
