desc: If all your mantras have Might Gems equipped, lose posture any time you hit opponents block with a mantra.
additionalInfo: If all of your equipped Mantras have a Might Gem equipped, hitting your opponent's block with Mantras will restore your posture.

name: Officer's Slash
desc: You now gain an additional critical attack with Authority armory weaponry while your regular critical attack is on cooldown.
additionalInfo: Deals 35 Slash damage. 20 second cooldown.

name: Officer's Training
desc: While using a Sword or Rapier, take 30% less posture damage from criticals.

name: Oh The Irony
desc: Opponents affected by 'Taunt' receive double iron rods for the duration.

name: Old Habits Die Hard
desc: Blocking an attack with your lingering block frames after failing a parry will cause the attack to deal 15% less posture damage.

name: Omen
desc: Your Shadow Travel now has no windup and always requires health to teleport.

name: One With Flame
desc: When equipping a Worshipper Longsword and Worshipper Shield, you take 25% less damage while on fire and every mantra you use sets enemies on fire.
additionalInfo: These effects only apply while you are burning. Also turns your Medium Weapon Mantras orange and adds Flamecharm scaling to your Belief while active.

name: Open Wound
desc: Guardbreaking enemies leaves enemies more susceptible to blood loss from Bloodrend mantras.

name: Oppressive Force
desc: When using a weapon found in the Merit Armory, gain a unique two-hit flourish that does not knock back opponents and dazes them.
additionalInfo: The first hit deals your regular M1 damage and posture damage, the second hit deals 80% of your weapon's scaled damage with 7 posture damage. The damage and posture damage of the second hit cannot be buffed. The second hit does not count as a weapon attack, and therefore it does not benefit from any of your weapon's stats and cannot proc Talent effects.

name: Orb Discharge
desc: If an extra orb is available, you can consume it to vent if you don't have enough tempo.

name: Orbital Ice
desc: When landing a parry while standing on ice, automatically forms a gravitational ring of ice that absorbs 15% of the physical damage you take. The ring breaks after sustaining a certain amount of damage. (Scales with Frostdraw)
additionalInfo: 90 second cooldown. Durability of Orbital Ice is equal to "Frostdraw investment +10".

name: Osseous Surge
desc: Flourishing an enemy enhances your boots for 10 seconds, allowing you to spawn a wave of bones in the way you're facing. Right click to activate this.
additionalInfo: Press right click within a 10 second window after landing a flourish to stomp and send a wave of bones in the direction you're facing. This deals high damage and sends your opponent upwards.

name: Overcharge
desc: Your next dash after activating Static Blade is enhanced by lightning.
additionalInfo: Lightning Dashes increase your dash distance travelled by 2.3x and the duration of i-frames from rolling, but will end early if you attack.

name: Overdrive
desc: Go beyond your limits. All mantras you cast deal twice as much damage for 10 seconds.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that doubles the damage of your Mantras for 10 seconds. 3 minute cooldown.

name: Overflow
desc: Double the amount of tempo you receive when landing light attacks.

name: Overflowing Dam
desc: Having full Ether for 2 seconds or more grants an aura to your attacks that grant them 10% more damage.
additionalInfo: For every point of Intelligence below 40, Overflowing Dam's damage bonus will be reduced by 0.125%, having a minimum damage buff of 6.875% at 15 Intelligence.

name: Overwhelming Drain
desc: If multiple enemies are hit by your Shadow Eruption, they are dazed.

name: Overwhelming Might
desc: Strong Left now guard breaks at level 5.
additionalInfo: 60 second cooldown.

name: Pace
desc: Hitting opponents apply a speed boost. The faster you are the less damage you take.
additionalInfo: Grants damage reduction based on the combined potency on all speed boosts you have. Landing attacks grants a speed boost.

name: Pack Mule
desc: The max quantity for food you can hold is increased by 5.
additionalInfo: Stacks with the Boon of the same name, increasing the maximum amount of food items you can carry in one stack from 10 to 20.

name: Padded Armor
desc: While your armor is broken (or if you have no armor), you take 5% less damage.
additionalInfo: The 3% Blunt Armor is multiplicative with other sources of Blunt resistance.

name: Paired Soul
desc: Wielding a katana with this outfit grants extra damage.
additionalInfo: Katana deals 25% more damage. Alloyed Katana, Shattered Katana, and Purple Cloud deal 5% more damage. This is a damage modifier.

name: Panacea
desc: Hitting an enemy with a Bloodrend mantra stops their blood poison from decaying for 7 seconds.

name: Pardon Me
desc: Crimes you commit in allied territories are often ignored. Who's asking?
additionalInfo: Guards will not aggro onto you if you perform a crime in their territory if you have neutral or higher reputation with the faction.

name: Parting Gift
desc: After you land a flourish, gain the ability to shoot bullets for 5 seconds. [Dual Gun]
additionalInfo: On proc, all dual gun M1s within the next 5 seconds have projectiles.

name: Perfect Flash
desc: Having over 95% health causes your mantras to do +25% damage. This damage bonus will scale down to 10% if your enemies are far away.

name: Peripheral Vision
desc: Your glare now ignores if your opponent is facing you.

name: Perpetual Distillery
desc: Your very body has become a distillery for your alchemy. Gain 3 Autobrew slots that will automatically produce 3 concoctions of your choice.
additionalInfo: Upon using the Distillery's Talent tool, you're given three empty spaces where you input your potions. You're able to switch the mode from "Throw" to "Drink", and vice versa. Each potion in the Distillery will be given as a Talent tool, using the potion on use. Potions in the Distillery go on cooldown when used. Drink potions place other drink slots on a cooldown if they share buffs.

name: Perpetual Wrath
desc: Unleash the true power of Restrain. Each successive hit will increase its damage. stacking up to the base damage.
additionalInfo: Enchaining targets and hitting Chained targets with Restrain will add 1 stack of Perpetual Wrath. Each stack of Perpetual Wrath increases Restrain's (Mantra) damage by 8, capping out at 4 stacks for +32 damage.

name: Perseverance
desc: Reduces the duration you're Ragdolled and Unconscious for by 25%.
additionalInfo: This can stack with other Talents to reduce knock time even further. (Ex. Defiance)

name: Phantom
desc: For the next 5 seconds, your next basic attack bypasses block after landing a crit. [45 second CD]
additionalInfo: Your weapon attacks that bypass block apply shaky block.

name: Phantom Edge
desc: Your weapon Basic Attacks have +0.25 range.

name: Phantom Step
desc: Press X to begin running at high speeds and your regular dashes transform into gale dashes. (Must have at least 10% Spectral Gauge)
additionalInfo: Additionally grants a speed boost for the full duration. While active, your Spectral Gauge will be passively drained.

name: Phoenix Flames
desc: Any time you would burn to death, you instead rise again with 50% of your health restored. Has a 60 second cooldown.
additionalInfo: Healing scales on your Flamecharm investment; heals 25% health at 0 Flamecharm and scales up to 50% health at 75 Flamecharm, gaining 0.33% healing per point in Flamecharm. If you used Flame Within while knocked to proc Phoenix Flames, then the healing received will be halved.

name: Phoenix Impact
desc: If you Meteor Slam an opponent whilst on fire, restore some HP and Ether.
additionalInfo: Heals 4% max HP and restores 20 ether.

name: Pickpocket
desc: Gain the ability to pickpocket by pressing N. Deal a little more damage the more notes you have against PvE opponents as well.
additionalInfo: You can only pickpocket Unconscious targets. Gain +0.0002% PvE damage for every 1 Note you have; grants +3% damage at 15,000 Notes.

name: Pierce Through
desc: Remove the autoparry frames the first hit of your base spear critical has.
additionalInfo: The default spear critical attack no longer cancels if the first hit is parried. Additionally, parrying the first hit of this critical does not provide autoparry frames.

name: Piercing Blow
desc: Attacks that break an opponent's block ignore their Armor resistances.
additionalInfo: If you do not have 100 Strength, this Talent will instead halve your opponent's armor resistances multiplicatively, before PEN on proc.

name: Piercing Metal
desc: Deal additional armor damage to enemies per metal rod affecting them.
additionalInfo: Each rod increases armor damage dealt through weapon attacks and Mantras by 5%. This does not affect armor drain effects such as the Metal enchantment.

name: Piercing Shot
desc: Activate to make your next critical attack with any gun have 100% chip and shatter your opponent's armor for a few seconds, making them take increased PEN from all sources.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool, that on use, enhances your next critical attack used with any Rifle or Pistol. Enhanced critical attacks gain 100% chip damage and apply the Pierced Armor status effect to your opponent, increasing incoming PEN for a few seconds.

name: Piercing Will
desc: When your sanity is below 35%, gain up to +15% PEN on your attacks. Starting at 5% PEN, the lower your sanity, the higher your PEN.
additionalInfo: Grants a 10% PEN bonus at full insanity despite what the description states. The bonus PEN is applied starting from 35% Sanity.

name: Placebo Effect
desc: Drinking potions near allies will share the potion's effect with them.
additionalInfo: Also procs potion sickness, causing allies to throw up upon usage if they've ingested a potion recently.

name: Pleeksty's Faith
desc: When on fire, automatically quench flames at the cost of some ether.
additionalInfo: Does not proc with flames produced by the user with Flame Within or Agitating Spark.

name: Pleeksty's Inheritance
desc: You inherit the teachings of Amorus Pleeksty, augmenting your flamecharm mantras.
additionalInfo: Makes your Flamecharm Mantras extremely loud.

name: Pleeksty's Will
desc: You gain significantly more ether from consuming elemental ingredients.
additionalInfo: Consuming Gale Stones, Heartstars, Dying Embers, Spark Glands, and Frigid Prisms gives significantly more Ether.

name: Pleetsky's Wrath
desc: After dealing 500 damage with Flame Mantras, call forth a hail of fiery swords.
additionalInfo: Spawns swords from the sky, similarly to First Light's critical attack.

name: Pocket Bombs
desc: You have a chance to activate a bomb in your inventory when damaged
additionalInfo: On proc, this consumes 1 Iron Bomb to drop 2 bombs at your feet. This has a 1 second cooldown, with the cooldown activating any time you take damage, even if the effect did not proc.

name: Pocket Sand
desc: [Fist] Feinting into an uppercut blinds, applies Stagger to PvE enemies and also applies Dazed briefly. We're even now, right? 30s cooldown
additionalInfo: 30 second cooldown.

name: Poisoned Knife
desc: Your Deepwound's anti heal now lasts 60 seconds on assassination instead of 20.

name: Polished Armor
desc: You receive 5% less damage when your Armor protects you from an attack and has over 90% durability. This 5% will scale up to 10% less damage at 100 MTL.
additionalInfo: The damage reduction of Polished Armor is increased by 0.05% per Ironsing investment, granting 8.75% damage reduction at requirements.

name: Polite Awakening
desc: Recover 15% of your max health after getting up from being downed. (Only Procs when below 20% HP)

name: Possession
desc: After an apparition hits an enemy, receive 7.5% posture damage on all Galebreathe attacks for 8 seconds. If the apparition hits while you have Phantom Step active, receive a 7.55% chip damage buff for 6 seconds.
additionalInfo: The chip damage buff only applies to Galebreathe Mantras.

name: Potion Quaffer
desc: You're accustomed to drinking toxic fluids quickly. You'll get along famously with the other patrons at the tavern. Drinking potions slows less and grants superior regenerative effects to you.
additionalInfo: Drink potions 30% faster. Increases the effectiveness of Health Regeneration potions by 15%, Sanity Restoration and Ether Regeneration potions by 30%, and removes the -25% effectiveness Instant Health potions have.

name: Praise The Sun
desc: When standing in sunlight increase your natural health regen and reduce how long antiheal effects last on you.

name: Preceding Chill
desc: Enemies hit during the last moments of your ice beam are frozen.
additionalInfo: If the user has Crystallization, this Talent no longer freezes but instead causes crystals to explode.

name: Precise Swing
desc: After landing a critical your next basic attack will gain 25% chip past your opponent's block.
additionalInfo: Procs even if your critical is parried or blocked. The Precise Swing status effect will be lost should your next M1 land or get parried. This is additive with all other sources of Chip Damage.

name: Precision Crusher
desc: Landing a charged shot will knock your opponent down instead of back.

name: Precision Hitter
desc: Your Basic Attack posture damage is increased by 15%.

name: Pressure Break
reqs: air_pressure => pressure_break := 65s WND, 30r AGL OR 30r STR
desc: Breaking an enemy's posture will cause them to take intense wind pressure, increasing the attack's damage by +25% and flinging the enemy backwards.

name: Pressure Detonation
desc: Block breaking an opponent with a Shadow mantra generates a small vacuum that suffocates those hit and steals their Tempo.
additionalInfo: If the user has the Apparitions Talent, this can proc apparitions by inflicting suffocation.

name: Pressure Skewer
desc: [Rapier] Flourishing an enemy causes your M1's to deal additional chip damage, blood loss and makes your hits deal 3 extra true damage until you take damage.
additionalInfo: Increases blood bar damage by 50% and grants +25% Chip damage while active. These bonuses apply to M1s and criticals with the M1 tag.

name: Primal Rage
desc: If you are below 50%, unleash your rage and increase the amount of damage you deal for 25 seconds as well as being able to see enemy health when you hit them.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that can only be used when you are under 50% health. While buffed, your hits will showcase the health percentage of your opponent. Additionally, gain a 25% damage buff for the duration of the effect. 3 minute cooldown.

name: Prime Ether Bullets
desc: Your bullets take one less hit to proc elemental effects and now have slight intelligence scaling. [Dual Gun]
additionalInfo: True Ether Bullets now procs in 2 hits instead of 3. Adds 1.2 Intelligence scaling to your Pistols.

name: Prince of the Wind
desc: You are the one who the wind bends around. Your galebreathe is enhanced.

name: Proficient Baiting
desc: Casting your line excites ocean life, reducing the chances of fishing up trash.
additionalInfo: Reduces the likelihood of fishing up trash items such as Seaweed or Leather Boots.

name: Propagandalist
desc: Your Sing will now stir your allies into a frenzy, causing them to become Overcharmed for 15s, applying Charmed to enemies they hit with Basic Attacks.

name: Protagonist Syndrome
desc: The grasp of shadow is meaningless in the face of your blinding light. Your Dawnwalker mantras are empowered after getting hit by Shadowcast.
additionalInfo: Increases your Dawnwalker Mantra damage by 30% after being hit by Shadowcast damage. This cannot be self procced by using Shade Devour.

name: Pugnacious
desc: Become stronger the more you are combat tagged. Gain even more strength whenever you grip a player.
additionalInfo: Gain various stacking buffs scaling on the amount of combat tags you have. Gain a further damage buff upon executing a player. On basic attack, gain +10% to the following stats: damage, posture damage, elemental damage resistance, physical damage resistance, chip damage, and speed boost per combat tag you have. The damage, posture damage, and chip damage effects ignore the modifier caps but cap at +30%. The resistance bonuses are multiplicative to other sources of their respective resistance types. The speed boost has no cap in effectiveness.

name: Punishing Blow
desc: [Heavy Weapons] Daze opponents for 1s and Stagger PvE enemies for 2s when you interrupt their Basic Attack / actions with your own.
additionalInfo: If you M1 your opponent during their M1 animation, they will be dazed for 1 second. Also procs if you land a critical with the M1 tag during their M1 animation.

name: Punishing Riposte
desc: When parrying a guardbreak, enhance your critical for the next 4 seconds. If you land your crit on your opponent's block while it is enhanced, immediately guardbreak your opponent.
additionalInfo: After parrying a guard break, gain the Punishing Riposte status effect for 15 seconds, making your critical guaranteed guardbreak if it hits block.

name: Purge Shot
desc: Landing an arc beam while your opponent has anti heal stacks purges the stacks, with it dealing 5 true damage for every stack they had.
additionalInfo: Landing Arc Beam removes all stacks of anti-heal from your opponent, dealing 5 true damage for every stack they had.

name: Pursuit
desc: If you land your Revenge, clear the cooldown immediately. (25s cooldown)
additionalInfo: Procs even if Revenge is blocked, parried, dodged, or vented. For every point in Agility below 90, Pursuit will gain +0.375 seconds to its cooldown, capping at 29.4 seconds with 65 Agility.

name: Pyreborne
desc: Your Flamecharm mantras have all stats amplified.
additionalInfo: Increases the base damage of all Flamecharm Mantras by 30%.

name: Quick Swap
desc: Massively reduce your bullet swap cooldown. [Dual Gun]

name: Quickdraw
desc: Allows you to fire your offhand gun right after swinging. [Not necessary on dual guns]
additionalInfo: Allows the user to instantly start attacking with their offhand gun after attacking with their main weapon.

name: Rage Amp
desc: At 2 or more combat tags, your critical now applies anti-heal while also increases the size and damage of your critical. This scales with the amount of combat tags you have.

name: Rain of Static
desc: After successfully casting lightning impact, strike down countless thunder at those below. In return your Lightning Impact will require more time to cast.
additionalInfo: When casting Lightning Impact, hover above the ground and fire multiple projectiles. Afterward, you strike down normally.

name: Rapid Fire
desc: [1H Guns] When you land a critical shot, gain Rapid Fire for 2s. 12s Cooldown.
additionalInfo: The Rapid Fire status effect entirely removes your Pistol critical cooldown for its duration, allowing you to spam it. Procs on dodge, block, and hit.

name: Rapid Reload
desc: [1H Guns] You have 20% faster reload when reloading an empty pistol
additionalInfo: Reduces the total time taken to reload a pistol from empty by 0.1 seconds.

name: Rat's Spirit
desc: Each hit of your critical will deal an extra 10 true damage per combat tag whenever you are combat tagged by 2 or more people.
additionalInfo: Being combat tagged by 2 or more players will cause your critical attack to deal an additional 10 true damage per hit. This scales on how many combat tags you have, gaining +10 damage per.

name: Ready or Not
desc: The first attack to hit you while out of combat has its damage cut in half.

name: Reality Shift
desc: Command the closest conjured servant to attack their hallucinating target, either using a Critical Attack or a Mantra.
additionalInfo: Your last used Mantra or critical attack will be stored in your clones when you summon them. Using the Reality Shift Talent tool or hotkey will perform the stored action.

name: Rebuke in Stasis
desc: Bottom freeze enemies nearby when countering with Punishment, freezes mobs affected when re-casted.
additionalInfo: Your Punishment will apply bottom freeze to mobs if you land the counter hit.

name: Reclaimed Glass
desc: Your Crystal Shrapnel explosions now grant you and any allies caught in them 10% Elemental Resistance for 10 seconds.
additionalInfo: The duration of this effect is refreshable by reproccing it.

name: Refine and Reuse
desc: Consuming rods with Scrapsinger reduces incoming PEN against you for 14 seconds. Each rod reduces PEN by 5% multiplicatively.

name: Reforged Alloy
desc: Anytime you consume iron rods using Metal Pull or any Rending Needle technique, reduce the cooldown of your next critical based on the amount of rods consumed.

name: Refreeze
desc: Landing any sort of ability that causes bottom freeze reduces the cooldown of your Orbital Ice by 5 seconds.

name: Reinforced Armor
reqs: battle_tendency, braced_collapse, moving_fortress, perseverance => reinforced_armor := 90s FTD
desc: Incoming PEN is reduced by 30%.
additionalInfo: Loses 0.8% PEN resistance per point below 90 Fortitude, capping at 10% PEN resistance at 65 Fortitude.

name: Relentless Barrage
desc: Every swing from Rapid Punches deals more posture than the last. At max punch stacks enables hyperarmor during the barrage.
additionalInfo: Your Rapid Punches posture damage per hit scales on the amount of hits landed/blocked. At max Calamity Punch stacks, gain hyperarmor during Rapid Punches.

name: Relentless Hunt
desc: M1 while doing an Aerial Attack to initiate a special gap closer attack.
additionalInfo: 20s CD per weapon type, 6s CD if feinted. Movesets differ depending on weapon type. The Light Weapon variant hits twice if it is enhanced by Flow State.

name: Rending Impact
desc: [Greataxes] Block breaking an enemy applies knockdown.
additionalInfo: Only procs on guardbreaks from weapon attacks. Applies knockdown for 1.2s.

name: Rending Needle: Augmenter
reqs: rending_needle_augmenter := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s MTL
desc: If an enemy has 5 or more rods, your Ironsing Pull will use their rods to form a powerful sword to attack with. This also makes your Metal Armament stronger while the weapon is equipped.
additionalInfo: Replaces your current weapon with the Metal Greatsword for 10 seconds when you Pull an enemy who has 5 Metal Rods on them. While Metal Greatsword is equipped, your Metal Armament damage is increased by 50%.

name: Rending Needle: Conductor
desc: 5 metal rods will combine into a conductor rod. If an enemy uses a non-Ironsing elemental mantra, they're dealt with their element back in return.
additionalInfo: Upon applying 5 Metal Rods to a target, the Rods will converge into a Conductor Rod. Conductor Rods cannot be pulled. If an enemy affected by a Conductor Rod casts a Mantra, they will lose 5% of their maximum armor, and if that Mantra was a non-Ironsing/Bloodrend elemental Mantra, they will be afflicted with their Attunement's status effect, causing the Rod to fall off. Conductor Rods last 30 seconds or until a non-Ironsing/Bloodrend elemental Mantra is cast.

name: Rending Needle: Impaler
desc: If an enemy is affected by 5 or more metal rods, your Ironsing Pull instead pulls out all of the rods for massive damage.
additionalInfo: Increases the Metal Rod cap from 5 to 10. You can no longer use Metal Pull unless the target has at least 5 rods. Your Metal Pull now deals damage, with the damage scaling based on the amount of Rods applied. Impaler Rods individually have a base damage of 4, with 5 Ironsing scaling, gaining 0.02 damage per Ironsing investment. This will deal 5.5 damage per rod at 75 Ironsing and 6 damage per rod at 100 Ironsing.

name: Rending Needle: Jailer
desc: If an enemy has 5 or more rods, your Ironsing Pull will restrain them instead of pulling them.
additionalInfo: Increases the Metal Rod cap from 5 to 10, and you can no longer use Metal Pull unless the target has at least 5 rods. Metal Pull now stuns targets for 1.08s, and an additional 0.104s for every additional rod after the fifth (to a maximum of 1.6s). A stunned target has 30% damage reduction.

name: Repeated Blows
desc: Any strength mantra that has a Wrath Gem on it will reset its cooldown if you land a critical while a Wrath Gem is active.
additionalInfo: This has no cooldown, theoretically allowing you to infinitely reset the cooldown of your Strength Mantras.

name: Repeated Propulsion
desc: Reduce the cooldown of Dancing Steps and Graceful Steps to 1 second.

name: Replenishing Knockout
desc: You gain more health and posture from downing enemies.
additionalInfo: Knocking enemies will replenish 1.5x more of your health and posture (50% -> 75%).

name: Reshape and Remold
reqs: artisans_blade, gilded_path_scrapsinger, masterwork, refine_and_reuse, songs_unforged => reshape_and_remold := 70s MTL
desc: Successful procs of Scrapsinger will increase the amount of armor damage your opponent takes. After hitting 10 stacks, the opponent will take +5% damage until the stacks drop below 10.
additionalInfo: Increases the armor drain effect of your rods by 25%, from 2% drain to 2.5%.

name: Residual Fury
desc: [In Berserk State] Landing your critical grants +50% PEN on Basic Attacks for 8s.

name: Resolve Crusher
desc: Lightning moves now apply stacks of "Resolve Crusher". At 4 stacks, you apply "Electrified" to your opponent. Attacks from Electrified opponents are converted into lightning damage, but will deal 10% less damage to you.
additionalInfo: Resolve Crusher's "Electrified" effect is only applied after the 5th stack (not the 4th stated by the Talent). Each stack lasts for 5 seconds. Electrified lasts for 5 seconds. Damage debuff only applies against weapon attacks.

name: Retrograde
desc: Your existence is... questionable. No one understands where you have come from. Your ability reflects this, activate to start your Retrograde timer. Activating the ability again will reverse your actions, with the cooldown scaling with the time.
additionalInfo: Gain a Talent tool that records your location, health, Ether, and posture on use. Upon using the tool again or waiting 5 seconds, you will be transferred back to your original location, restoring you back to the state and location you were at when this tool was initially used.

name: Reveal
desc: Pour your heart out, and reveal your true strength.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that activates True Strength on use. While active, you will passively accumulate Wither. Reveal will automatically end if your health goes below 10%.

name: Reverse Leech
desc: Anytime you proc Behind You, steal ether from your opponent too.
additionalInfo: Behind You is procced by landing a basic attack behind your enemy after feinting a Mantra.

name: Reverse Necrosis
desc: Landing any mantra will now heal you based on how slow your opponent is.

name: Righteous Crash
desc: Slamming down your opponent in the air with a flourish or your upgraded Vanguard Jus Karita critical deals extra true damage based on high up in the air they were.

name: Righteous Rage
desc: [In Berserk State] You deal increased damage the lower your health is.
additionalInfo: Temporary Health does not count for this effect.

name: Righteous Violence
desc: Landing a Critical Attack heals your marked ally. Landing a Jus Karita critical or Karita Swap heals your marked ally even more.

name: Riot Breaker
desc: You receive 15% less posture damage and deal 10% more posture damage when under attack by 3 or more enemies.

name: Riot Shield
desc: While you are fighting two or more opponents and are using a shield, reduce the total amount of chip damage you take by 40%.
additionalInfo: Grants 40% damage reduction to chip damage, does not reduce your opponent's chip % by 40.

name: Rip and Tear
desc: Regain health upon defeating an enemy.

name: Rising Star
desc: Press CTRL + M2 to activate a special uppercut attack.
additionalInfo: 12s CD per weapon type, 4s CD if feinted. Procs all "on Uppercut" Talents. Movesets differ depending on weapon type.

name: Risky Defense
desc: Decrease how much posture damage you take from physical attacks by 25%, but take 50% more posture damage from mantras.
additionalInfo: Increases incoming posture damage from Mantras by 50%. Decreases incoming posture damage from weapon attacks by 25%.

name: Risky Moves
desc: When you successfully dodge, you'll automatically dodge the next attack.
additionalInfo: Attacking will cancel the effect early. 20 second cooldown.

name: Robber Baron
desc: You hold onto more items when defeated.
additionalInfo: Lose 25% of your non-Soulbound/Enchanted items on death instead of 50%. You no longer lose Notes on death.

name: Rock Blaster
desc: Doubles your ore yields when mining.

name: Rogue Assassin
desc: Your assassinations now deal an extra 50 true damage (200 in PvE).

name: Rosen's Technique
desc: If you use Tactical Reload, Rosen's Peacemaker has 45 seconds less off its cooldown.
additionalInfo: Reduces the cooldown of Tactical Reload by 45 seconds; from 90 seconds to 45.

name: Royal Charge
desc: When landing a running attack while using a club to gain a bit of temp health.
additionalInfo: Running attacks with Club weapons grant Temporary Health. 20 second cooldown.

name: Ruinous Recovery
desc: Enemies recover 15% less Posture when parrying. Guardbreaking an enemy by parrying them deals massive damage, and can be done against even the strongest of foes.

name: Rule Through Fear
desc: Executing an enemy applies Overcharm to nearby allies and yourself.
additionalInfo: Overcharms for 10 seconds.

name: Rush
desc: Massively reduce your dodge cooldown.

name: Rush Hour
desc: Stab yourself to become stronger, faster, and deal increased blood bar damage.
additionalInfo: Use the Rush Hour tool to gain the Rush Hour status effect, granting a 30% speed boost, a 15% damage buff, and an increase to blood damage. This passively drains the user's health and blood while active. Recover 5% blood whenever you land an attack.

name: Rush of Ancients
desc: Dashing at maximum sprint momentum makes you one with the wind itself.
additionalInfo: Extends your dash distance and makes you invisible for a very brief duration when you dash.

name: Sable Winds
desc: You can now Inhale Shadowcast mantras. Aftercut effects now drain a small amount of ether based on the damage they deal.
additionalInfo: Inhale bonuses now apply to Shadowcast Mantras as well.

name: Sacred Aura
desc: Landing your Sacred Hammer critical attack applies an aura of protection around you, reducing the damage you take by a flat 2.5, multiplying based on how many combat tags you currently have on you.

name: Sacrificial Boon
desc: Sacrifice 5 knowledge to activate Blessing, giving you a random blessing from Navae.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that consumes 5 KnowledgeSprite on use to grant the user a random buff within a set pool. This has a 0.5 second cooldown, potentially allowing you to stack the buffs. Potential buffs are: 20% damage buff, hyperarmor for 10 seconds, instantly heal 50 health, thirst restoration, stomach restoration, or a speed boost for 10 seconds.

name: Sadistic Split
desc: Guardbreaking your opponent now heals you. The amount of this heal is based on how much insanity your character currently has.

name: Safety Dance
desc: Your base dodge frames are increased by 0.05s.
additionalInfo: Dodge IFrames increased from 0.3s to 0.35s.

name: Safety First
desc: At the start of fights, gain 25% damage resistance for 30 seconds.

name: Saint Jay
desc: When a Chilled enemy receives a heal, it's nullified and 60% of the healing is redirected to you. While this is active and they are on ice your rate of healing is increased, raise your PvE Heal Boost to 10% as well.
additionalInfo: You can only steal non-passive healing. On Crystal Path, applying a Crystal will proc Saint Jay for 2 seconds. You cannot steal healing that you apply.

name: Saint's Negation
desc: Once per stance cycle you can fully block an attack that matches your Saint Stance.
additionalInfo: Allows you to fully negate the damage of one attack that has a damage type that corresponds with your current Saint Stance. Can only proc once per full cycle, meaning you'll have to fully cycle through all of the Stances before you can proc it again.

name: Saint's Overload
desc: After a full rotation of stances your elemental scaling is increased by 15% and Mantra Modifiers increased by 10%.
additionalInfo: Increases your Attunement investment scaling by 15% and the effects of your Mantra modifiers by 10% for a few seconds after performing a full rotation of Saint stances. You'll need to fully cycle through all of the Stances before you can proc this effect again.

name: Saint's Synergy
desc: 15% of your highest element scaling is applied to other elemental damage.
additionalInfo: 15% of the investment scaling from your highest Attuned stat is added to your other Attuned Mantras, granting them slight dual scaling.

name: Sanguine Siphon
desc: Landing a critical attack while in a blood pool will consume that pool and empower your next blood mantra.
additionalInfo: Grants a 20% damage buff to the next Mantra cast.

name: Savior
desc: After saving a player from being gripped gain a short speed boost for a short duration.
additionalInfo: Interrupt an execution attempt to proc this Talent, granting a speed boost for 15 seconds.

name: Scales of the Edenkite
desc: In order to resolve conflict in Lumen, you need to be able to handle any situation thrown at you. Activate your Scales to reduce all damage taken by 80% and de-aggro enemies briefly.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that lasts 5 seconds with a 3 minute cooldown. The deaggro effect only works in PvE, and is extremely ineffective, as most enemies will immediately reaggro. The deaggro effect does not work against bosses or in Depths Trials.

name: Scammer
desc: If your opponent tries to parry the fake hit of your critical attack, your critical attack will inflict a stronger daze upon your opponent.

name: Scaredy Cat
desc: When enemies initiate a fight first, gain a speed boost.

name: Scholar's Intuition
desc: INT, WILL, and CHA Training Gear is 50% more effective.

name: Scholar's Mark
desc: You now are able to inflict yourself with a Mark. The duration of this scales with how many people you inflict with the effect as well.
additionalInfo: You can now use Capra Marks to buff yourself.

name: Scorchblood
desc: Guardbreaking your opponent using a bloodrend mantra causes a blood explosion, setting your opponent on fire and poisoning their blood.
additionalInfo: Deals 16.5 damage in an AoE on proc.

name: Scorched Peak
desc: Blockbreaking an enemy on fire or with a fire mantra causes them to be struck by lightning.
additionalInfo: Deals 10 Thundercall damage on hit. "On fire" refers to the Burn status effect. This can proc Grounding Bolt.

name: Scorching Decay
reqs: emperor_flame => scorching_decay := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s FLM
desc: The wither dealt from your Emperor's Flame is massively increased.
additionalInfo: Increases the Wither applied from Emperor Flame from 25 to 75.

name: Scornful Scowl
desc: Your Glare stuns enemies for much longer.

name: Seaborne
desc: You have a keen understanding of ships and their maintenance.
additionalInfo: Ship purchase price is reduced by 20%, ships turn 20% faster, and have 10% more health. Repairing a ship with a Repair Hammer takes less time.

name: Seamaster's Guile
desc: While you're at the helm of a ship, it takes 25% less damage
additionalInfo: Your boat will take 25% less damage if the person piloting it has this Talent.

name: Second Interrogation
desc: Electrified attacks do 50% less damage and posture damage to you.
additionalInfo: Does not stack with Resolve Crusher's damage reduction, instead it replaces it with this, more potent, effect. Only applies against weapon attacks.

name: Serpent's Dance
desc: Unleash the power of Fang and Coil to unlock a devastating Running Critical Attack, feint to cancel momentum.
additionalInfo: This critical deals 1x of your weapon's scaled damage. This critical can only be used on Cestus that do not have a unique critical.

name: Shadow Overflow
desc: Extra ether stolen with mantras are exerted as dark energy, damaging and absorbing ether from those nearby.
additionalInfo: Has a 4 second cooldown. Deals 5 Shadowcast damage on proc.

name: Shadow Travel
desc: Teleport to a location in exchange for Ether cost. Certain ranges will require a health sacrifice. Be careful as this technique can prove lethal to the user.
additionalInfo: Deals 0.25 self damage per stud teleported. This can kill you if you don't have enough health to survive the teleport. If your teleport distance is less than 300 studs, you will not take self damage. Drains 100 Ether on use, with each stud travelled increasing this Ether cost by 0.2. The maximum distance you can travel is based on your Ether.

name: Shadowcast Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Shadowcast to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Shadowcast Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Shadowcaster
desc: Grants you the ability to command shadows as a Shadowcaster.

name: Shared Mimicry
desc: The servants you have conjured will imitate your actions when you Swing/Block/Parry/Jump.
additionalInfo: Your clones will also Vent when you Vent. This can trigger even if you do not have Tempo or if you press G while in an animation.

name: Shared Misery
desc: Using a Basic Attack/Critical Attack on an enemy while losing sanity causes them to lose sanity.
additionalInfo: If you are actively losing sanity or have used Heretic's Sutra in the past 15 seconds, remove 3% of the target's maximum sanity, scaled down if you have less than 85 Willpower.

name: Sharing is Caring
desc: Your 'Charm' on opponents also slightly increases your blood drain against them.

name: Sharpened Dagger
desc: All backstabs deal 1 extra true damage (4 extra damage if done to PvE).
additionalInfo: This applies to attacks used against your opponent's back, not assassinations.

name: Shatter
desc: Landing a critical shatters your opponent, ridding them of their speed debuffs for 5 frost damage per debuff.
additionalInfo: Landing a critical attack removes all speed debuffs your opponent has, dealing 5 Frostdraw damage per debuff.

name: Shattering Left
desc: Your Strong Left and Wind-up punches will always guard break mobs.
additionalInfo: Turns your Strong Left and Wind-Up enhanced attacks into guaranteed guardbreaks against blocking NPCs.

name: Sheltering Grasp
desc: Blood mantras cast within blood pools have a reduced blood cost.
additionalInfo: Halves the blood cost of the Mantra.

name: Shield Breaker
desc: Blunt damage now fully ignores the posture bonus from shields.

name: Shock Trooper Specialist
desc: Empower the mantras taught to you by your Legion Specialist Captain. You also now conjure a storm strike on your opponent by landing Gale and Thundercall mantras.
additionalInfo: Upon meeting a damage threshold, create a Stormcall Strike. The Storm Strikes deal 40 Thundercall damage and can proc Grounding Bolt. Additionally, your Electro Carve, Grand Javelin, and Thunder Kick become green, and your Astral Wind, Champion's Whirlthrow, and Gale Lunge become yellow. All of the aforementioned Mantras have their base damage increased by 15%.

name: Shocking Finish
desc: Following a flourish up with a lightning beam causes it to be casted instantly.

name: Shocking Reverb
desc: Landing enough lightning mantras without getting hit grants you a defensive lightning cloak for 15 seconds, letting you negate damage from light attacks and ironsing.
additionalInfo: You need to reach a threshold of 150 scaled damage with Thundercall Mantras without being hit to proc this Talent. The damage buildup to reach the threshold is unaffected by resistances and damage modifiers. Also negates damage from critical attacks and Silentheart abilities. 2 minute cooldown.

name: Showstopper
desc: When an enemy would roll through one of your physical attacks, stomp the ground, dazing anyone nearby. Removes speed buffs from target upon landing.

name: Sightless Still
desc: The more a person is affected by your Shadowcast the more you obscure their vision. Block breaking an opponent obscures their vision even more and applies Ether Sunder to PvE

name: Silencer's Blade
desc: Meleeing a 'Suffocated' opponent will extend the duration of the Suffocation and grant a speed boost.
additionalInfo: Landing M1 attacks or criticals with the M1 tag on suffocated targets applies a new stack of suffocation that lasts 5 seconds. Grants a 22.5% speed boost for 3 seconds on proc.

name: Silencer's Song
reqs: silencers_blade => silencers_song := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s WND
desc: Silencer's Blade now procs on your mantras.
additionalInfo: Landing any Mantra on a suffocated target creates a new stack of suffocation that lasts 5 seconds. Additionally, you gain a 22.5% speed boost for 3 seconds.

name: Silent Cascade
desc: Landing physical attacks on an opponent charges up your Silent Cascade, a devastating barrage that can be released with CTRL + M2.
additionalInfo: Landing 8 weapon attacks or Silentheart abilities grants the Silent Cascade status effect, allowing you to use the Silent Cascade attack. This effect lasts 30 seconds or until you use Silent Cascade. Deals 7.5 Oath damage per hit (6).

name: Simmerbloom
desc: Basic Attacks on Pleeksty's Inferno are now granted flames.
additionalInfo: Basic attacks with Pleeksty's Inferno now apply burn with no cooldown.

name: Simple Buff
desc: Your light attacks deal 7.5/15% more damage. Pretty simple.
additionalInfo: Grants a 7.5% (15% in Vow of Iron) damage buff to M1s.

name: Sin Stacker
desc: Your All The Dead Gods' duration is now based on how many stacks of antiheal you already have on your opponent, increase your PvE Heal Boost to 10% as well.
additionalInfo: Each stack of All the Dead Gods anti-heal increases the duration of subsequent All the Dead Gods anti-heal stacks by 1 second. For example, your first hit will apply anti-heal for 8 seconds, and your next hit will apply 9 seconds of anti-heal, and so on. Each stack of anti-heal has an independent duration, decaying independently of each other.

name: Singularity
desc: Enemies will briefly hang in place when hit by a shadow move.

name: Skillful Recovery
desc: Recover more posture in all situations.

name: Sky Aid
desc: Take 80% less damage while in the air.

name: Sleight of Hands
desc: [1H Guns] When you flourish an opponent you instantly load a bullet.

name: Slick
desc: Coat of the infamous thief Emiya Konga. Improves the user's sliding abilities. This effect stacks with Konga's Clutch Ring.

name: Slider Style
desc: Raise the cap of how fast you are able to slide. Your Jus Karita fighting style gains a new sliding crit. Its power stems from how fast you are sliding when using the critical attack.

name: Sloped Plate
desc: Reduces the amount of damage you take when guardbroken by 10.

name: Smell of Blood
desc: When people touch a blood pool, briefly see their blood (or blood hemorrhage amount for PvE) and blood poison. This effect also occurs whenever you blockbreak your opponent.
additionalInfo: Your opponent's blood (or blood hemorrhaging in PvE) percentage is shown as a red number, and their blood poison percentage is shown as a pink number.

name: Smoldering Touch
desc: Guardbreaking your opponent sets them on fire.

name: Snake Oil
desc: Okay, the amount you're charging people for your items is getting downright criminal. But I'm just a Talent description, I can't stop you.
additionalInfo: Increases the sell price of items by 40%.

name: Soar
desc: Retain full walkspeed while using your crit.
additionalInfo: This allows you to retain your full momentum during your weapon critical. This Talent will be disabled if you equip a Motif onto the Withered Gale Pale.

name: Soaring Storm
desc: Empower your uppercuts with the way of the blade, after Lithe Stepping, flourishing, or landing an Oath ability.
additionalInfo: Proc condition is removed and damage is increased if in True Strength. Applies to all forms of uppercuts, including Mantras and certain weapon criticals. Deals 24 Oath + Slash damage (6 hits that deal 4 damage each), this is increased to 39 damage (6 hits that deal 6.5 damage each) if you are in True Strength.

name: Soaring Swiftkick
desc: Flying Swiftkick no longer consumes your speed boost and instead gives you more speed.

name: Solborn
desc: Harness your Heartfire to command the Phoenix bound to your soul.
additionalInfo: Spawns a small orange, stationary, Phoenix near you. The size of the Phoenix will increase based on the user's level. This Phoenix can be used like a campfire to rest and heal yourself.

name: Songs Unforged
desc: Your weapon criticals will now activate scrapsinger.

name: Sorcerer's Skill
desc: Decrease the amount of tempo it takes to vent by 5.
additionalInfo: This restores 5 Tempo after using your Vent instead of decreasing the Vent cost.

name: Sorcerer's Supply
desc: Increase the amount of Tempo you have by 10/30.
additionalInfo: Increases your Tempo by 10 in Pathfinder or 30 in Vow of Iron.

name: Sorcerer's Surge
desc: Your vent's cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds.

name: Soul Infusion
desc: Infuse Ardour into your executions. If your execute is interrupted, the opponent remains down for a longer amount of time. Your Ardour Screams are projected further.
additionalInfo: Increases your execution speed by 40%, down to 1.8 seconds from 3 seconds. Upon successfully performing an execution, use Ardour Scream for free. Your Ardour Scream range is buffed, sfx is changed, and minimum Ether cost required to cast Ardour Scream is reduced from 100% Ether to 40%.

name: Soul Rip
desc: Kill a player to gain 2 runes. Activate a rune when using this talent, and gain immense physical power, defense, and infinite ether for 25 seconds. Beware its strenuous downside.
additionalInfo: Grants a 50% weapon damage buff, ?% defense, infinite Ether, and a speed boost for the buff duration. Once the buff wears off, one of your legs will break, removing your ability to sprint for 30 seconds.

name: Soul Veil
desc: Soulthorn now directly siphons the song of your enemies. Accumulating stacks and increasing your power. Perfect plays are encouraged.
additionalInfo: Each successful attack with the Soulthorn builds up stacks of Soul Veil, increasing your weapon damage by 7.5%. This caps at a 30% damage buff. If you take damage while Soul Veil is active, the opponent who hit you will steal your Soul Veil stacks until you hit them back. This can prove fatal.

name: Sovereign State
desc: Landing physical hits builds your Blight Meter. At full gauge, enter a Blight State that changes your critical and empowers Blightsurge abilities.
additionalInfo: Landing Galebreathe Mantras, Thundercall Mantras, weapon attacks, and Blightsurger Mantras gives Blight Meter. Press [X] while having at least 30% Blight Meter to enter the Sovereign State. Your weapon is replaced with Sovereign Bangle and the Wither applied on Blightsurger Mantras is increased while in Sovereign State.

name: Sovereign's Counter
desc: Improve the efficiency of every counter you use. This effect becomes stronger for Punishment if you have the Riot Breaker talent.
additionalInfo: Punishment has its reflected damage output increased by 12.5% additively, meaning at level 5 you can reflect 112.5% of someone's damage on top of the base damage. If the Authority Commander Outfit is equipped, the longevity of the attack window on your Punishment is increased by 3x; from 20 seconds to a full minute. Prediction's active frames are increased slightly. Curse of the Unbidden has its posture restoration increased by 10%, restoring 40% of your posture. Payback has its active counter frames increased by 0.7 seconds.

name: Sow and Mend
desc: Sacrifice 35% of your blood for temporary health.
additionalInfo: Gives 25 flat Temporary Health on use. 30 second cooldown.

name: Spark of Theros
desc: Your Thundercall is imbued with the spark of Theros, altering its appearance and properties.
additionalInfo: Turns your Thundercall white and changes your Shock to Blightshock, applying Wither to affected targets.

name: Speed Demon
desc: Your attacks now inflict a reduced-strength bleed while you have a speed boost. 1s cooldown.
additionalInfo: Speed Demon's bleed deals 2.5% of your weapon's scaled damage every 0.3s, three times. This totals to 7.5% of your weapon's scaled over a 0.9 second period. Bleed deals typeless damage.

name: Speed Emission
desc: Gain a slight speed boost after landing a vent

name: Spell Shout
desc: You will now shout your mantra name upon cast
additionalInfo: The player will say the name of the Mantra they cast in a chat bubble. e.g. casting Fire Blade will make the player say "Fire Blade!" Renaming a Mantra will Spell Shout the new Mantra name.

name: Spike Traps
desc: Press F during the wind up of your Ice Spikes to create traps around you instead of spawning a spike in the normal spot.
additionalInfo: Spikes activate upon being stepped on.

name: Spinal Shatter
desc: Landing the Crescent Cleaver critical attack causes your opponent to be unable to sprint for 8 seconds. [10 second CD]

name: Spinal Splinter
desc: Landing a backstab with your critical deals 15 extra true damage.
additionalInfo: If your critical attack hits your opponent's back, it will gain an secondary damage instance that deals 25 true damage.

name: Spine Cutter
desc: Hitting an enemy in the back after a roll cancel will initiate a second slash that deals your weapon's raw damage.
additionalInfo: The second slash has no PEN. Procs on certain physical Mantras and criticals with the M1 tag. Has a 5 second cooldown.

name: Spinning Swordsman
desc: Running attacks do +15% extra damage when you have a speed boost.

name: Spotter
desc: Marking enemies while in Rhythm will now indicate their health status to your allies.
additionalInfo: Using Callout while in Rhythm will showcase the health value of the target to your allies.

name: Stack the Deck
desc: Charmed enemies will grant you even more damage multipliers on your Taunt counter.

name: Star Duster
desc: You take 30% less damage from airborne enemies.

name: Stasis Strike
reqs: glass_path_crystallization => stasis_strike := 90r LHT OR 90r MED OR 90r HVY, 90s ICE
desc: Your crystal explosions deal more damage whenever your opponent is also bottom frozen.
additionalInfo: Stasis Strike increases the damage of your crystal explosions by 1.67x when your opponent is bottom frozen.

name: Static Ace
desc: Using Lightning Stream with an active tether link targets your closest active link.
additionalInfo: Heavily reduces the windup of Lightning Stream.

name: Static Allure
desc: Having two active tethers will cause the previous tethered enemy to get magnetized to your newest tethered enemy, also increases the duration of tethers by 15 seconds.
additionalInfo: Instantly procs when you create a new Static Link. The extra Link duration only applies to the Static Link that procced the magnetization effect.

name: Static Beatdown
desc: The metal the cestus is made from allows electricity to be conducted easily through it, allowing you to further extend how long your opponents are stuck in shaky block based on your total Thundercall investment.
additionalInfo: Shaky block duration scales on your Thundercall investment, increasing by +0.004s for every point in Thundercall.

name: Static Blade
desc: Hitting blocks, blocking or parrying hits will now generate an electric charge in your blade, granting a small speed buff. Charges can stack up to 5 times.
additionalInfo: Grants stacks when you '''get parried''', not when you parry attacks. Also grants stacks when you hit blocks or block attacks. Each stack lasts for 15 seconds and refresh upon gaining another, including when you're at max stacks. Each stack grants an ~2.35% speed boost, totaling to ~11.75% speed at max stacks.

name: Static Fakeout
desc: Roll cancelling immediately after a parry will cause you to teleport behind your opponent.

name: Static Flash Clone
desc: When using lightning clones you instead disappear leaving behind a static clone for a short duration.

name: Static Link
desc: Flourishing or uppercutting an enemy creates a static link between you and your enemy.
additionalInfo: Lasts 15 seconds. The links are non-refreshable, meaning you will need to wait until after the duration ends to reapply them.

name: Stature Break
desc: Landing a backstab of any kind disables posture for 8 seconds.
additionalInfo: While their posture is paused, your opponent cannot restore posture by parrying, spitting, passive posture restoration, or through Steady Nerves. All other forms of posture restoration ignore this effect entirely.

name: Stay of Execution
desc: Increases the time taken to execute you by 20%. Saving others from being executed grants you both 10 TempHP (20s CD)

name: Steady Footing
desc: You're much more resistant to being pushed around.
additionalInfo: Knockback is reduced by 20%. Ice's slide distance effect is removed.

name: Steady Mind
desc: Despite the finality of your mind and body succumbing to the effects of the depths, you manage to ward it off for a little longer.
additionalInfo: You can spend more time in the Depths before gaining Afflictions.

name: Steady Nerves
desc: You dance from toe to toe - successful dodges restore posture.
additionalInfo: Restore 2 flat posture on a successful dodge.

name: Steampunk Soldier
desc: Increase the size of your steam which you activate Flashboil. Flashboil's cooldown is also reduced.

name: Steel Grip
desc: When you are blockbroken, negate it and set your posture to 80%.
additionalInfo: 90 second cooldown.

name: Steel Scales
desc: You take an additional 5% less damage when your armor is broken.
additionalInfo: The 3% Slash Armor is multiplicative with other sources of Slash resistance.

name: Steel Tread
desc: Gain a bit of knockback resistance as well as damage resistance against attacks that ragdoll you.

name: Steelvessel
desc: Landed attacks deal posture damage but when guard broken take massive damage. Posture gain on parry is reduced.
additionalInfo: Take posture damage instead of health damage. Upon being guardbroken, take a large amount of damage to your healthbar. Your healing and posture restoration from parrying attacks is reduced.

name: Stifled Jump
desc: Suffocating now applies Dazed if enemies jump. Suffocated PvE enemies now also get Sluggish when they are suffocated.
additionalInfo: The daze effect lasts for 1 second.

name: Stock Bash
desc: [Rifles] Your running attacks now apply a brief amount of daze and Stagger PvE enemies.
additionalInfo: Applies daze for one second.

name: Storm Link
desc: While you have a Static Link on someone, your Wind mantras that hit them are imbued with flashes of Lightning.
additionalInfo: Adds a secondary instance of damage to your Galebreathe Mantras if they hit a Static Linked target. This deals 10% of your attack's scaled damage as Thundercall damage.

name: Storm Return
desc: Being under lightning/wind status effect causes your Basic Attacks and Criticals to do 10% more damage. (Amplified with Lightning Cloak)
additionalInfo: Being under the effects of Amped or Lightning Cloak will proc this effect.

name: Stormcall
desc: Anytime you land a storm strike apply stormcall shock on your opponent, damaging them if they try to use a mantra while its active.
additionalInfo: Your Stormcall Shocks from other Specialist Equipment Talents apply the Stormcall Shock status effect. If your opponent attempts to cast a Mantra while affected, they will take 15 Galebreathe/Thundercall damage and they will gain the Shock and Winded status effect.

name: Stratos Step
desc: Holding space while climbing will now let your perform Stratos Steps to get even higher.
additionalInfo: Stratos Steps will only proc twice before going on a cooldown. Said cooldown applies to individual steps. Additionally, Stratos Step consumes Ether per step.

name: Stratoshock
desc: Your lightning deals an additional +5% damage when in the rain.
additionalInfo: All sources of Thundercall damage innately gains a 5% damage buff if it is raining. This Talent adds an additional 5%.

name: Strength Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Strength to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Strength Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Strength on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.

name: String Trick
desc: Pulls together any two opponents you've attached Hidden Tendril to.
additionalInfo: Does not proc on non-humanoids. Deals a small amount of damage on proc.

name: Strong Hold
desc: [Medium Weapons] When above half health and two-handing, posture damage taken is reduced by 5%.

name: Strong Stern
desc: The duration you are dazed from wall bangs is cut in half. Slightly reduce your guardbreak stun time from PvE enemies as well.

name: Stronger Under Pressure
desc: Your mantras with might gem now slow down your opponents, scaling with how many combat tags you currently have.
additionalInfo: This applies a 5% slow per combat tag you have, lasting 1 second.

name: Subzero
desc: Landing a running attack inflicts your opponent with a deep freeze. Additional light hits after the opponent thaws out will briefly slow them as well.

name: Successive Prediction
desc: Predicting an attack will briefly allow you to predict another.
additionalInfo: Allows you to reflect the entirety of multi-hit moves.

name: Successive Throw
desc: [Dagger] When you successfully flourish an enemy, you throw out a dagger afterwards
additionalInfo: There is a 1.5 second delay after your flourish before the dagger is thrown. This deals 5 Slash damage.

name: Suffocating Impact
desc: When flourishing enemies into walls they are suffocated and winded for a short duration.

name: Sulphur Surprise
desc: Your cooldown for throwing bombs will be shortened after your first bomb damages an enemy.
additionalInfo: Reduces the bomb throw cooldown from 5 seconds to 4 seconds. This only applies to the bomb thrown directly after this Talent procs, not on the bomb that procced this Talent. 20 second cooldown.

name: Sunken Predator
desc: Enemies you hit in the water or the depths have their speed buffs nullified and are slowed.

name: Sunset Ricochet
desc: Makes your bullets ricochet to a nearby enemy when hitting an opponent.

name: Supernatural Sense
desc: After dealing with literal ghosts, you feel emboldened.

name: Surestep
desc: Your boots secure your footing in all forms of terrain by digging into the ground with metal spikes.
additionalInfo: Makes you immune to the ragdoll and movement speed debuff of the Wind from the Second Layer and Moon's Eyrie.

name: Surge Path: Unstable Capacitor
desc: Your lightning no longer applies Shock, instead apply Surge. At maximum stacks of Surge, your opponents will Overload, sending arcs of lightning in every direction.
additionalInfo: Turns your Thundercall abilities blurple. Shock is replaced with Surge Rods, a stacking status effect that Overloads upon applying five Rods and then landing an attack that would apply a sixth, consuming all of the Rods. Each Rod has an individual 30 second duration. Surge Overloads deal 2.5 Thundercall damage per Rod with 5 Thundercall scaling to Overloaded target, gaining 0.0125 damage per Thundercall investment, and 2 Thundercall damage per Rod in an AoE that does not hit the Overloaded target.

name: Survival Kit
reqs: survival_kit := 20r CHA or 20r INT or 20r WLL
desc: You keep a well-stocked set of tools on your person at all times. Your flint never runs out of uses.

name: Survivalist
desc: Resist the effects of Weather Effects.
additionalInfo: Take less damage from Acid Rain.

name: Sweeping Edge
desc: Your Master's Flourish is larger and can now proc flourish talents.

name: Sweeten the Deal
desc: Madness can now be applied to enemies at 80% health or lower.

name: Swift Blade
desc: Proccing Wind Gem now gives you 10% more light attack posture during its duration. Extend the duration of Wind Gems by 2 seconds.

name: Swift Rebound
desc: Move faster after successfully dodging an attack.

name: Swift Strike
desc: Land a light attack behind your opponent to enhance your next critical, allowing you to teleport behind your opponent and strike them. This enhanced critical also procs assassination talents.
additionalInfo: On proc, you gain the Swift Strike status effect indefinitely. This effect will be consumed when you use your critical. The teleport has a range limit. 20 second cooldown.

name: Swiftfoot
desc: Reduce all slows you receive by 10%.

name: Swiftkick Master
desc: Proccing Swiftkick Prodigy now extends its duration to 15 seconds.

name: Swiftkick Prodigy
desc: Hitting successive Basic Attacks with Jus Karita will give a temporary speed buff.
additionalInfo: Your third M1 will grant a speed boost for a short duration.

name: Switchblade
desc: You can now utilize Dagger Talents when not wielding a dagger.
additionalInfo: This also allows other light weapons to use Dagger Talents.

name: Symbiotic Link
desc: Activate by pressing X while hovering over an ally or enemy. The Links are destroyed when you receive damage from a non-ally, you stray too far or you activate it again. Only one cord of each type may exist at once, links give a 3 second warning in break range, in the warning phase, they can't be broken.
additionalInfo: Blue Cords (Allies) gain a speed boost, 20% damage resistance, and a 5% damage increase. Red Cords (Enemies) gain a minor speed debuff. Allows you to passively see the health bars of your allies.

name: Tacet Minimization
desc: Focus your Tacet even further, allowing the radius at which you get spotted to become smaller temporarily.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that massively reduces the size of your Tacet bubble on use.

name: Tactical Reload
desc: [Rifles] Activate to make your rifle shoot bullets for 15 seconds.
additionalInfo: Upon activating the Talent tool, your rifle will gain the ability to fire Bullets for 15 seconds. 90 second cooldown. Does not work on Rifle Spear.

name: Tailor Made
desc: These were specifically made for your kind. Etris Flasks now heal you 45% more than usual.

name: Tainted Ground
desc: Enemies who stand in blood pools will not decay blood poison and gain 15% more blood poisoning.

name: Tap Dancer
desc: Dodging immediately after a roll-cancel no longer puts your Dodge on a longer cooldown.
additionalInfo: Negate the extra half a second cooldown added to the roll following a roll-cancel.

name: Target Focus
desc: Enemies you charm take more damage from your squadmates in your party.

name: Target Switch
desc: Parrying an opponent then hitting someone else makes your next mantra free.
additionalInfo: This effect is signalled by a yellow halo. Has a 4 second activation window with a 10 second duration.

name: Taste The Rainbow
desc: Every time you shoot, switch your ammo type. [Dual Guns]

name: Taunting Tongue
desc: Your taunt now applies Madness.

name: Teachings of the Edenkite
desc: Find your centre.
additionalInfo: Allows you to meditate, emitting a white aura and causing two white orbs to circle your head. Very heavily reduces your hunger and thirst consumption while you passively gain EXP and Attribute EXP and regenerate health at a mediocre rate, which is slightly reduced when in combat.

name: Temperature Shock
desc: Your fire mantras now detonate any stacked crystals.
additionalInfo: This has a 4 second cooldown.

name: Tempest Evolution
desc: Your slide-jumped Wind Blades are naturally stronger and if landed grant +20% damage in the air for a few seconds.
additionalInfo: Increases the slide jump variant of Wind Blade's damage by 20%. Additionally grants a 20% damage buff while you are airborne after landing the slide jump Wind Blade.

name: Temple Guard
desc: For the first 0.3s of your Critical Attack's windup, you take 90% less damage from any attacks that cancel your windup.
additionalInfo: You will only gain the damage reduction if your critical attack gets interrupted.

name: Tempo Sap
desc: Activate to make your dagger's light attacks steal tempo per hit for 20 seconds. [Dagger]
additionalInfo: 1 minute cooldown.

name: Tenacity
desc: Greatly shorten the amount of time you are guardbroken for.

name: Termite
desc: You can eat things most would consider inedible.
additionalInfo: Allows user to eat Sticks, Bamboo, Beeswax, Coral, Spider Eggs, all Lotuses, and every Ore.

name: Terrapod Tracer
desc: Deal 0.5% of your opponent's health to opponents who heal off of you.
additionalInfo: This only works while your opponent has Anti-Heal.

name: Terrifying Paralysis
desc: Your Hidden Blade disables opponents' ability to roll for 3 seconds.

name: The Eleventh Hour
desc: When below 15% health your mantras require no ether to cast for 11 seconds.
additionalInfo: Lasts 30 seconds with a 90 second cooldown.

name: The Final Act
desc: Landing a fire mantra immediately after flourishing an opponent will cause them to explode.
additionalInfo: Deals 5 Flamecharm damage on proc.

name: The Floor is Lava
desc: Your Eruptions leave lethal pools of lava beneath them. Don't fall in.
additionalInfo: The duration and damage of the lava pools scale on your Flamecharm investment.

name: The Path, Unveiled
desc: Your Jus Karita attacks deal 15% more damage.
additionalInfo: Increases Jus Karita damage by 10%, despite what the Talent description states.

name: The Rich Get Richer
desc: Gain 15% more notes whenever you sell something.

name: Thornmail
desc: Getting flourished applies a metal rod on your attacker.

name: Threefold Impact
desc: Every stack built with Strong Left provides a buff. 1st successful attack will reduces cooldown, 2nd ignores armor, and 3rd increases damage & guardbreaks.
additionalInfo: Grants buffs to your Strong Left based on how many Calamity Punch stacks you have. At one stack, your Strong Left cooldown will be reduced. At two stacks, your Strong Left will additionally deal typeless damage. At three stacks, your Strong Left will also guard break and deal more damage.

name: Thresher Claws
desc: All of your attacks have +5% more PEN. Your Basic Attacks and Criticals have an additional +5% PEN on top.

name: Thresher Thrasher
desc: Adapt to the ways of the thresher, increasing how long you are able to stay underground with Beast Burrow by 30%, and reducing its cooldown by 25%.

name: Thundercall Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your Thundercall to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Thundercall Attribute. This Talent will be removed if you do not meet its stat requirements.

name: Thundercaller
desc: Grants you the ability to command Lightning as a Thundercaller.

name: Tidal Shock
desc: Landing a successful Critical Attack will temporarily put you in a state where you dodge all mantras, as well as dazing your opponent.
additionalInfo: Your Critical attacks will apply Daze on hit. For the next 4 seconds after landing your Critical attack, if you were to be hit by any Mantra, you'll automatically dodge the Mantra instead, voiding its damage. This can be used to void self damaging Mantras. 13 second cooldown.

name: Tidekeeper
desc: Losing 25% of your health within the span of 3 seconds grants a 15% damage buff, 20% defense buff, and prevents from being knocked for 10 seconds.

name: Time To Go
desc: Taking a life grants a speed boost for 10 seconds. Taking a player's life doubles the speed boost and the duration.

name: To the Finish
desc: You take 10% less damage when below 30% health.
additionalInfo: For every point of Fortitude below 50, To the Finish loses 0.166% damage reduction, having a minimum value of 5.833% damage reduction at 25 Fortitude.

name: Torture Mastery
reqs: torture_mastery := 100s BLD, 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY
desc: Landing a critical on opponents applies 15 seconds of Torture Mastery. Heal any chip damage off players who have Torture Mastery on them. This duration is doubled if you have Rush Hour on.
additionalInfo: On proc, all chip damage you deal will be converted into healing. The conversion rate is 1:1.

name: Total Silence
desc: Massively reduce the sound of your footsteps and rolls.

name: Tough Love
desc: Deal 10% more damage to enemies Charmed by you. Mantras deal +5% instead. Being hit by someone the same Aspect or Oath as you applies Charmed briefly.
additionalInfo: Charms for 2 seconds with a 1 second cooldown. Tough Love's damage buff affects all sources of Charm, not just Tough Love's. Tough Love's damage buff is affected by the damage modifier cap.

name: Traditional Execution
desc: Flourishing an opponent turns your next critical attack into the Katana critical attack. Also extends Dancing Steps Of War's effects by 0.5 seconds.

name: Trained Legs
desc: Slightly increase your climb strength.
additionalInfo: Increases your maximum climb height.

name: Training Wheels
desc: Increase the amount of parry frames you have by 20%.

name: Treefelling Blow
desc: You can collect lumber from the trees you fell with your fists. It's only natural.
additionalInfo: Allows you to gain Wood when you destroy trees with Strong Left.

name: True Drifter
desc: You are a true drifter. Gain double the 'Cutting Pace' stacks and consume stacks to Blinkstep below 90% ether.
additionalInfo: Anytime you would have gained 1 Cutting Pace stack, gain 2 instead. You can now consume Cutting Pace stacks to use Blinkstep without being at 90% or more Ether.

name: True Ether Bullets
reqs: true_ether_bullets := 20r LHT OR 20r MED OR 20r HVY, 30s INT
desc: Using Ether Bullets applies elemental damage of your highest investment.
additionalInfo: Landing 2 shots will make the 3rd shot deal elemental damage and apply the status effect correlating to your highest attunement. This Talent will not do anything if you do not have an attunement.

name: True Mirage Clone
desc: Successfully dodging leaves behind a heat mirage clone that sets enemies that swung at you on fire.
additionalInfo: 20 second cooldown.

name: True Seraph Slash
desc: Landing the first hit of your critical attack enhances your next critical, giving you access to the Angels' spear smite ability.
additionalInfo: This deals 0.5x of your weapons scaled damage as typeless damage. Hits four times.

name: True Shatter
desc: Landing a critical shatters your opponent, ridding them of their speed debuffs and dealing true damage scaling off how slow they were.
additionalInfo: Deals 5 true damage per slow debuff.

name: True Skulk
desc: Massively reduce the sounds of your mantra casts.

name: True Vantage
desc: Successfully landing a Vent briefly gives you invisibility, along with giving a speed boost.
additionalInfo: Changes your Vent color to match the color of your Silentheart Tattoos.

name: Turning of the Wheel
desc: After perfect dodging a swing or critical attack, step backwards and ramp up your swingspeed.
additionalInfo: Using an M1 after dodging a weapon attack will cause you to step back and then advance with faster swing speed.

name: Turtle Shell
desc: If your shield is on your back, take reduced backstab damage and negate Spine Cutter.
additionalInfo: If you have a shield equipped and your main weapon two-handed, your shield will be put on your back. This grants 12.5% damage reduction against attacks that hit your back and prevents your opponent from proccing Spine Cutter.

name: Twelve Steps Ahead
desc: Landing Prediction will halve the cooldown to a minimum of 2s. Whiffing will double the cooldown to a maximum of 30s. This effect stacks for up to 30 seconds.
additionalInfo: This effect requires your opponent to be within 90 studs of you. For every point of Intelligence below 80, Prediction's maximum cooldown will be increased by 0.125 seconds, capping at 33.13 seconds with 55 Intelligence.

name: Twin Drift
desc: Hitting an enemy in the back after a roll cancel will bring upon twins who will follow up your assault.
additionalInfo: Performing a basic attack after a roll cancel will perform a second slash, then two light purple clones of yourself will attack the target.

name: Two Left Feet
desc: Posture breaking an opponent grants you +50% PEN for 3 seconds.
additionalInfo: 14 second cooldown.

name: Ultrakill
desc: [1H Guns] When under the effects of Rapid Fire you reload 2X as fast.

name: Umami
desc: Feast on foes with mighty cutlery. Chef Weapons now steal opponents hunger.
additionalInfo: Has a 35% chance to proc with a 3 cooldown per proc attempt, going on cooldown even if it fails to proc. The hunger and thirst steal are NOT affected by damage modifiers or resistances, rather exclusively being based on scaled damage dealt. Procs on: The Long Tong of The Law, The Flippers of Fate, The Pastry Paster, and Fondant Splitter.

name: Unbreakable
desc: You have reduced stun duration when block broken.
additionalInfo: Reduces the stun duration from being guardbroken from 1.05s to 0.7s.

name: Under The Radar
desc: The negative reputation threshold for a faction to put out posters of you is now higher.

name: Underdog
desc: You deal 2.5% more damage to those with higher HP than you, scaling up to 4% at 60 WLL. Additionally, you deal +10% more damage to physically larger foes.
additionalInfo: Underdog grants a 2.5% damage buff at 20 Willpower, this is increased by 0.0375% damage per Willpower above 20, capping at 4% with 60 Willpower. Grants a 2.875% damage buff at requirements. "Higher HP" refers to current HP.

name: Undying Flame
desc: Your Graceful Flame burns brightly even underwater. Those that gather around it are soothed and regain sanity.
additionalInfo: Graceful Flame can be casted in the First Layer. It cannot be used in the Diluvian Mechanism or Depths Trials, however. Graceful Flame passively restores sanity and health to those around it.

name: Unfazed
desc: You are more resilient to the side effects of going insane. You no longer Shiver and you Panic with less severity.
additionalInfo: You now shiver at tier 2 Insanity instead of Tier 1. You now scratch yourself at tier 3 Insanity instead of tier 2. You can no longer Panic.

name: Union Card
desc: A card representing your membership in the Ignition Union. Entitles you to speedier experience gain from Dungeons and Jobs, though the fees will slightly reduce your experience gain outside of these.
additionalInfo: Gain increased EXP gain from Jobs and Dungeons, but reduced EXP gain from any other content.

name: Union Hook
desc: You can now make use of the Ignition Union hooks to ascend or descend.

name: Union Pager
desc: Check up on job listings remotely.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that acts as a remote-access Job Board, allowing you to pick up jobs from any location.

name: Unmatched Dexterity
desc: Press [X] to Quick Swap between weapons within your toolbar.
additionalInfo: You can now swap weapons and equipment while in combat. Pressing [X] will swap your current weapon with a random weapon in your hotbar.

name: Unmended Eye
desc: All mantras you land now apply anti heal.

name: Unnecessary Theatrics
desc: Deliver a one-liner on uppercuts, flourishes and critical attacks that charms your opponents briefly.
additionalInfo: The charm proc has no cooldown, but the one-liners do. Instantly reapplies Charm after Manipulator removes it, on the same hit.

name: Unseen Threat
desc: You can assassinate those with weapons out provided you're not in combat yourself. Those you assassinate are slowed and unable to jump for 3s.

name: Unstoppable Force
desc: [Greathammer] You take 15% less posture damage when parried.

name: Unswayed
desc: The effects of Taunt and Encore no longer work on you.
additionalInfo: The Taunt Mantra and Cornered Fool no longer work on you. Sing will still Charm you.

name: Until It Is Done
desc: Your Berserk State lasts until you willingly end it.
additionalInfo: Your Berserk has an indefinite duration, ending only when you use the tool again.

name: Untouchable
desc: By landing consecutive hits on your opponent without taking any damage, reveal your True Strength for a short duration.
additionalInfo: Grants True Strength for 15 seconds on proc. Untouchable requires 10 'Untouchable Stacks'. Being hit by any non-self damage source will reset all Untouchable Stacks. Weapon attacks give 2 stacks each, and non-weapon attacks give 1 stack each.

name: Unwavering Focus
desc: When your mantras are parried, receive less posture (scales with intelligence).
additionalInfo: Grants 0.3% posture resistance per point in Intelligence, capping at +21% at 70 Intelligence.

name: Unwavering Resolve
desc: Getting parried punishes your posture 33% less.
additionalInfo: The posture reduction effect is reduced by 0.433% for every point in Strength below 40, having a minimum value of 22% posture reduction from being parried at 15 Strength.

name: Unyielding Frost
desc: Your Chill can proc through block, with blocked Chilling proc lasting 80% of the duration.
additionalInfo: If you have less than 100 Frostdraw, your Chill duration (when applied through block) will be reduced down to 25% of its original duration instead.

name: Unyielding Inferno
desc: Your flames burn just as strong even in the fiercest of storms.
additionalInfo: Negates the innate 10% damage debuff Flamecharm Mantras, First Light's critical, and Twisted Puppets' Puppets receive during the rain. Prevents your burn from being extinguished by the rain.

name: Vacuum Punch
desc: Your Gale Punch pulls enemies in before you hit them.
additionalInfo: Gale Punch Mantra will now pull players towards the user during the windup of the Mantra. Increases Gale Punch's windup by 0.1s.

name: Vanguard Style
desc: When using the Jus Karita critical attack, turn it into a kick that brings your enemies up in the air. Landing the critical attack while your opponent is in the air brings them up and slightly stun them while upgrading your next critical.
additionalInfo: This new critical attack has 20 base damage, and adopts your current weapon's scaling stat.

name: Vanguard's Onslaught
desc: Landing a Vanguard Style Jus Karita critical attack makes you deal 20% more damage in the air for the next 5 seconds.

name: Vanishing Wraith
desc: Your 'Aerial Attacks' while in Phantom Step will now teleport you behind your target.

name: Vasculitis
desc: Hitting your opponent while they have over 20% blood poisoning disables their deep gems for a brief duration while giving you Gem Enhancement against PvE temporarily.
additionalInfo: On proc, your opponent will be unable to use their Deep Gems for 8 seconds. Gem Enhancement increases the effectiveness of your Deep Gems in PvE.

name: Vengeful Pursuit
desc: Your running attacks that don't hit send out a special mid-range crescent projectile that slows on hit. Tracks onto those with their backs turned to you.
additionalInfo: Base damage and scaling differ depending on weapon type. 8 second cooldown.

name: Versatile
desc: You learn how to use new pieces of equipment quicker than others. You can equip things at 3 points lower than the requirement.
