additionalInfo: Reduces the attribute requirements of all equipment and weapon items by 3. This is applied to each requirement individually, meaning you can save upwards of 12 points.

name: Verses of Harmony
desc: Each elemental stance grants access to select talents from the corresponding attunement.
additionalInfo:
Gain access to the following Talents while in the respective Saint Stance. Upon swapping out of the Saint Stance, all granted Talents will be lost. Some of these Talents have an additional level requirement.
Flamecharm: Dancing Steps, Immolation, Agitating Spark
Frostdraw: Condensation Drip, Saint Jay, Frozen Legs, Fragile Freeze, Chilling Flourish
Galebreathe: Pressure Break, Wind Step, Air Pressure, Cyclone Blade, Inhale, A World Without Song
Shadowcast: Dark Rift, Lasting Sorrow, Dark God, Dark Hours, Shadow Overflow, Singularity
Thundercall: Static Fakeout, Stratoshock, Resolve Crusher, Static Blade, Gathering Electricity

name: Vessel's Gamble
desc: When you get guardbroken you take 3 times the damage of the attack.
additionalInfo: Though this Talent is actively detrimental to the user, the Corrupted Vessel's Boots +20 Posture offsets the downside.

name: Vigil's Grace
desc: Whenever you gain a speed boost, increase your swingspeed by 0.02.
additionalInfo: Stacks additively with Action Surge. Both this and Action Surge are applied before Lightning Cloak's swing speed multiplier.

name: Vital Wound
desc: Uppercutting your opponent punctures their lungs, slowing their rate of posture recovery for 30 seconds.
additionalInfo: Uppercutting your opponent applies the Vital Wound status effect, reducing their passive posture recovery by 40% for 30 seconds. This has no cooldown, but it cannot be refreshed or reapplied while it's active.

name: Voice of the Mad God
desc: Any time you apply charm it now applies "Madness" to enemies directly.

name: Void Glutton
desc: Siphon some of your enemies ether when you kill them. This gets added onto your health permanently, however you are now slowed at all times. This slow increases the more health you have siphoned.
additionalInfo: Gives 2 maximum health when you kill a player. You will also be slowed, with the slow being based on how much maximum health you've siphoned.

name: Voideye
desc: Voidmother's blessing, the method to travel back to the Voidheart.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that teleports you back to the Voidheart on use. 1 minute cooldown.

name: Voidwalker Contract
desc: You progress much faster from completing bounties, and less from events. Gain access to the Voidheart, and factions have a negative outlook on you.
additionalInfo: Gain increased EXP from bounties of all kinds, but gain reduced EXP from all other sources.

name: Volcanic Glass
desc: Detonating crystals causes an eruption soon after.

name: Volt Draft
desc: Using Inhale will now also make your Basic Attacks apply a storm strike. [20 second CD]
additionalInfo: This has a proc window of 5 seconds after using Inhale. Storm Strikes from this Talent deal 0.125 * (Thundercall + Galebreathe investment) Thundercall damage, capping at 25 damage with 100 points invested in both Attunements. Can proc Grounding Bolt.

name: Volt Reflex
desc: Your dodge window is increased with the power of lightning, but also increase the cooldown of your dodges.
additionalInfo: Increases the dodge window based on your Thundercall investment. Increases your dodge cooldown (for both dodge types) to 2.4 seconds.

name: Voltaic Conductor
desc: Your Thundercall Mantras deal 30% chip damage against enemies with conductor rods.

name: Vow of Mastery
desc: The Vow of Mastery grants the Master the power to command their Subject. To initiate a vow you must ask the other player if they'd like to make the vow. e.g. "wanna make a vow of mastery?"
additionalInfo: Players who take the vow are considered allies with their master and others who take the vow. Commands Given: "Sleep", "Drop", "Run", "Eat", "Say (Text)", "Use", "Locate", and "Leech" at base. "Fight" and "Sacrifice" at 50 Charisma, "Return" at 60 Charisma, and "Explode" at 75 Charisma.

name: Warding Radiance
desc: Every fire mantra builds up one halo stack. At 3 stacks a halo appears that allows you to slide further. Hell's Partisan is also triggered passively while this is active.
additionalInfo: Allows you to proc Hell's Partisan on Flamecharm Mantras that aren't Fire Forge while you have the halo active. Lasts 60 seconds, but cannot be refreshed.

name: Warrior's Swing
desc: [Heavy Weapons] Reduces incoming damage by 20% if hit during Heavy swing hyperarmor.

name: Water off a Duck's Back
desc: Venting will shift any elemental status effects affecting you onto those hit by your vent.
additionalInfo: Transfers Suffocation, Winded, Chill, Shock, Burn, and potion effects from yourself to your enemy on vent.

name: Way of Navae
desc: Gain the ability to use fist combat against weapons. Including the ability to block weapons with your hands using Ether.
additionalInfo: Allows you to use the Way of Navae fist style.

name: Way of the Wind
desc: Being in the air briefly increases the speed of your mantra casts. This effect only lasts while you're in the air.
additionalInfo: On proc, a wind of gale will erupt from your legs, signifying that the effect is active.

name: Weakening Venom
desc: Assassinating an opponent decreases the damage they deal by 25% for the next 30 seconds.

name: Weapon's Training
desc: Training with different weapons taught you how to wield all of them more proficiently. Gain slightly extra weapon scaling on all weapons you use.

name: Weather Resistant
desc: Take 30% less damage when under less than ideal weather conditions.

name: Whistleguard
desc: The favor of the winds is yours: landing three hits (five for light weapons) without taking damage against your opponent envelops you in a shield of wind.
additionalInfo: The wind shield grants one (1) autoparry frame and has a cooldown of 10 seconds. The shield will be dispelled early if you get hit (proccing the shield), cast a Mantra, feint an attack, or use a critical attack.

name: Wild Alchemy
desc: You have a chance to brew 2 potions instead of 1.
additionalInfo: Has a 25% chance to proc.

name: Will o' Wisp
reqs: will_o_wisp := 25r ICE OR 25r FLM OR 25r WND OR 25r SDW OR 25r LTN OR 25r MTL OR 25r BLD
desc: Your mastery over the Wisps of the Song enables you to mediate the innate conflicts between your wisps, allowing any number of Wisps to be active at a time.
additionalInfo: Allows the player to have multiple Wisp Mantras active at once.

name: Willpower Unbounded
desc: You have gained the ability to surpass your limits and train your willpower to its fullest.
additionalInfo: Removes the 75 investment cap on the Willpower Attribute. The stat requirements to obtain this Talent will be increased to 77 or 78 if your Aspect has increased Willpower on spawn, though this limitation will be removed if you have the Multifaceted Echo Unlock. The quest requirement for this Talent will be removed if you've obtained it previously on your account.

name: Wind Dancer
desc: Roll cancelling twice in quick succession will grant you a speed boost. One of your rolls must dodge a hit.
additionalInfo: Grants a 10% speed boost for 8 seconds. 10 second cooldown.

name: Wind Step
desc: Create a step of wind below you when jumping in the air. Jumping while sliding down a slope or off a cliff launches you forwards.
additionalInfo: Jump while airborne to double jump, leaving behind a wind pad that other players can also use. Alternatively, jumping while sliding down a slope will perform a Gale Leap that propels you forwards. While in combat, this ability cost Ether to use.

name: Windup Battery
desc: Landing 3 Thundercall Mantras without whiffing reduces the windup of your next Mantra by 10%.
additionalInfo: Applies this bonus to non-Thundercall Mantras.

name: Windwaker
desc: Call upon a gust of wind to propel your boat even faster.
additionalInfo: Grants a Talent tool that can only be used while on a boat and out of combat. On use, the boat will gain a very large amount of additional speed for a short duration.

name: Winter's Protection
desc: Your tightly-bound winter gear negates elemental damage buffs from weather on damage against you. Also seems to provide some resistance to the Gale.
additionalInfo: Increases the time it takes for the Second Layer's parasites to kill you. Negates weather-reliant damage buffs such as Frostdraw's increased damage when its snowing or Thundercall's increased damage when it's raining.

name: Wisp Convergence
desc: When empowered by the Chorus, your Wisps now grant their elements to your strikes.
additionalInfo: While Chorus of Souls is active, your weapon attacks will apply Burn, Chill, Shock, Winded, Shadow, Metal Rods, and Blood Poison. This Talent will not activate unless you have every Attunement's Wisp Mantra equipped and active. If one of your Wisps runs out, this Talent will deactivate until you recast the Wisp. This Talent will not work if you no longer have the Oathless Oath.

name: Withering Soul
desc: Your Basic Attacks proc 12.5% of their damage as Wither. Wielding the Deepspindle or Umbrite Witherblade will double the amount to 25%.
additionalInfo: The Wither applied is based off your weapon's scaled damage.

name: Woodland Terrain
desc: You move slightly faster on grass.

name: Wormwarder
desc: Your lantern generates a shroud of static electricity around you that the flesh-burrowing parasites of the Eternal Gale detest. It's not exactly the lightest thing to lug around, though.
additionalInfo: Makes you entirely immune to the Second Layer's Parasites, but at a cost of granting you a mobility debuff.

name: Worshipper's Tolerance
desc: Reduce the burn damage you take by 15%. While on fire, parrying an opponent's attack now sets them on fire [45 second CD].

name: Wraith Path: Twisted Puppets
desc: Your Flamecharm mantras summon puppets of shadow and flame. Your flames are now black.
additionalInfo: Your Flamecharm abilities and status effects are now black. Your regular burn is now much weaker, dealing 87.5% less damage, but it now spawns Puppets on a 4 second cooldown. Your Shadowcast abilities can now apply burn that deals 75% less damage than default burn. Both of these burn types drain 6.25 Ether from affected targets per tick. Puppets deal 20 Typeless damage and 10 posture damage. Increases the uptime of your Flame of Denial by 25%.

name: Wyvern's Claw
reqs: wyverns_claw := 25r LHT OR 25r MED OR 25r HVY, 15s STR
desc: You deal 10% more damage while airborne. Mantras receive a 5% damage increase instead.
additionalInfo: Activates after not being in contact with a grounded surface for ~0.75 seconds.

name: You'll Need To Get Past Me
desc: When you're attacked, one of your many allies will leap into action to protect their boss.
additionalInfo: Spawns in an allied NPC to attack whoever hits you. This Talent can only proc if you are not in combat. The cooldown of this Talent scales on your Charisma investment, having a base cooldown of 69.286 seconds with each investment point into Charisma decreasing this by 0.143 seconds. At requirements, this Talent will have a 59 second cooldown, has a maximum cooldown of 62 seconds at 50 Charisma, and a minimum cooldown of 55 seconds at 100 Charisma.
